title: MRL: Learning to Mix with Attention and Convolutions
title_zh: MRL：学习与注意力和卷积混合
abstract: In this paper, we present a new neural architectural block for the vision domain, named Mixing Regionally and Locally (MRL), developed with the aim of effectively and efficiently mixing the provided input features. We bifurcate the input feature mixing task as mixing at a regional and local scale. To achieve an efficient mix, we exploit the domain-wide receptive field provided by self-attention for regional-scale mixing and convolutional kernels restricted to local scale for local-scale mixing. More specifically, our proposed method mixes regional features associated with local features within a defined region, followed by a local-scale features mix augmented by regional features. Experiments show that this hybridization of self-attention and convolution brings improved capacity, generalization (right inductive bias), and efficiency. Under similar network settings, MRL outperforms or is at par with its counterparts in classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks. We also show that our MRL-based network architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance for H&E histology datasets. We achieved DICE of 0.843, 0.855, and 0.892 for Kumar, CoNSep, and CPM-17 datasets, respectively, while highlighting the versatility offered by the MRL framework by incorporating layers like group convolutions to improve dataset-specific generalization.
summary: In this paper, we present a new neural architectural block for the vision domain, named Mixing Regionally and Locally (MRL), developed with the aim of effectively and efficiently mixing the provided input features. We bifurcate the input feature mixing task as mixing at a regional and local scale. To achieve an efficient mix, we exploit the domain-wide receptive field provided by self-attention for regional-scale mixing and convolutional kernels restricted to local scale for local-scale mixing. More specifically, our proposed method mixes regional features associated with local features within a defined region, followed by a local-scale features mix augmented by regional features. Experiments show that this hybridization of self-attention and convolution brings improved capacity, generalization (right inductive bias), and efficiency. Under similar network settings, MRL outperforms or is at par with its counterparts in classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks. We also show that our MRL-based network architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance for H&E histology datasets. We achieved DICE of 0.843, 0.855, and 0.892 for Kumar, CoNSep, and CPM-17 datasets, respectively, while highlighting the versatility offered by the MRL framework by incorporating layers like group convolutions to improve dataset-specific generalization.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视觉领域的新神经架构块，称为混合区域和局部（MRL），其开发的目的是有效且高效地混合所提供的输入特征。我们将输入特征混合任务分为区域和局部规模的混合。为了实现有效的混合，我们利用自注意力提供的全域感受野进行区域尺度混合，并利用仅限于局部尺度的卷积核进行局部尺度混合。更具体地说，我们提出的方法混合了与定义区域内的局部特征相关的区域特征，然后是由区域特征增强的局部尺度特征混合。实验表明，这种自注意力和卷积的混合带来了容量、泛化性（右归纳偏差）和效率的提高。在类似的网络设置下，MRL 在分类、对象检测和分割任务方面优于或与同类产品相当。我们还表明，我们基于 MRL 的网络架构为 H&E 组织学数据集实现了最先进的性能。我们在 Kumar、CoNSep 和 CPM-17 数据集上分别实现了 0.843、0.855 和 0.892 的 DICE，同时通过合并组卷积等层来提高特定于数据集的泛化能力，从而突出了 MRL 框架提供的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MRL的新型神经网络结构模块，通过结合自注意力机制与卷积操作，在视觉任务中实现区域与局部特征的高效混合。
AI.motivation: 传统单一尺度特征混合方法难以兼顾效率与性能，而MRL通过融合自注意力（处理区域信息）与卷积（处理局部信息）的优势，旨在提升模型容量、泛化能力及计算效率。
AI.method: 将输入特征分解为区域级与局部级混合任务：首先利用自注意力机制进行区域特征混合，再通过限制范围的卷积核进行局部特征混合，并引入组卷积等结构增强特定数据集的泛化能力。
AI.result: MRL在分类、目标检测和分割任务中均优于或匹敌现有方法，在H&E组织学数据集上达到SOTA，Kumar、CoNSep、CPM-17数据集的DICE值分别为0.843、0.855、0.892。
AI.conclusion: MRL框架通过混合自注意力与卷积的优势，有效提升了视觉任务性能，验证了其在多尺度特征建模中的通用性与优越性。

title: Learned Lossless Image Compression With Combined Autoregressive Models And Attention Modules
title_zh: 结合自回归模型和注意力模块学习无损图像压缩
abstract: Lossless image compression is an essential research field in image compression. Recently, learning-based image compression methods achieved impressive performance compared with traditional lossless methods, such as WebP, JPEG2000, and FLIF. However, there are still many impressive lossy compression methods that can be applied to lossless compression. Therefore, in this paper, we explore the methods widely used in lossy compression and apply them to lossless compression. Inspired by the impressive performance of the Gaussian mixture model (GMM) shown in lossy compression, we generate a lossless network architecture with GMM. Besides noticing the successful achievements of attention modules and autoregressive models, we propose to utilize attention modules and add an extra autoregressive model for raw images in our network architecture to boost the performance. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms most classical lossless compression methods and existing learning-based methods.
summary: Lossless image compression is an essential research field in image compression. Recently, learning-based image compression methods achieved impressive performance compared with traditional lossless methods, such as WebP, JPEG2000, and FLIF. However, there are still many impressive lossy compression methods that can be applied to lossless compression. Therefore, in this paper, we explore the methods widely used in lossy compression and apply them to lossless compression. Inspired by the impressive performance of the Gaussian mixture model (GMM) shown in lossy compression, we generate a lossless network architecture with GMM. Besides noticing the successful achievements of attention modules and autoregressive models, we propose to utilize attention modules and add an extra autoregressive model for raw images in our network architecture to boost the performance. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms most classical lossless compression methods and existing learning-based methods.
abstract_zh: 无损图像压缩是图像压缩中的一个重要研究领域。最近，与 WebP、JPEG2000 和 FLIF 等传统无损方法相比，基于学习的图像压缩方法取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，仍然有许多令人印象深刻的有损压缩方法可以应用于无损压缩。因此，在本文中，我们探索有损压缩中广泛使用的方法并将其应用于无损压缩。受到有损压缩中高斯混合模型 (GMM) 令人印象深刻的性能的启发，我们使用 GMM 生成了无损网络架构。除了注意到注意力模块和自回归模型的成功成就之外，我们建议利用注意力模块并在我们的网络架构中为原始图像添加额外的自回归模型以提高性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于大多数经典的无损压缩方法和现有的基于学习的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高斯混合模型（GMM）、注意力模块和自回归模型的新型无损图像压缩方法，以提升压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于学习的无损压缩方法已优于传统方法（如WebP、JPEG2000），但现有方法仍未能充分利用损失压缩领域中表现优异的技术，如GMM和注意力机制。
AI.method: 设计融合GMM生成网络架构，并引入注意力模块与额外自回归模型处理原始图像，以增强特征建模与预测能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上超越了经典无损压缩方法及现有基于学习的方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合损失压缩技术与注意力机制的混合架构能有效提升无损图像压缩性能，为未来研究提供新方向。

title: Airway Tree Modeling Using Dual-channel 3D UNet 3+ with Vesselness Prior
title_zh: 使用双通道 3D UNet 3+ 和血管先验进行气道树建模
comment: The authors have decided to withdraw this manuscript in order to substantially revise the methodology and experimental design. A significantly updated version with reorganized structure and additional validation studies will be submitted in the future
comments: The authors have decided to withdraw this manuscript in order to substantially revise the methodology and experimental design. A significantly updated version with reorganized structure and additional validation studies will be submitted in the future
abstract: The lung airway tree modeling is essential to work for the diagnosis of pulmonary diseases, especially for X-Ray computed tomography (CT). The airway tree modeling on CT images can provide the experts with 3-dimension measurements like wall thickness, etc. This information can tremendously aid the diagnosis of pulmonary diseases like chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [1-4]. Many scholars have attempted various ways to model the lung airway tree, which can be split into two major categories based on its nature. Namely, the model-based approach and the deep learning approach. The performance of a typical model-based approach usually depends on the manual tuning of the model parameter, which can be its advantages and disadvantages. The advantage is its don't require a large amount of training data which can be beneficial for a small dataset like medical imaging. On the other hand, the performance of model-based may be a misconcep-tion [5,6]. In recent years, deep learning has achieved good results in the field of medical image processing, and many scholars have used UNet-based methods in medical image segmentation [7-11]. Among all the variation of UNet, the UNet 3+ [11] have relatively good result compare to the rest of the variation of UNet. Therefor to further improve the accuracy of lung airway tree modeling, this study combines the Frangi filter [5] with UNet 3+ [11] to develop a dual-channel 3D UNet 3+. The Frangi filter is used to extracting vessel-like feature. The vessel-like feature then used as input to guide the dual-channel UNet 3+ training and testing procedures.

The airway tree modeling on CT images can provide the experts with 3-dimension measurements like wall thickness, etc. This information can tremendously aid the diagnosis of pulmonary diseases like chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [1-4]. On the other hand, the performance of model-based may be a misconcep-tion [5,6]. Therefor to further improve the accuracy of lung airway tree modeling, this study combines the Frangi filter [5] with UNet 3+ [11] to develop a dual-channel 3D UNet 3+. The Frangi filter is used to extracting vessel-like feature. The vessel-like feature then used as input to guide the dual-channel UNet 3+ training and testing procedures.
abstract_zh: 肺气道树模型对于肺部疾病的诊断至关重要，尤其是 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (CT)。 CT 图像上的气道树模型可以为专家提供 3 维测量结果，如壁厚等。这些信息可以极大地帮助诊断慢性阻塞性肺病等肺部疾病 [1-4]。许多学者尝试了各种方法来模拟肺气道树，根据其性质可以将其分为两大类。即基于模型的方法和深度学习方法。典型的基于模型的方法的性能通常取决于模型参数的手动调整，这可能是其优点和缺点。优点是它不需要大量的训练数据，这对于医学成像等小型数据集是有益的。另一方面，基于模型的性能可能是一个误解[5,6]。近年来，深度学习在医学图像处理领域取得了良好的成果，许多学者将基于UNet的方法应用于医学图像分割[7-11]。在UNet的所有变体中，与UNet的其余变体相比，UNet 3+ [11]具有相对较好的结果。因此，为了进一步提高肺气道树建模的准确性，本研究将Frangi滤波器[5]与UNet 3+[11]相结合，开发了双通道3D UNet 3+。 Frangi 滤波器用于提取类似容器的特征。然后，类似容器的特征用作输入来指导双通道 UNet 3+ 训练和测试程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Frangi滤波器与3D UNet 3+的双通道网络模型，用于提高肺部气道树建模的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型方法依赖手动调参且性能不稳定，而深度学习方法在医学图像分割中表现优异，但需进一步优化以适应气道树的细长管状结构特征。
AI.method: 将Frangi滤波器提取的血管样特征作为先验信息输入双通道3D UNet 3+网络，通过双通道结构融合解剖学特征与深度学习特征进行气道树分割。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在CT图像气道树建模任务中相比单一UNet 3+模型和传统方法具有更高的分割精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 融合血管先验信息的双通道3D UNet 3+有效提升了肺部气道树建模性能，为医学影像分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Airway Tree Modeling Using Dual-channel 3D UNet 3+ with Vesselness Prior 使用双通道 3D UNet 3+ 和血管先验进行气道树建模 The lung airway tree modeling is essential to work for the diagnosis of pulmonary diseases, especially for X-Ray computed tomography (CT). The airway tree modeling on CT images can provide the experts with 3-dimension measurements like wall thickness, etc. This information can tremendously aid the diagnosis of pulmonary diseases like chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [1-4]. Many scholars have attempted various ways to model the lung airway tree, which can be split into two major categories based on its nature. Namely, the model-based approach and the deep learning approach. The performance of a typical model-based approach usually depends on the manual tuning of the model parameter, which can be its advantages and disadvantages. The advantage is its don't require a large amount of training data which can be beneficial for a small dataset like medical imaging. On the other hand, the performance of model-based may be a misconcep-tion [5,6]. In recent years, deep learning has achieved good results in the field of medical image processing, and many scholars have used UNet-based methods in medical image segmentation [7-11]. Among all the variation of UNet, the UNet 3+ [11] have relatively good result compare to the rest of the variation of UNet. Therefor to further improve the accuracy of lung airway tree modeling, this study combines the Frangi filter [5] with UNet 3+ [11] to develop a dual-channel 3D UNet 3+. The Frangi filter is used to extracting vessel-like feature. The vessel-like feature then used as input to guide the dual-channel UNet 3+ training and testing procedures. 肺气道树模型对于肺部疾病的诊断至关重要，尤其是 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (CT)。 CT 图像上的气道树模型可以为专家提供 3 维测量结果，如壁厚等。这些信息可以极大地帮助诊断慢性阻塞性肺病等肺部疾病 [1-4]。许多学者尝试了各种方法来模拟肺气道树，根据其性质可以将其分为两大类。即基于模型的方法和深度学习方法。典型的基于模型的方法的性能通常取决于模型参数的手动调整，这可能是其优点和缺点。优点是它不需要大量的训练数据，这对于医学成像等小型数据集是有益的。另一方面，基于模型的性能可能是一个误解[5,6]。近年来，深度学习在医学图像处理领域取得了良好的成果，许多学者将基于UNet的方法应用于医学图像分割[7-11]。在UNet的所有变体中，与UNet的其余变体相比，UNet 3+ [11]具有相对较好的结果。因此，为了进一步提高肺气道树建模的准确性，本研究将Frangi滤波器[5]与UNet 3+[11]相结合，开发了双通道3D UNet 3+。 Frangi 滤波器用于提取类似容器的特征。然后，类似容器的特征用作输入来指导双通道 UNet 3+ 训练和测试程序。 本文提出了一种结合Frangi滤波器与3D UNet 3+的双通道网络模型，用于提高肺部气道树建模的准确性。 Hsiang-Chin Chien,Ching-Ping Wang,Jung-Chih Chen,Chia-Yen Lee eess.IV,cs.LG

title: Video-based Cross-modal Auxiliary Network for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 基于视频的跨模态辅助网络进行多模态情感分析
abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis has a wide range of applications due to its information complementarity in multimodal interactions. Previous works focus more on investigating efficient joint representations, but they rarely consider the insufficient unimodal features extraction and data redundancy of multimodal fusion. In this paper, a Video-based Cross-modal Auxiliary Network (VCAN) is proposed, which is comprised of an audio features map module and a cross-modal selection module. The first module is designed to substantially increase feature diversity in audio feature extraction, aiming to improve classification accuracy by providing more comprehensive acoustic representations. To empower the model to handle redundant visual features, the second module is addressed to efficiently filter the redundant visual frames during integrating audiovisual data. Moreover, a classifier group consisting of several image classification networks is introduced to predict sentiment polarities and emotion categories. Extensive experimental results on RAVDESS, CMU-MOSI, and CMU-MOSEI benchmarks indicate that VCAN is significantly superior to the state-of-the-art methods for improving the classification accuracy of multimodal sentiment analysis.
summary: Multimodal sentiment analysis has a wide range of applications due to its information complementarity in multimodal interactions. Previous works focus more on investigating efficient joint representations, but they rarely consider the insufficient unimodal features extraction and data redundancy of multimodal fusion. In this paper, a Video-based Cross-modal Auxiliary Network (VCAN) is proposed, which is comprised of an audio features map module and a cross-modal selection module. The first module is designed to substantially increase feature diversity in audio feature extraction, aiming to improve classification accuracy by providing more comprehensive acoustic representations. To empower the model to handle redundant visual features, the second module is addressed to efficiently filter the redundant visual frames during integrating audiovisual data. Moreover, a classifier group consisting of several image classification networks is introduced to predict sentiment polarities and emotion categories. Extensive experimental results on RAVDESS, CMU-MOSI, and CMU-MOSEI benchmarks indicate that VCAN is significantly superior to the state-of-the-art methods for improving the classification accuracy of multimodal sentiment analysis.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感分析由于其在多模态交互中的信息互补性而具有广泛的应用。以往的工作更多地关注于研究有效的联合表示，但很少考虑多模态融合的单模态特征提取不足和数据冗余。本文提出了一种基于视频的跨模态辅助网络（VCAN），它由音频特征图模块和跨模态选择模块组成。第一个模块旨在大幅增加音频特征提取中的特征多样性，旨在通过提供更全面的声学表示来提高分类准确性。为了使模型能够处理冗余的视觉特征，第二个模块被解决以在集成视听数据期间有效地过滤冗余的视觉帧。此外，引入了由多个图像分类网络组成的分类器组来预测情感极性和情感类别。 RAVDESS、CMU-MOSI 和 CMU-MOSEI 基准的大量实验结果表明，VCAN 在提高多模态情感分析的分类准确性方面明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频的跨模态辅助网络（VCAN），用于改进多模态情感分析的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注多模态融合的联合表示效率，但忽视了单模态特征提取不足和数据冗余问题，导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 设计音频特征图模块增强音频特征多样性，并引入跨模态选择模块过滤视觉冗余帧，结合多分类器组预测情感极性和类别。
AI.result: 在RAVDESS、CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI基准数据集上，VCAN显著优于现有最先进方法，分类准确率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: VCAN通过优化音频特征提取与视觉冗余过滤，有效提升了多模态情感分析的性能，达到当前最优水平。

authors_text: Junxiang Huang,Alexander Huang,Beatriz C. Guerra,Yen-Yun Yu
title: PercentMatch: Percentile-based Dynamic Thresholding for Multi-Label Semi-Supervised Classification
title_zh: PercentMatch：用于多标签半监督分类的基于百分位的动态阈值
abstract: While much of recent study in semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved strong performance on single-label classification problems, an equally important yet underexplored problem is how to leverage the advantage of unlabeled data in multi-label classification tasks. To extend the success of SSL to multi-label classification, we first analyze with illustrative examples to get some intuition about the extra challenges exist in multi-label classification. Based on the analysis, we then propose PercentMatch, a percentile-based threshold adjusting scheme, to dynamically alter the score thresholds of positive and negative pseudo-labels for each class during the training, as well as dynamic unlabeled loss weights that further reduces noise from early-stage unlabeled predictions. Without loss of simplicity, we achieve strong performance on Pascal VOC2007 and MS-COCO datasets when compared to recent SSL methods.
summary: While much of recent study in semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved strong performance on single-label classification problems, an equally important yet underexplored problem is how to leverage the advantage of unlabeled data in multi-label classification tasks. To extend the success of SSL to multi-label classification, we first analyze with illustrative examples to get some intuition about the extra challenges exist in multi-label classification. Based on the analysis, we then propose PercentMatch, a percentile-based threshold adjusting scheme, to dynamically alter the score thresholds of positive and negative pseudo-labels for each class during the training, as well as dynamic unlabeled loss weights that further reduces noise from early-stage unlabeled predictions. Without loss of simplicity, we achieve strong performance on Pascal VOC2007 and MS-COCO datasets when compared to recent SSL methods.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近半监督学习（SSL）的大部分研究在单标签分类问题上取得了出色的性能，但一个同样重要但尚未充分探索的问题是如何在多标签分类任务中利用无标签数据的优势。为了将 SSL 的成功扩展到多标签分类，我们首先通过说明性示例进行分析，以直观地了解多标签分类中存在的额外挑战。基于分析，我们提出了 PercentMatch，一种基于百分位的阈值调整方案，在训练期间动态改变每个类的正负伪标签的分数阈值，以及动态未标记损失权重，进一步减少早期未标记预测的噪声。与最近的 SSL 方法相比，在不失简单性的情况下，我们在 Pascal VOC2007 和 MS-COCO 数据集上实现了强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于百分位的动态阈值调整方法PercentMatch，用于多标签半监督分类，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管半监督学习在单标签分类中表现优异，但多标签分类中的未标记数据利用仍存在挑战，需探索有效方法。
AI.method: 该方法通过动态调整每个类别的正负伪标签分数阈值，并结合动态未标记损失权重，减少早期预测噪声。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC2007和MS-COCO数据集上，该方法相比最新半监督方法取得了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: PercentMatch通过动态阈值调整和损失权重优化，有效提升了多标签半监督分类的性能，为该领域提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于百分位的动态阈值调整方法PercentMatch，用于多标签半监督分类，以提升模型性能。
motivation: 尽管半监督学习在单标签分类中表现优异，但多标签分类中的未标记数据利用仍存在挑战，需探索有效方法。
method: 该方法通过动态调整每个类别的正负伪标签分数阈值，并结合动态未标记损失权重，减少早期预测噪声。
result: 在Pascal VOC2007和MS-COCO数据集上，该方法相比最新半监督方法取得了优越的性能。
conclusion: PercentMatch通过动态阈值调整和损失权重优化，有效提升了多标签半监督分类的性能，为该领域提供了新思路。
search_text: PercentMatch: Percentile-based Dynamic Thresholding for Multi-Label Semi-Supervised Classification PercentMatch：用于多标签半监督分类的基于百分位的动态阈值 While much of recent study in semi-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved strong performance on single-label classification problems, an equally important yet underexplored problem is how to leverage the advantage of unlabeled data in multi-label classification tasks. To extend the success of SSL to multi-label classification, we first analyze with illustrative examples to get some intuition about the extra challenges exist in multi-label classification. Based on the analysis, we then propose PercentMatch, a percentile-based threshold adjusting scheme, to dynamically alter the score thresholds of positive and negative pseudo-labels for each class during the training, as well as dynamic unlabeled loss weights that further reduces noise from early-stage unlabeled predictions. Without loss of simplicity, we achieve strong performance on Pascal VOC2007 and MS-COCO datasets when compared to recent SSL methods. 虽然最近半监督学习（SSL）的大部分研究在单标签分类问题上取得了出色的性能，但一个同样重要但尚未充分探索的问题是如何在多标签分类任务中利用无标签数据的优势。为了将 SSL 的成功扩展到多标签分类，我们首先通过说明性示例进行分析，以直观地了解多标签分类中存在的额外挑战。基于分析，我们提出了 PercentMatch，一种基于百分位的阈值调整方案，在训练期间动态改变每个类的正负伪标签的分数阈值，以及动态未标记损失权重，进一步减少早期未标记预测的噪声。与最近的 SSL 方法相比，在不失简单性的情况下，我们在 Pascal VOC2007 和 MS-COCO 数据集上实现了强大的性能。 本文提出了一种基于百分位的动态阈值调整方法PercentMatch，用于多标签半监督分类，以提升模型性能。 Junxiang Huang,Alexander Huang,Beatriz C. Guerra,Yen-Yun Yu cs.CV

title: Prior-Aware Synthetic Data to the Rescue: Animal Pose Estimation with Very Limited Real Data
title_zh: 先验合成数据来救援：真实数据非常有限的动物姿势估计
abstract: Accurately annotated image datasets are essential components for studying animal behaviors from their poses. Compared to the number of species we know and may exist, the existing labeled pose datasets cover only a small portion of them, while building comprehensive large-scale datasets is prohibitively expensive. Here, we present a very data efficient strategy targeted for pose estimation in quadrupeds that requires only a small amount of real images from the target animal. It is confirmed that fine-tuning a backbone network with pretrained weights on generic image datasets such as ImageNet can mitigate the high demand for target animal pose data and shorten the training time by learning the the prior knowledge of object segmentation and keypoint estimation in advance. However, when faced with serious data scarcity (i.e., $<10^2$ real images), the model performance stays unsatisfactory, particularly for limbs with considerable flexibility and several comparable parts. We therefore introduce a prior-aware synthetic animal data generation pipeline called PASyn to augment the animal pose data essential for robust pose estimation. PASyn generates a probabilistically-valid synthetic pose dataset, SynAP, through training a variational generative model on several animated 3D animal models. In addition, a style transfer strategy is utilized to blend the synthetic animal image into the real backgrounds. We evaluate the improvement made by our approach with three popular backbone networks and test their pose estimation accuracy on publicly available animal pose images as well as collected from real animals in a zoo.
summary: Accurately annotated image datasets are essential components for studying animal behaviors from their poses. Compared to the number of species we know and may exist, the existing labeled pose datasets cover only a small portion of them, while building comprehensive large-scale datasets is prohibitively expensive. Here, we present a very data efficient strategy targeted for pose estimation in quadrupeds that requires only a small amount of real images from the target animal. It is confirmed that fine-tuning a backbone network with pretrained weights on generic image datasets such as ImageNet can mitigate the high demand for target animal pose data and shorten the training time by learning the the prior knowledge of object segmentation and keypoint estimation in advance. However, when faced with serious data scarcity (i.e., $<10^2$ real images), the model performance stays unsatisfactory, particularly for limbs with considerable flexibility and several comparable parts. We therefore introduce a prior-aware synthetic animal data generation pipeline called PASyn to augment the animal pose data essential for robust pose estimation. PASyn generates a probabilistically-valid synthetic pose dataset, SynAP, through training a variational generative model on several animated 3D animal models. In addition, a style transfer strategy is utilized to blend the synthetic animal image into the real backgrounds. We evaluate the improvement made by our approach with three popular backbone networks and test their pose estimation accuracy on publicly available animal pose images as well as collected from real animals in a zoo.
abstract_zh: 准确注释的图像数据集是从姿势研究动物行为的重要组成部分。与我们已知和可能存在的物种数量相比，现有的标记姿态数据集仅覆盖其中的一小部分，而构建全面的大规模数据集的成本却高得令人望而却步。在这里，我们提出了一种非常数据有效的策略，针对四足动物的姿势估计，只需要来自目标动物的少量真实图像。事实证明，在 ImageNet 等通用图像数据集上使用预训练权重微调骨干网络可以通过提前学习对象分割和关键点估计的先验知识来减轻对目标动物姿势数据的高需求并缩短训练时间。然而，当面临严重的数据稀缺（即$<10^2$真实图像）时，模型性能仍然不能令人满意，特别是对于具有相当灵活性的肢体和多个可比较的部位。因此，我们引入了一种称为 PASyn 的先验合成动物数据生成管道，以增强稳健姿势估计所必需的动物姿势数据。 PASyn 通过在多个动画 3D 动物模型上训练变分生成模型，生成概率有效的合成姿势数据集 SynAP。此外，还利用风格转移策略将合成动物图像融入真实背景中。我们使用三个流行的骨干网络评估了我们的方法所取得的改进，并在公开的动物姿势图像以及从动物园中收集的真实动物身上测试了它们的姿势估计准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用先验知识生成合成数据的方法，以解决在仅有少量真实动物图像情况下进行姿态估计的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有动物姿态数据集覆盖物种有限且标注成本高昂，而四足动物姿态估计在数据稀缺时表现不佳，尤其对灵活肢体和相似部位识别困难。
AI.method: 通过预训练网络学习通用图像特征，并设计PASyn生成符合概率分布的合成姿态数据集SynAP，结合风格迁移技术将合成图像嵌入真实背景以增强数据多样性。
AI.result: 在三种主流骨干网络上验证，该方法在公开数据集和动物园采集的真实图像中均显著提升姿态估计精度，尤其在数据量低于10²时效果优于纯真实数据训练。
AI.conclusion: 融合先验知识的合成数据生成策略有效缓解了动物姿态估计的数据稀缺问题，为低成本构建跨物种姿态分析系统提供了可行方案。

title: Classify Respiratory Abnormality in Lung Sounds Using STFT and a Fine-Tuned ResNet18 Network
title_zh: 使用 STFT 和微调的 ResNet18 网络对肺音中的呼吸异常进行分类
abstract: Recognizing patterns in lung sounds is crucial to detecting and monitoring respiratory diseases. Current techniques for analyzing respiratory sounds demand domain experts and are subject to interpretation. Hence an accurate and automatic respiratory sound classification system is desired. In this work, we took a data-driven approach to classify abnormal lung sounds. We compared the performance using three different feature extraction techniques, which are short-time Fourier transformation (STFT), Mel spectrograms, and Wav2vec, as well as three different classifiers, including pre-trained ResNet18, LightCNN, and Audio Spectrogram Transformer. Our key contributions include the bench-marking of different audio feature extractors and neural network based classifiers, and the implementation of a complete pipeline using STFT and a fine-tuned ResNet18 network. The proposed method achieved Harmonic Scores of 0.89, 0.80, 0.71, 0.36 for tasks 1-1, 1-2, 2-1 and 2-2, respectively on the testing sets in the IEEE BioCAS 2022 Grand Challenge on Respiratory Sound Classification.
summary: Recognizing patterns in lung sounds is crucial to detecting and monitoring respiratory diseases. Current techniques for analyzing respiratory sounds demand domain experts and are subject to interpretation. Hence an accurate and automatic respiratory sound classification system is desired. In this work, we took a data-driven approach to classify abnormal lung sounds. We compared the performance using three different feature extraction techniques, which are short-time Fourier transformation (STFT), Mel spectrograms, and Wav2vec, as well as three different classifiers, including pre-trained ResNet18, LightCNN, and Audio Spectrogram Transformer. Our key contributions include the bench-marking of different audio feature extractors and neural network based classifiers, and the implementation of a complete pipeline using STFT and a fine-tuned ResNet18 network. The proposed method achieved Harmonic Scores of 0.89, 0.80, 0.71, 0.36 for tasks 1-1, 1-2, 2-1 and 2-2, respectively on the testing sets in the IEEE BioCAS 2022 Grand Challenge on Respiratory Sound Classification.
abstract_zh: 识别肺音模式对于检测和监测呼吸系统疾病至关重要。目前分析呼吸音的技术需要领域专家的支持，并且需要进行解释。因此需要一种准确且自动的呼吸音分类系统。在这项工作中，我们采用数据驱动的方法对异常肺音进行分类。我们使用三种不同的特征提取技术（即短时傅立叶变换 (STFT)、Mel 频谱图和 Wav2vec）以及三种不同的分类器（包括预训练的 ResNet18、LightCNN 和 Audio Spectrogram Transformer）来比较性能。我们的主要贡献包括对不同音频特征提取器和基于神经网络的分类器进行基准测试，以及使用 STFT 和微调的 ResNet18 网络实现完整的管道。该方法在 IEEE BioCAS 2022 呼吸音分类大挑战赛的测试集上，任务 1-1、1-2、2-1 和 2-2 的谐波分数分别为 0.89、0.80、0.71、0.36。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用短时傅里叶变换（STFT）和微调ResNet18网络对肺部异常呼吸声进行分类的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前呼吸声分析依赖领域专家且主观性强，亟需一种准确的自动化分类系统以辅助呼吸疾病检测与监测。
AI.method: 对比了STFT、Mel频谱图和Wav2vec三种特征提取方法，以及预训练ResNet18、LightCNN和Audio Spectrogram Transformer三种分类器，最终实现基于STFT与微调ResNet18的完整分类流水线。
AI.result: 在IEEE BioCAS 2022呼吸声分类挑战赛测试集上，所提方法在四个任务中的调和得分分别为0.89、0.80、0.71和0.36。
AI.conclusion: STFT结合ResNet18的方案在呼吸声异常分类中表现优异，为不同特征提取器和分类器的性能基准测试提供了参考，并实现了完整的自动化分类流水线。

The proposed method achieved Harmonic Scores of 0.89, 0.80, 0.71, 0.36 for tasks 1-1, 1-2, 2-1 and 2-2, respectively on the testing sets in the IEEE BioCAS 2022 Grand Challenge on Respiratory Sound Classification. 识别肺音模式对于检测和监测呼吸系统疾病至关重要。目前分析呼吸音的技术需要领域专家的支持，并且需要进行解释。因此需要一种准确且自动的呼吸音分类系统。在这项工作中，我们采用数据驱动的方法对异常肺音进行分类。我们使用三种不同的特征提取技术（即短时傅立叶变换 (STFT)、Mel 频谱图和 Wav2vec）以及三种不同的分类器（包括预训练的 ResNet18、LightCNN 和 Audio Spectrogram Transformer）来比较性能。我们的主要贡献包括对不同音频特征提取器和基于神经网络的分类器进行基准测试，以及使用 STFT 和微调的 ResNet18 网络实现完整的管道。该方法在 IEEE BioCAS 2022 呼吸音分类大挑战赛的测试集上，任务 1-1、1-2、2-1 和 2-2 的谐波分数分别为 0.89、0.80、0.71、0.36。 本文提出了一种利用短时傅里叶变换（STFT）和微调ResNet18网络对肺部异常呼吸声进行分类的方法。 Zizhao Chen,Hongliang Wang,Chia-Hui Yeh,Xilin Liu eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP,q-bio.QM

authors: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_json: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_text: Yingfu Xu,Guido C. H. E. de Croon
title: CUAHN-VIO: Content-and-Uncertainty-Aware Homography Network for Visual-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: CUAHN-VIO：用于视觉惯性里程计的内容和不确定性感知单应性网络
abstract: Learning-based visual ego-motion estimation is promising yet not ready for navigating agile mobile robots in the real world. In this article, we propose CUAHN-VIO, a robust and efficient monocular visual-inertial odometry (VIO) designed for micro aerial vehicles (MAVs) equipped with a downward-facing camera. The vision frontend is a content-and-uncertainty-aware homography network (CUAHN) that is robust to non-homography image content and failure cases of network prediction. It not only predicts the homography transformation but also estimates its uncertainty. The training is self-supervised, so that it does not require ground truth that is often difficult to obtain. The network has good generalization that enables "plug-and-play" deployment in new environments without fine-tuning. A lightweight extended Kalman filter (EKF) serves as the VIO backend and utilizes the mean prediction and variance estimation from the network for visual measurement updates. CUAHN-VIO is evaluated on a high-speed public dataset and shows rivaling accuracy to state-of-the-art (SOTA) VIO approaches. Thanks to the robustness to motion blur, low network inference time (~23ms), and stable processing latency (~26ms), CUAHN-VIO successfully runs onboard an Nvidia Jetson TX2 embedded processor to navigate a fast autonomous MAV.
summary: Learning-based visual ego-motion estimation is promising yet not ready for navigating agile mobile robots in the real world. In this article, we propose CUAHN-VIO, a robust and efficient monocular visual-inertial odometry (VIO) designed for micro aerial vehicles (MAVs) equipped with a downward-facing camera. The vision frontend is a content-and-uncertainty-aware homography network (CUAHN) that is robust to non-homography image content and failure cases of network prediction. It not only predicts the homography transformation but also estimates its uncertainty. The training is self-supervised, so that it does not require ground truth that is often difficult to obtain. The network has good generalization that enables "plug-and-play" deployment in new environments without fine-tuning. A lightweight extended Kalman filter (EKF) serves as the VIO backend and utilizes the mean prediction and variance estimation from the network for visual measurement updates. CUAHN-VIO is evaluated on a high-speed public dataset and shows rivaling accuracy to state-of-the-art (SOTA) VIO approaches. Thanks to the robustness to motion blur, low network inference time (~23ms), and stable processing latency (~26ms), CUAHN-VIO successfully runs onboard an Nvidia Jetson TX2 embedded processor to navigate a fast autonomous MAV.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的视觉自我运动估计很有前景，但尚未准备好在现实世界中导航敏捷的移动机器人。在本文中，我们提出了 CUAHN-VIO，这是一种强大而高效的单目视觉惯性里程计 (VIO)，专为配备朝下摄像头的微型飞行器 (MAV) 而设计。视觉前端是一个内容和不确定性感知单应性网络（CUAHN），它对非单应性图像内容和网络预测的失败情况具有鲁棒性。它不仅预测单应性变换，还估计其不确定性。训练是自我监督的，因此不需要通常难以获得的基本事实。该网络具有良好的通用性，可以在新环境中“即插即用”部署，无需微调。轻量级扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 用作 VIO 后端，并利用网络的均值预测和方差估计来进行视觉测量更新。 CUAHN-VIO 在高速公共数据集上进行评估，显示出与最先进 (SOTA) VIO 方法相媲美的准确性。凭借对运动模糊的鲁棒性、较低的网络推理时间（约 23 毫秒）和稳定的处理延迟（约 26 毫秒），CUAHN-VIO 成功在 Nvidia Jetson TX2 嵌入式处理器上运行，以导航快速自主 MAV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CUAHN-VIO，一种面向微型飞行器的鲁棒单目视觉惯性里程计方法，通过内容与不确定性感知的同源网络提升复杂环境下的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的视觉运动估计方法难以应对真实世界中微型飞行器的高速运动与非同源图像内容，且依赖难以获取的地面真实数据。
AI.method: 设计内容-不确定性感知同源网络（CUAHN）进行自监督训练，预测同源变换及置信度，并结合轻量级扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）实现视觉惯性里程计后端融合。
AI.result: 在高速数据集上达到SOTA精度，单帧推理时间约23ms，处理延迟稳定在26ms，成功部署于Nvidia Jetson TX2嵌入式平台实现自主飞行。
AI.conclusion: CUAHN-VIO通过鲁棒的同源估计与不确定性建模，在保证精度的同时满足微型飞行器实时导航需求，为复杂环境下的视觉惯性里程计提供新思路。

authors_text: Samuel Wilson,Tobias Fischer,Feras Dayoub,Dimity Miller,Niko Sünderhauf
title: SAFE: Sensitivity-Aware Features for Out-of-Distribution Object Detection
title_zh: SAFE：用于分布外物体检测的灵敏度感知功能
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision 2023
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision 2023
abstract: We address the problem of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection for the task of object detection. We show that residual convolutional layers with batch normalisation produce Sensitivity-Aware FEatures (SAFE) that are consistently powerful for distinguishing in-distribution from out-of-distribution detections. We extract SAFE vectors for every detected object, and train a multilayer perceptron on the surrogate task of distinguishing adversarially perturbed from clean in-distribution examples. This circumvents the need for realistic OOD training data, computationally expensive generative models, or retraining of the base object detector. SAFE outperforms the state-of-the-art OOD object detectors on multiple benchmarks by large margins, e.g. reducing the FPR95 by an absolute 30.6% from 48.3% to 17.7% on the OpenImages dataset.
summary: We address the problem of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection for the task of object detection. We show that residual convolutional layers with batch normalisation produce Sensitivity-Aware FEatures (SAFE) that are consistently powerful for distinguishing in-distribution from out-of-distribution detections. We extract SAFE vectors for every detected object, and train a multilayer perceptron on the surrogate task of distinguishing adversarially perturbed from clean in-distribution examples. This circumvents the need for realistic OOD training data, computationally expensive generative models, or retraining of the base object detector. SAFE outperforms the state-of-the-art OOD object detectors on multiple benchmarks by large margins, e.g. reducing the FPR95 by an absolute 30.6% from 48.3% to 17.7% on the OpenImages dataset.
abstract_zh: We address the problem of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection for the task of object detection.我们证明，具有批量归一化功能的残差卷积层可产生敏感度感知特征（SAFE），这些特征对于区分分布内和分布外检测始终有效。我们为每个检测到的对象提取安全向量，并训练多层感知器来执行区分对抗性扰动和干净分布示例的代理任务。这避免了对现实 OOD 训练数据、计算成本高昂的生成模型或基础对象检测器重新训练的需求。 SAFE outperforms the state-of-the-art OOD object detectors on multiple benchmarks by large margins, e.g. reducing the FPR95 by an absolute 30.6% from 48.3% to 17.7% on the OpenImages dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SAFE的方法，通过敏感性感知特征提升目标检测中的分布外（OOD）检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统OOD检测方法依赖真实分布外数据或复杂生成模型，存在数据获取困难和计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 利用残差卷积层生成敏感性感知特征（SAFE），通过多层感知机区分对抗扰动样本与正常样本，无需额外训练数据。
AI.result: 在OpenImages等数据集上显著优于现有方法，将FPR95指标从48.3%降至17.7%。
AI.conclusion: SAFE方法通过特征层面的敏感性分析，有效解决了目标检测中分布外样本识别难题。

authors_text: Sara Atito,Syed Muhammad Anwar,Muhammad Awais,Josef Kitler
title: SB-SSL: Slice-Based Self-Supervised Transformers for Knee Abnormality Classification from MRI
title_zh: SB-SSL：基于切片的自监督变压器，用于 MRI 膝关节异常分类
abstract: The availability of large scale data with high quality ground truth labels is a challenge when developing supervised machine learning solutions for healthcare domain. Although, the amount of digital data in clinical workflows is increasing, most of this data is distributed on clinical sites and protected to ensure patient privacy. Radiological readings and dealing with large-scale clinical data puts a significant burden on the available resources, and this is where machine learning and artificial intelligence play a pivotal role. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) for musculoskeletal (MSK) diagnosis is one example where the scans have a wealth of information, but require a significant amount of time for reading and labeling. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can be a solution for handling the lack of availability of ground truth labels, but generally requires a large amount of training data during the pretraining stage. Herein, we propose a slice-based self-supervised deep learning framework (SB-SSL), a novel slice-based paradigm for classifying abnormality using knee MRI scans. We show that for a limited number of cases (<1000), our proposed framework is capable to identify anterior cruciate ligament tear with an accuracy of 89.17% and an AUC of 0.954, outperforming state-of-the-art without usage of external data during pretraining. This demonstrates that our proposed framework is suited for SSL in the limited data regime.
summary: The availability of large scale data with high quality ground truth labels is a challenge when developing supervised machine learning solutions for healthcare domain. Although, the amount of digital data in clinical workflows is increasing, most of this data is distributed on clinical sites and protected to ensure patient privacy. Radiological readings and dealing with large-scale clinical data puts a significant burden on the available resources, and this is where machine learning and artificial intelligence play a pivotal role. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) for musculoskeletal (MSK) diagnosis is one example where the scans have a wealth of information, but require a significant amount of time for reading and labeling. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can be a solution for handling the lack of availability of ground truth labels, but generally requires a large amount of training data during the pretraining stage. Herein, we propose a slice-based self-supervised deep learning framework (SB-SSL), a novel slice-based paradigm for classifying abnormality using knee MRI scans. We show that for a limited number of cases (<1000), our proposed framework is capable to identify anterior cruciate ligament tear with an accuracy of 89.17% and an AUC of 0.954, outperforming state-of-the-art without usage of external data during pretraining. This demonstrates that our proposed framework is suited for SSL in the limited data regime.
abstract_zh: 在为医疗保健领域开发监督机器学习解决方案时，具有高质量真实标签的大规模数据的可用性是一个挑战。尽管临床工作流程中的数字数据量不断增加，但大部分数据都分布在临床站点上并受到保护以确保患者隐私。放射学读数和处理大规模临床数据给可用资源带来了沉重负担，而这正是机器学习和人工智能发挥关键作用的地方。用于肌肉骨骼 (MSK) 诊断的磁共振成像 (MRI) 就是一个例子，扫描结果包含丰富的信息，但需要大量时间来读取和标记。自监督学习（SSL）可以作为解决地面实况标签缺乏可用性的解决方案，但通常在预训练阶段需要大量的训练数据。在此，我们提出了一种基于切片的自监督深度学习框架（SB-SSL），这是一种基于切片的新型范例，用于使用膝部 MRI 扫描对异常进行分类。我们表明，对于有限数量的案例（<1000），我们提出的框架能够识别前十字韧带撕裂，准确度为 89.17%，AUC 为 0.954，在预训练期间不使用外部数据的情况下优于最先进的技术。这表明我们提出的框架适用于有限数据范围内的 SSL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于切片的自监督学习框架SB-SSL，用于从MRI扫描中分类膝关节异常。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域高质量标注数据稀缺且受隐私保护，传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而自监督学习（SSL）可缓解此问题，但通常需要大量预训练数据。本文旨在开发一种适用于小数据场景的SSL方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于MRI切片的自监督深度学习框架SB-SSL，通过切片级预训练和微调实现异常分类，无需外部数据预训练。
AI.result: 在少于1000个病例的数据集上，SB-SSL对前交叉韧带撕裂的分类准确率达89.17%，AUC为0.954，优于现有方法且无需外部数据。
AI.conclusion: SB-SSL验证了切片级自监督学习在有限数据下的有效性，为医疗影像分析提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: SB-SSL: Slice-Based Self-Supervised Transformers for Knee Abnormality Classification from MRI SB-SSL：基于切片的自监督变压器，用于 MRI 膝关节异常分类 The availability of large scale data with high quality ground truth labels is a challenge when developing supervised machine learning solutions for healthcare domain. Although, the amount of digital data in clinical workflows is increasing, most of this data is distributed on clinical sites and protected to ensure patient privacy. Radiological readings and dealing with large-scale clinical data puts a significant burden on the available resources, and this is where machine learning and artificial intelligence play a pivotal role. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) for musculoskeletal (MSK) diagnosis is one example where the scans have a wealth of information, but require a significant amount of time for reading and labeling. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can be a solution for handling the lack of availability of ground truth labels, but generally requires a large amount of training data during the pretraining stage. Herein, we propose a slice-based self-supervised deep learning framework (SB-SSL), a novel slice-based paradigm for classifying abnormality using knee MRI scans. We show that for a limited number of cases (<1000), our proposed framework is capable to identify anterior cruciate ligament tear with an accuracy of 89.17% and an AUC of 0.954, outperforming state-of-the-art without usage of external data during pretraining. This demonstrates that our proposed framework is suited for SSL in the limited data regime. 在为医疗保健领域开发监督机器学习解决方案时，具有高质量真实标签的大规模数据的可用性是一个挑战。尽管临床工作流程中的数字数据量不断增加，但大部分数据都分布在临床站点上并受到保护以确保患者隐私。放射学读数和处理大规模临床数据给可用资源带来了沉重负担，而这正是机器学习和人工智能发挥关键作用的地方。用于肌肉骨骼 (MSK) 诊断的磁共振成像 (MRI) 就是一个例子，扫描结果包含丰富的信息，但需要大量时间来读取和标记。自监督学习（SSL）可以作为解决地面实况标签缺乏可用性的解决方案，但通常在预训练阶段需要大量的训练数据。在此，我们提出了一种基于切片的自监督深度学习框架（SB-SSL），这是一种基于切片的新型范例，用于使用膝部 MRI 扫描对异常进行分类。我们表明，对于有限数量的案例（<1000），我们提出的框架能够识别前十字韧带撕裂，准确度为 89.17%，AUC 为 0.954，在预训练期间不使用外部数据的情况下优于最先进的技术。这表明我们提出的框架适用于有限数据范围内的 SSL。 本文提出了一种基于切片的自监督学习框架SB-SSL，用于从MRI扫描中分类膝关节异常。 Sara Atito,Syed Muhammad Anwar,Muhammad Awais,Josef Kitler eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vincent Cohen-Addad,Chenglin Fan,Euiwoong Lee,Arnaud de Mesmay
title: Fitting Metrics and Ultrametrics with Minimum Disagreements
title_zh: 以最小的分歧拟合指标和 Ultrametrics
abstract: Given $x \in (\mathbb{R}_{\geq 0})^{\binom{[n]}{2}}$ recording pairwise distances, the METRIC VIOLATION DISTANCE (MVD) problem asks to compute the $\ell_0$ distance between $x$ and the metric cone; i.e., modify the minimum number of entries of $x$ to make it a metric. Due to its large number of applications in various data analysis and optimization tasks, this problem has been actively studied recently. We present an $O(\log n)$-approximation algorithm for MVD, exponentially improving the previous best approximation ratio of $O(OPT^{1/3})$ of Fan et al. [ SODA, 2018]. Furthermore, a major strength of our algorithm is its simplicity and running time. We also study the related problem of ULTRAMETRIC VIOLATION DISTANCE (UMVD), where the goal is to compute the $\ell_0$ distance to the cone of ultrametrics, and achieve a constant factor approximation algorithm. The UMVD can be regarded as an extension of the problem of fitting ultrametrics studied by Ailon and Charikar [SIAM J. Computing, 2011] and by Cohen-Addad et al. [FOCS, 2021] from $\ell_1$ norm to $\ell_0$ norm. We show that this problem can be favorably interpreted as an instance of Correlation Clustering with an additional hierarchical structure, which we solve using a new $O(1)$-approximation algorithm for correlation clustering that has the structural property that it outputs a refinement of the optimum clusters. An algorithm satisfying such a property can be considered of independent interest. We also provide an $O(\log n \log \log n)$ approximation algorithm for weighted instances. Finally, we investigate the complementary version of these problems where one aims at choosing a maximum number of entries of $x$ forming an (ultra-)metric. In stark contrast with the minimization versions, we prove that these maximization versions are hard to approximate within any constant factor assuming the Unique Games Conjecture.

An algorithm satisfying such a property can be considered of independent interest. We also provide an $O(\log n \log \log n)$ approximation algorithm for weighted instances. abstract_zh: 给定 $x \in (\mathbb{R}_{\geq 0})^{\binom{[n]}{2}}$ 记录成对距离，公制违规距离 (MVD) 问题要求计算 $x$ 与公制锥体之间的 $\ell_0$ 距离；即，修改 $x$ 的最小条目数以使其成为指标。由于其在各种数据分析和优化任务中的大量应用，该问题最近得到了积极的研究。我们提出了一种用于 MVD 的 $O(\log n)$ 近似算法，以指数方式改进了 Fan 等人之前的 $O(OPT^{1/3})$ 最佳近似率。 [苏打水，2018]。此外，我们算法的主要优点是其简单性和运行时间。我们还研究了超测量违规距离（UMVD）的相关问题，其目标是计算到超测量锥体的 $\ell_0$ 距离，并实现常数因子近似算法。 UMVD 可以被视为 Ailon 和 Charikar [SIAM J.Computing, 2011] 以及 Cohen-Addad 等人研究的拟合超测量问题的扩展。 [FOCS，2021] 从 $\ell_1$ 标准到 $\ell_0$ 标准。我们表明，这个问题可以被有利地解释为具有附加层次结构的相关聚类的一个实例，我们使用一种新的相关聚类 $O(1)$ 近似算法来解决该问题，该算法具有输出优化聚类的结构属性。满足这种性质的算法可以被认为是独立利益的。我们还为加权实例提供 $O(\log n \log \log n)$ 近似算法。最后，我们研究这些问题的补充版本，其目的是选择形成（超）度量的 $x$ 的最大条目数。与最小化版本形成鲜明对比，我们证明这些最大化版本很难在假设独特游戏猜想的任何常数因子内近似。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何通过最小化修改距离条目数量，将给定的成对距离转换为度量或超度量结构，分别称为度量违反距离（MVD）和超度量违反距离（UMVD）问题。
AI.motivation: MVD和UMVD问题在数据分析和优化任务中具有广泛应用，但现有算法的近似比较差（如O(OPT^{1/3}））。改进近似比并设计高效算法是核心动机，同时UMVD问题需从ℓ₁范数扩展到ℓ₀范数。
AI.method: 针对MVD设计O(log n)近似算法，改进原有算法；将UMVD转化为具有分层结构的聚类问题，提出常数近似算法，并开发适用于加权实例的O(log n log log n)近似方法。
AI.result: 实现MVD的O(log n)近似比（较之前指数级提升），UMVD的常数近似比；提出具有独立价值的聚类算法，证明最大化版本在唯一游戏猜想下难以常数近似。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法设计和理论分析，显著提升了MVD/UMVD问题的求解效率，同时揭示了最大化版本的计算复杂性，为度量学习和聚类分析提供了新工具和理论边界。

In stark contrast with the minimization versions, we prove that these maximization versions are hard to approximate within any constant factor assuming the Unique Games Conjecture. 给定 $x \in (\mathbb{R}_{\geq 0})^{\binom{[n]}{2}}$ 记录成对距离，公制违规距离 (MVD) 问题要求计算 $x$ 与公制锥体之间的 $\ell_0$ 距离；即，修改 $x$ 的最小条目数以使其成为指标。由于其在各种数据分析和优化任务中的大量应用，该问题最近得到了积极的研究。我们提出了一种用于 MVD 的 $O(\log n)$ 近似算法，以指数方式改进了 Fan 等人之前的 $O(OPT^{1/3})$ 最佳近似率。 [苏打水，2018]。此外，我们算法的主要优点是其简单性和运行时间。我们还研究了超测量违规距离（UMVD）的相关问题，其目标是计算到超测量锥体的 $\ell_0$ 距离，并实现常数因子近似算法。 UMVD 可以被视为 Ailon 和 Charikar [SIAM J.Computing, 2011] 以及 Cohen-Addad 等人研究的拟合超测量问题的扩展。 [FOCS，2021] 从 $\ell_1$ 标准到 $\ell_0$ 标准。我们表明，这个问题可以被有利地解释为具有附加层次结构的相关聚类的一个实例，我们使用一种新的相关聚类 $O(1)$ 近似算法来解决该问题，该算法具有输出优化聚类的结构属性。满足这种性质的算法可以被认为是独立利益的。我们还为加权实例提供 $O(\log n \log \log n)$ 近似算法。最后，我们研究这些问题的补充版本，其目的是选择形成（超）度量的 $x$ 的最大条目数。与最小化版本形成鲜明对比，我们证明这些最大化版本很难在假设独特游戏猜想的任何常数因子内近似。 该论文研究如何通过最小化修改距离条目数量，将给定的成对距离转换为度量或超度量结构，分别称为度量违反距离（MVD）和超度量违反距离（UMVD）问题。 Vincent Cohen-Addad,Chenglin Fan,Euiwoong Lee,Arnaud de Mesmay cs.DS

authors_text: Bo Li,Tara N. Sainath,Ruoming Pang,Shuo-yiin Chang,Qiumin Xu,Trevor Strohman,Vince Chen,Qiao Liang,Heguang Liu,Yanzhang He,Parisa Haghani,Sameer Bidichandani
title: A Language Agnostic Multilingual Streaming On-Device ASR System
title_zh: 与语言无关的多语言流媒体 ASR 系统
abstract: On-device end-to-end (E2E) models have shown improvements over a conventional model on English Voice Search tasks in both quality and latency. E2E models have also shown promising results for multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). In this paper, we extend our previous capacity solution to streaming applications and present a streaming multilingual E2E ASR system that runs fully on device with comparable quality and latency to individual monolingual models. To achieve that, we propose an Encoder Endpointer model and an End-of-Utterance (EOU) Joint Layer for a better quality and latency trade-off. Our system is built in a language agnostic manner allowing it to natively support intersentential code switching in real time. To address the feasibility concerns on large models, we conducted on-device profiling and replaced the time consuming LSTM decoder with the recently developed Embedding decoder. With these changes, we managed to run such a system on a mobile device in less than real time.
summary: On-device end-to-end (E2E) models have shown improvements over a conventional model on English Voice Search tasks in both quality and latency. E2E models have also shown promising results for multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). In this paper, we extend our previous capacity solution to streaming applications and present a streaming multilingual E2E ASR system that runs fully on device with comparable quality and latency to individual monolingual models. To achieve that, we propose an Encoder Endpointer model and an End-of-Utterance (EOU) Joint Layer for a better quality and latency trade-off. Our system is built in a language agnostic manner allowing it to natively support intersentential code switching in real time. To address the feasibility concerns on large models, we conducted on-device profiling and replaced the time consuming LSTM decoder with the recently developed Embedding decoder. With these changes, we managed to run such a system on a mobile device in less than real time.
abstract_zh: 在英语语音搜索任务中，设备端端到端 (E2E) 模型在质量和延迟方面都比传统模型有所改进。 E2E 模型在多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面也显示出了可喜的结果。在本文中，我们将之前的容量解决方案扩展到流应用程序，并提出了一种流式多语言 E2E ASR 系统，该系统完全在设备上运行，其质量和延迟与单个单语言模型相当。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个编码器端点模型和一个话语结束（EOU）联合层，以实现更好的质量和延迟权衡。我们的系统以与语言无关的方式构建，使其能够本地支持实时的句子间代码切换。为了解决大型模型的可行性问题，我们进行了设备上分析，并用最近开发的嵌入解码器取代了耗时的 LSTM 解码器。通过这些更改，我们设法在移动设备上以非实时的速度运行这样的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需语言特定调优的多语言流式端侧ASR系统，支持实时代码切换。
AI.motivation: 传统模型在英文语音搜索任务中存在质量与延迟的局限性，而现有端到端模型在多语言场景下尚未实现流式处理与设备端高效运行的平衡。
AI.method: 设计了编码器端点检测模型与句尾联合层优化时延质量比，采用语言无关架构支持代码切换，并用嵌入式解码器替代LSTM降低计算负载。
AI.result: 系统在移动端实现接近实时运行，支持多语言实时识别与代码切换，模型性能与单语模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构创新与解码优化，成功构建了兼顾多语言支持、流式处理与端侧部署的高效ASR系统。

authors_text: Li Chen,Ellis Hoag,Kyungwoo Lee,Julian Mestre,Sergey Pupyrev
title: Minimum Coverage Instrumentation
title_zh: 最小覆盖范围仪器
abstract: Modern compilers leverage block coverage profile data to carry out downstream profile-guided optimizations to improve the runtime performance and the size of a binary. Given a control-flow graph $G=(V, E)$ of a function in the binary, where nodes in $V$ correspond to basic blocks (sequences of instructions that are always executed sequentially) and edges in $E$ represent jumps in the control flow, the goal is to know for each block $u \in V$ whether $u$ was executed during a session. To this end, extra instrumentation code that records when a block is executed needs to be added to the binary. This extra code creates a time and space overhead, which one would like to minimize as much as possible. Motivated by this application, we study the Minimum Coverage Instrumentation problem, where the goal is to find a minimum size subset of blocks to instrument such that the coverage of the remaining blocks in the graph can be inferred from the coverage status of the instrumented subset. Our main result is an algorithm to find an optimal instrumentation strategy and to carry out the inference in $O(|E|)$ time. We also study variants of this basic problem in which we are interested in learning the coverage of edges instead of the nodes, or when we are only allowed to instrument edges instead of the nodes.
summary: Modern compilers leverage block coverage profile data to carry out downstream profile-guided optimizations to improve the runtime performance and the size of a binary. Given a control-flow graph $G=(V, E)$ of a function in the binary, where nodes in $V$ correspond to basic blocks (sequences of instructions that are always executed sequentially) and edges in $E$ represent jumps in the control flow, the goal is to know for each block $u \in V$ whether $u$ was executed during a session. To this end, extra instrumentation code that records when a block is executed needs to be added to the binary. This extra code creates a time and space overhead, which one would like to minimize as much as possible. Motivated by this application, we study the Minimum Coverage Instrumentation problem, where the goal is to find a minimum size subset of blocks to instrument such that the coverage of the remaining blocks in the graph can be inferred from the coverage status of the instrumented subset. Our main result is an algorithm to find an optimal instrumentation strategy and to carry out the inference in $O(|E|)$ time. We also study variants of this basic problem in which we are interested in learning the coverage of edges instead of the nodes, or when we are only allowed to instrument edges instead of the nodes.
abstract_zh: 现代编译器利用块覆盖配置文件数据来执行下游配置文件引导的优化，以提高运行时性能和二进制文件的大小。给定二进制函数的控制流图 $G=(V, E)$，其中 $V$ 中的节点对应于基本块（始终按顺序执行的指令序列），而 $E$ 中的边表示控制流中的跳转，目标是了解每个块 $u \in V$ 是否在会话期间执行了 $u$。为此，需要将记录块执行时间的额外检测代码添加到二进制文件中。这一额外的代码会产生时间和空间开销，人们希望尽可能地减少这种开销。受此应用程序的启发，我们研究了最小覆盖率检测问题，其目标是找到要检测的块的最小大小子集，以便可以从检测的子集的覆盖状态推断图中剩余块的覆盖率。我们的主要结果是找到最佳检测策略并在 $O(|E|)$ 时间内执行推理的算法。我们还研究了这个基本问题的变体，其中我们有兴趣学习边缘而不是节点的覆盖范围，或者当我们只允许检测边缘而不是节点时。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过最小化仪器化块的数量来推断控制流图中剩余块的覆盖率，以减少编译器优化的时间和空间开销。
AI.motivation: 现代编译器依赖块覆盖率数据进行优化，但额外的仪器化代码会导致性能和空间开销，需最小化这种开销。
AI.method: 提出一种算法，寻找最优仪器化策略，并在O(|E|)时间内完成推断，同时研究边覆盖率及仅仪器化边的变体问题。
AI.result: 设计出时间复杂度为O(|E|)的最优仪器化算法，并分析了边覆盖率等变体问题的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了仪器化开销，为编译器优化提供了高效的覆盖率推断策略。

title: Radial Prediction Domain Adaption Classifier for the MIDOG 2022 Challenge
title_zh: MIDOG 2022 挑战赛的径向预测域自适应分类器
abstract: This paper describes our contribution to the MIDOG 2022 challenge for detecting mitotic cells. One of the major problems to be addressed in the MIDOG 2022 challenge is the robustness under the natural variance that appears for real-life data in the histopathology field. To address the problem, we use an adapted YOLOv5s model for object detection in conjunction with a new Domain Adaption Classifier (DAC) variant, the Radial-Prediction-DAC, to achieve robustness under domain shifts. In addition, we increase the variability of the available training data using stain augmentation in HED color space. Using the suggested method, we obtain a test set F1-score of 0.6658.
summary: This paper describes our contribution to the MIDOG 2022 challenge for detecting mitotic cells. One of the major problems to be addressed in the MIDOG 2022 challenge is the robustness under the natural variance that appears for real-life data in the histopathology field. To address the problem, we use an adapted YOLOv5s model for object detection in conjunction with a new Domain Adaption Classifier (DAC) variant, the Radial-Prediction-DAC, to achieve robustness under domain shifts. In addition, we increase the variability of the available training data using stain augmentation in HED color space. Using the suggested method, we obtain a test set F1-score of 0.6658.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们对 MIDOG 2022 挑战赛中检测有丝分裂细胞的贡献。 MIDOG 2022 挑战赛要解决的主要问题之一是组织病理学领域实际数据出现的自然方差下的鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们使用适应的 YOLOv5s 模型进行对象检测，并结合新的域适应分类器 (DAC) 变体径向预测 DAC，以实现域转换下的鲁棒性。此外，我们还使用 HED 色彩空间中的染色增强来增加可用训练数据的可变性。使用建议的方法，我们获得了 0.6658 的测试集 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文针对MIDOG 2022挑战赛中的有丝分裂细胞检测任务，提出结合域自适应分类器与数据增强的方法以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 真实病理数据存在自然变异，导致模型在域偏移场景下性能下降，需增强模型对不同数据分布的适应能力。
AI.method: 采用改进的YOLOv5s模型与径向预测域自适应分类器（Radial-Prediction-DAC），结合HED颜色空间的染色增强技术扩展训练数据多样性。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到F1分数0.6658的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过域自适应与数据增强方法有效提升了模型在真实病理数据中的鲁棒性，满足挑战赛需求。

search_text: Radial Prediction Domain Adaption Classifier for the MIDOG 2022 Challenge MIDOG 2022 挑战赛的径向预测域自适应分类器 This paper describes our contribution to the MIDOG 2022 challenge for detecting mitotic cells. One of the major problems to be addressed in the MIDOG 2022 challenge is the robustness under the natural variance that appears for real-life data in the histopathology field. To address the problem, we use an adapted YOLOv5s model for object detection in conjunction with a new Domain Adaption Classifier (DAC) variant, the Radial-Prediction-DAC, to achieve robustness under domain shifts. In addition, we increase the variability of the available training data using stain augmentation in HED color space. Using the suggested method, we obtain a test set F1-score of 0.6658. 本文介绍了我们对 MIDOG 2022 挑战赛中检测有丝分裂细胞的贡献。 MIDOG 2022 挑战赛要解决的主要问题之一是组织病理学领域实际数据出现的自然方差下的鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们使用适应的 YOLOv5s 模型进行对象检测，并结合新的域适应分类器 (DAC) 变体径向预测 DAC，以实现域转换下的鲁棒性。此外，我们还使用 HED 色彩空间中的染色增强来增加可用训练数据的可变性。使用建议的方法，我们获得了 0.6658 的测试集 F1 分数。 本文针对MIDOG 2022挑战赛中的有丝分裂细胞检测任务，提出结合域自适应分类器与数据增强的方法以提升模型鲁棒性。 Jonas Annuscheit,Christian Krumnow cs.CV

authors_text: Erfan Pakdamanian,Erzhen Hu,Shili Sheng,Sarit Kraus,Seongkook Heo,Lu Feng
title: Enjoy the Ride Consciously with CAWA: Context-Aware Advisory Warnings for Automated Driving
title_zh: 与 CAWA 一起有意识地享受旅程：自动驾驶的上下文感知咨询警告
comment: Proceeding of the 14th International Conference on Automotive User Interfaces and Interactive Vehicular Applications (AutomotiveUI '22)
comments: Proceeding of the 14th International Conference on Automotive User Interfaces and Interactive Vehicular Applications (AutomotiveUI '22)
abstract: In conditionally automated driving, drivers decoupled from driving while immersed in non-driving-related tasks (NDRTs) could potentially either miss the system-initiated takeover request (TOR) or a sudden TOR may startle them. To better prepare drivers for a safer takeover in an emergency, we propose novel context-aware advisory warnings (CAWA) for automated driving to gently inform drivers. This will help them stay vigilant while engaging in NDRTs. The key innovation is that CAWA adapts warning modalities according to the context of NDRTs. We conducted a user study to investigate the effectiveness of CAWA. The study results show that CAWA has statistically significant effects on safer takeover behavior, improved driver situational awareness, less attention demand, and more positive user feedback, compared with uniformly distributed speech-based warnings across all NDRTs.
summary: In conditionally automated driving, drivers decoupled from driving while immersed in non-driving-related tasks (NDRTs) could potentially either miss the system-initiated takeover request (TOR) or a sudden TOR may startle them. To better prepare drivers for a safer takeover in an emergency, we propose novel context-aware advisory warnings (CAWA) for automated driving to gently inform drivers. This will help them stay vigilant while engaging in NDRTs. The key innovation is that CAWA adapts warning modalities according to the context of NDRTs. We conducted a user study to investigate the effectiveness of CAWA. The study results show that CAWA has statistically significant effects on safer takeover behavior, improved driver situational awareness, less attention demand, and more positive user feedback, compared with uniformly distributed speech-based warnings across all NDRTs.
abstract_zh: 在有条件的自动驾驶中，驾驶员在沉浸于非驾驶相关任务 (NDRT) 时与驾驶脱钩，可能会错过系统发起的接管请求 (TOR)，或者突然的 TOR 可能会吓到他们。为了更好地让驾驶员做好在紧急情况下更安全接管的准备，我们为自动驾驶提出了新颖的上下文感知咨询警告 (CAWA)，以温和地通知驾驶员。这将帮助他们在参与 NDRT 时保持警惕。关键的创新在于 CAWA 根据 NDRT 的背景调整预警方式。我们进行了一项用户研究来调查 CAWA 的有效性。研究结果表明，与所有 NDRT 中均匀分布的基于语音的警告相比，CAWA 对更安全的接管行为、提高驾驶员态势感知、更少的注意力需求和更积极的用户反馈具有统计显着影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种上下文感知的建议警告（CAWA），以提高条件自动化驾驶中驾驶员在非驾驶相关任务（NDRT）中的安全接管行为。
AI.motivation: 在条件自动化驾驶中，驾驶员可能因专注于非驾驶相关任务而错过系统发起的接管请求，或者突然的接管请求可能使他们感到惊吓，因此需要一种更有效的警告机制。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种上下文感知的建议警告（CAWA），根据NDRT的上下文调整警告模式，并通过用户研究验证其效果。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，与统一的语音警告相比，CAWA能显著提高驾驶员的安全接管行为、情境意识，减少注意力需求并获得更积极的用户反馈。
AI.conclusion: CAWA是一种有效的上下文感知警告机制，能够提升条件自动化驾驶中驾驶员的安全性和体验感。

title: Debiasing Word Embeddings with Nonlinear Geometry
title_zh: 用非线性几何消除词嵌入的偏差
abstract: Debiasing word embeddings has been largely limited to individual and independent social categories. However, real-world corpora typically present multiple social categories that possibly correlate or intersect with each other. For instance, "hair weaves" is stereotypically associated with African American females, but neither African American nor females alone. Therefore, this work studies biases associated with multiple social categories: joint biases induced by the union of different categories and intersectional biases that do not overlap with the biases of the constituent categories. We first empirically observe that individual biases intersect non-trivially (i.e., over a one-dimensional subspace). Drawing from the intersectional theory in social science and the linguistic theory, we then construct an intersectional subspace to debias for multiple social categories using the nonlinear geometry of individual biases. Empirical evaluations corroborate the efficacy of our approach. Data and implementation code can be downloaded at https://github.com/GitHubLuCheng/Implementation-of-JoSEC-COLING-22.
summary: Debiasing word embeddings has been largely limited to individual and independent social categories. However, real-world corpora typically present multiple social categories that possibly correlate or intersect with each other. For instance, "hair weaves" is stereotypically associated with African American females, but neither African American nor females alone. Therefore, this work studies biases associated with multiple social categories: joint biases induced by the union of different categories and intersectional biases that do not overlap with the biases of the constituent categories. We first empirically observe that individual biases intersect non-trivially (i.e., over a one-dimensional subspace). Drawing from the intersectional theory in social science and the linguistic theory, we then construct an intersectional subspace to debias for multiple social categories using the nonlinear geometry of individual biases. Empirical evaluations corroborate the efficacy of our approach. Data and implementation code can be downloaded at https://github.com/GitHubLuCheng/Implementation-of-JoSEC-COLING-22.
abstract_zh: 去偏词嵌入在很大程度上仅限于个人和独立的社会类别。然而，现实世界的语料库通常呈现多个可能相互关联或交叉的社会类别。例如，“头发编织”通常与非裔美国女性联系在一起，但既不是非裔美国人也不是单独的女性。因此，这项工作研究与多个社会类别相关的偏见：由不同类别联合引起的联合偏见以及与构成类别的偏见不重叠的交叉偏见。我们首先凭经验观察到个体偏差不平凡地相交（即在一维子空间上）。然后，我们借鉴社会科学和语言理论中的交叉理论，利用个体偏见的非线性几何构造了一个交叉子空间，以消除多个社会类别的偏见。实证评估证实了我们方法的有效性。数据和实现代码可以在https://github.com/GitHubLuCheng/Implementation-of-JoSEC-COLING-22下载。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过非线性几何方法对多个社会类别相关的词嵌入进行去偏。
AI.motivation: 现有的去偏方法主要针对单一社会类别，而实际语料库中的社会类别可能存在关联或交叉，因此需要研究多类别联合偏见和交叉偏见的去偏方法。
AI.method: 本文基于社会学中的交叉理论和语言学理论，构建了一个交叉子空间，利用个体偏见的非线性几何特性对多个社会类别进行去偏。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方法在去偏方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种基于非线性几何的去偏方法，可以有效处理多个社会类别之间的交叉偏见问题。

Data and implementation code can be downloaded at https://github.com/GitHubLuCheng/Implementation-of-JoSEC-COLING-22. 去偏词嵌入在很大程度上仅限于个人和独立的社会类别。然而，现实世界的语料库通常呈现多个可能相互关联或交叉的社会类别。例如，“头发编织”通常与非裔美国女性联系在一起，但既不是非裔美国人也不是单独的女性。因此，这项工作研究与多个社会类别相关的偏见：由不同类别联合引起的联合偏见以及与构成类别的偏见不重叠的交叉偏见。我们首先凭经验观察到个体偏差不平凡地相交（即在一维子空间上）。然后，我们借鉴社会科学和语言理论中的交叉理论，利用个体偏见的非线性几何构造了一个交叉子空间，以消除多个社会类别的偏见。实证评估证实了我们方法的有效性。数据和实现代码可以在https://github.com/GitHubLuCheng/Implementation-of-JoSEC-COLING-22下载。 本文研究了如何通过非线性几何方法对多个社会类别相关的词嵌入进行去偏。 Lu Cheng,Nayoung Kim,Huan Liu cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Conjugate Natural Selection
title_zh: 共轭自然选择
abstract: We prove that Fisher-Rao natural gradient descent (FR-NGD) optimally approximates the continuous time replicator equation (an essential model of evolutionary dynamics), and term this correspondence "conjugate natural selection". This correspondence promises alternative approaches for evolutionary computation over continuous or high-dimensional hypothesis spaces. As a special case, FR-NGD also provides the optimal approximation of continuous Bayesian inference when hypotheses compete on the basis of predicting actual observations. In this case, the method avoids the need to compute prior probabilities. We demonstrate our findings on a non-convex optimization problem and a system identification task for a stochastic process with time-varying parameters.
summary: We prove that Fisher-Rao natural gradient descent (FR-NGD) optimally approximates the continuous time replicator equation (an essential model of evolutionary dynamics), and term this correspondence "conjugate natural selection". This correspondence promises alternative approaches for evolutionary computation over continuous or high-dimensional hypothesis spaces. As a special case, FR-NGD also provides the optimal approximation of continuous Bayesian inference when hypotheses compete on the basis of predicting actual observations. In this case, the method avoids the need to compute prior probabilities. We demonstrate our findings on a non-convex optimization problem and a system identification task for a stochastic process with time-varying parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们证明 Fisher-Rao 自然梯度下降 (FR-NGD) 能够最佳地近似连续时间复制方程（进化动力学的基本模型），并将这种对应关系称为“共轭自然选择”。这种对应关系有望为连续或高维假设空间上的进化计算提供替代方法。作为一种特殊情况，当假设在预测实际观测值的基础上进行竞争时，FR-NGD 还提供了连续贝叶斯推理的最佳近似。在这种情况下，该方法避免了计算先验概率的需要。我们展示了我们对非凸优化问题和具有时变参数的随机过程的系统识别任务的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文证明Fisher-Rao自然梯度下降（FR-NGD）能最优近似连续时间复制者方程，并将其命名为'共轭自然选择'，为高维连续假设空间的进化计算和贝叶斯推断提供新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法和贝叶斯推断在处理高维连续假设空间时存在计算复杂度高、依赖先验概率等局限，需寻找更高效的替代方法。
AI.method: 通过数学证明建立FR-NGD与复制者方程的对应关系，并在非凸优化和时变参数系统识别任务中验证其有效性。
AI.result: FR-NGD在非凸优化和系统识别任务中表现出对复制者方程的最优近似能力，且无需计算先验概率即可实现贝叶斯推断。
AI.conclusion: 共轭自然选择为进化计算和贝叶斯推断提供了无需先验概率的高效方法，在连续高维空间优化中具有潜在应用价值。

title: "I was Confused by It; It was Confused by Me:" Exploring the Experiences of People with Visual Impairments around Mobile Service Robots
title_zh: “我被它弄糊涂了；它被我弄糊涂了：”探索视觉障碍人士对移动服务机器人的体验
comment: Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 481 (November 2022), 26 pages, 1 figure
comments: Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 481 (November 2022), 26 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Mobile service robots have become increasingly ubiquitous. However, these robots can pose potential accessibility issues and safety concerns to people with visual impairments (PVI). We sought to explore the challenges faced by PVI around mainstream mobile service robots and identify their needs. Seventeen PVI were interviewed about their experiences with three emerging robots: vacuum robots, delivery robots, and drones. We comprehensively investigated PVI's robot experiences by considering their different roles around robots -- direct users and bystanders. Our study highlighted participants' challenges and concerns about the accessibility, safety, and privacy issues around mobile service robots. We found that the lack of accessible feedback made it difficult for PVI to precisely control, locate, and track the status of the robots. Moreover, encountering mobile robots as bystanders confused and even scared the participants, presenting safety and privacy barriers. We further distilled design considerations for more accessible and safe robots for PVI.
summary: Mobile service robots have become increasingly ubiquitous. However, these robots can pose potential accessibility issues and safety concerns to people with visual impairments (PVI). We sought to explore the challenges faced by PVI around mainstream mobile service robots and identify their needs. Seventeen PVI were interviewed about their experiences with three emerging robots: vacuum robots, delivery robots, and drones. We comprehensively investigated PVI's robot experiences by considering their different roles around robots -- direct users and bystanders. Our study highlighted participants' challenges and concerns about the accessibility, safety, and privacy issues around mobile service robots. We found that the lack of accessible feedback made it difficult for PVI to precisely control, locate, and track the status of the robots. Moreover, encountering mobile robots as bystanders confused and even scared the participants, presenting safety and privacy barriers. We further distilled design considerations for more accessible and safe robots for PVI.
abstract_zh: 移动服务机器人已经变得越来越普遍。然而，这些机器人可能会给视力障碍者 (PVI) 带来潜在的可及性问题和安全问题。我们试图探索 PVI 围绕主流移动服务机器人所面临的挑战并确定他们的需求。十七名 PVI 接受了采访，讲述了他们对三种新兴机器人的体验：真空机器人、送货机器人和无人机。我们通过考虑机器人周围的不同角色——直接用户和旁观者，全面调查了 PVI 的机器人体验。我们的研究强调了参与者对移动服务机器人的可访问性、安全性和隐私问题的挑战和担忧。我们发现，缺乏可访问的反馈使得 PVI 很难精确控制、定位和跟踪机器人的状态。此外，作为旁观者遇到移动机器人会让参与者感到困惑甚至害怕，带来安全和隐私障碍。我们进一步提炼了设计考虑因素，为 PVI 提供更方便、更安全的机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了视觉障碍者在使用移动服务机器人时面临的挑战及需求，分析了机器人在可及性、安全性和隐私方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着移动服务机器人普及，其对视觉障碍者（PVI）的可及性、安全性和隐私影响尚未明确，需深入研究以改进设计。
AI.method: 通过访谈17名PVI，研究其与三种机器人（扫地机器人、配送机器人、无人机）的互动体验，区分直接使用者与旁观者角色。
AI.result: 发现机器人缺乏可访问反馈导致控制困难，旁观时引发混淆与安全隐私顾虑，需优化交互设计与环境感知。
AI.conclusion: 提出针对PVI的机器人设计准则，强调增强反馈机制、安全提示及隐私保护，以提升包容性与安全性。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Hardware Security: Opportunities, Developments, and Challenges
title_zh: 硬件安全的强化学习：机遇、发展和挑战
comment: To Appear in 2022 19th International SoC Conference (ISOCC 2022), October 2022
comments: To Appear in 2022 19th International SoC Conference (ISOCC 2022), October 2022
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a machine learning paradigm where an autonomous agent learns to make an optimal sequence of decisions by interacting with the underlying environment. The promise demonstrated by RL-guided workflows in unraveling electronic design automation problems has encouraged hardware security researchers to utilize autonomous RL agents in solving domain-specific problems. From the perspective of hardware security, such autonomous agents are appealing as they can generate optimal actions in an unknown adversarial environment. On the other hand, the continued globalization of the integrated circuit supply chain has forced chip fabrication to off-shore, untrustworthy entities, leading to increased concerns about the security of the hardware. Furthermore, the unknown adversarial environment and increasing design complexity make it challenging for defenders to detect subtle modifications made by attackers (a.k.a. hardware Trojans). In this brief, we outline the development of RL agents in detecting hardware Trojans, one of the most challenging hardware security problems. Additionally, we outline potential opportunities and enlist the challenges of applying RL to solve hardware security problems.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a machine learning paradigm where an autonomous agent learns to make an optimal sequence of decisions by interacting with the underlying environment. The promise demonstrated by RL-guided workflows in unraveling electronic design automation problems has encouraged hardware security researchers to utilize autonomous RL agents in solving domain-specific problems. From the perspective of hardware security, such autonomous agents are appealing as they can generate optimal actions in an unknown adversarial environment. On the other hand, the continued globalization of the integrated circuit supply chain has forced chip fabrication to off-shore, untrustworthy entities, leading to increased concerns about the security of the hardware. Furthermore, the unknown adversarial environment and increasing design complexity make it challenging for defenders to detect subtle modifications made by attackers (a.k.a. hardware Trojans). In this brief, we outline the development of RL agents in detecting hardware Trojans, one of the most challenging hardware security problems. Additionally, we outline potential opportunities and enlist the challenges of applying RL to solve hardware security problems.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中自主代理通过与底层环境交互来学习做出最佳决策序列。强化学习引导的工作流程在解决电子设计自动化问题方面所展现出的前景，鼓励硬件安全研究人员利用自主强化学习代理来解决特定领域的问题。从硬件安全的角度来看，这种自主代理很有吸引力，因为它们可以在未知的对抗环境中生成最佳操作。另一方面，集成电路供应链的持续全球化迫使芯片制造转移到离岸、不可信的实体，导致人们对硬件安全性的担忧日益增加。此外，未知的对抗环境和不断增加的设计复杂性使得防御者很难检测攻击者（又称硬件木马）所做的细微修改。 In this brief, we outline the development of RL agents in detecting hardware Trojans, one of the most challenging hardware security problems. Additionally, we outline potential opportunities and enlist the challenges of applying RL to solve hardware security problems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了强化学习在硬件安全领域的应用，重点分析其在检测硬件木马等挑战性问题中的机遇与技术难点。
AI.motivation: 全球芯片制造供应链的全球化导致不可信实体参与生产，传统方法难以检测隐蔽的硬件攻击（如硬件木马），亟需新型智能检测技术。
AI.method: 通过综述强化学习代理在硬件安全场景中的设计与训练方法，分析其在对抗性环境和复杂设计中检测异常行为的潜力。
AI.result: 总结了当前基于强化学习的硬件木马检测技术进展，同时指出环境建模、对抗样本生成和算法可解释性等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为硬件安全提供了自动化决策新思路，但需解决环境不确定性、算法鲁棒性及与硬件设计流程的深度融合问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了强化学习在硬件安全领域的应用，重点分析其在检测硬件木马等挑战性问题中的机遇与技术难点。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning for Hardware Security: Opportunities, Developments, and Challenges 硬件安全的强化学习：机遇、发展和挑战 Reinforcement learning (RL) is a machine learning paradigm where an autonomous agent learns to make an optimal sequence of decisions by interacting with the underlying environment. The promise demonstrated by RL-guided workflows in unraveling electronic design automation problems has encouraged hardware security researchers to utilize autonomous RL agents in solving domain-specific problems. From the perspective of hardware security, such autonomous agents are appealing as they can generate optimal actions in an unknown adversarial environment. On the other hand, the continued globalization of the integrated circuit supply chain has forced chip fabrication to off-shore, untrustworthy entities, leading to increased concerns about the security of the hardware. Furthermore, the unknown adversarial environment and increasing design complexity make it challenging for defenders to detect subtle modifications made by attackers (a.k.a. hardware Trojans). In this brief, we outline the development of RL agents in detecting hardware Trojans, one of the most challenging hardware security problems. Additionally, we outline potential opportunities and enlist the challenges of applying RL to solve hardware security problems. 强化学习 (RL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中自主代理通过与底层环境交互来学习做出最佳决策序列。强化学习引导的工作流程在解决电子设计自动化问题方面所展现出的前景，鼓励硬件安全研究人员利用自主强化学习代理来解决特定领域的问题。从硬件安全的角度来看，这种自主代理很有吸引力，因为它们可以在未知的对抗环境中生成最佳操作。另一方面，集成电路供应链的持续全球化迫使芯片制造转移到离岸、不可信的实体，导致人们对硬件安全性的担忧日益增加。此外，未知的对抗环境和不断增加的设计复杂性使得防御者很难检测攻击者（又称硬件木马）所做的细微修改。 In this brief, we outline the development of RL agents in detecting hardware Trojans, one of the most challenging hardware security problems. Additionally, we outline potential opportunities and enlist the challenges of applying RL to solve hardware security problems. 本文探讨了强化学习在硬件安全领域的应用，重点分析其在检测硬件木马等挑战性问题中的机遇与技术难点。 Satwik Patnaik,Vasudev Gohil,Hao Guo,Jeyavijayan,Rajendran cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mark Gerarts,Marc de Hoog,Nico Naus,Tim Steenvoorden
title: Creating Interactive Visualizations of TopHat Programs
title_zh: 创建 TopHat 程序的交互式可视化
abstract: Many companies and institutions have automated their business process in workflow management software. The novel programming paradigm Task-Oriented Programming (TOP) provides an abstraction for such software. The largest framework based on TOP, iTasks, has been used to develop real-world software. Workflow software often includes critical systems. In such cases it is important to reason over the software to ascertain its correctness. The lack of a formal iTasks semantics makes it unsuitable for formal reasoning. To this end TopHat has been developed as a TOP language with a formal semantics. However, TopHat lacks a graphical user interface (GUI), making it harder to develop practical TopHat systems. In this paper we present TopHat UI. By combining an existing server framework and user interface framework, we have developed a fully functioning proof of concept implementation in Haskell, on top of TopHat's semantics. We show that implementing a TOP framework is possible using a different host language than iTasks uses. None of TopHat's formal properties have been compromised, since the UI framework is completely separate from TopHat. We run several example programs and evaluate their generated GUI. Having such a system improves the quality and verifiability of TOP software in general.
summary: Many companies and institutions have automated their business process in workflow management software. The novel programming paradigm Task-Oriented Programming (TOP) provides an abstraction for such software. The largest framework based on TOP, iTasks, has been used to develop real-world software. Workflow software often includes critical systems. In such cases it is important to reason over the software to ascertain its correctness. The lack of a formal iTasks semantics makes it unsuitable for formal reasoning. To this end TopHat has been developed as a TOP language with a formal semantics. However, TopHat lacks a graphical user interface (GUI), making it harder to develop practical TopHat systems. In this paper we present TopHat UI. By combining an existing server framework and user interface framework, we have developed a fully functioning proof of concept implementation in Haskell, on top of TopHat's semantics. We show that implementing a TOP framework is possible using a different host language than iTasks uses. None of TopHat's formal properties have been compromised, since the UI framework is completely separate from TopHat. We run several example programs and evaluate their generated GUI. Having such a system improves the quality and verifiability of TOP software in general.
abstract_zh: 许多公司和机构已经在工作流程管理软件中实现了业务流程的自动化。新颖的编程范式面向任务的编程（TOP）为此类软件提供了抽象。基于 TOP 的最大框架 iTasks 已用于开发实际软件。工作流软件通常包括关键系统。在这种情况下，对软件进行推理以确定其正确性非常重要。缺乏正式的 iTasks 语义使其不适合正式推理。为此，TopHat 被开发为具有形式语义的 TOP 语言。然而，TopHat 缺乏图形用户界面（GUI），这使得开发实用的 TopHat 系统变得更加困难。在本文中，我们介绍 TopHat UI。通过结合现有的服务器框架和用户界面框架，我们在 TopHat 语义的基础上，在 Haskell 中开发了功能齐全的概念验证实现。我们证明，使用与 iTasks 使用的不同的主机语言来实现 TOP 框架是可能的。 TopHat 的任何正式属性均未受到损害，因为 UI 框架与 TopHat 完全分离。我们运行几个示例程序并评估它们生成的 GUI。拥有这样的系统总体上提高了 TOP 软件的质量和可验证性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TopHat UI的可视化界面框架，用于增强TopHat编程语言的交互性，同时保持其形式化语义。
AI.motivation: 尽管TopHat语言具有形式化语义，但缺乏图形用户界面（GUI）限制了其在实际系统中的开发和验证能力。
AI.method: 通过整合现有服务器框架和用户界面框架，在Haskell语言中实现TopHat UI原型系统，确保UI与TopHat核心逻辑分离。
AI.result: 成功开发出支持交互式可视化的TopHat系统原型，并验证了其形式化属性未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 该系统提升了TOP编程范式的软件质量和可验证性，证明了使用不同宿主语言实现TOP框架的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TopHat UI的可视化界面框架，用于增强TopHat编程语言的交互性，同时保持其形式化语义。
