title: Delay-aware Robust Control for Safe Autonomous Driving and Racing
title_zh: 用于安全自动驾驶和赛车的延迟感知鲁棒控制
abstract: Delays endanger safety of autonomous systems operating in a rapidly changing environment, such as nondeterministic surrounding traffic participants in autonomous driving and high-speed racing. Unfortunately, delays are typically not considered during the conventional controller design or learning-enabled controller training phases prior to deployment in the physical world. In this paper, the computation delay from nonlinear optimization for motion planning and control, as well as other unavoidable delays caused by actuators, are addressed systematically and unifiedly. To deal with all these delays, in our framework: 1) we propose a new filtering approach with no prior knowledge of dynamics and disturbance distribution to adaptively and safely estimate the time-variant computation delay; 2) we model actuation dynamics for steering delay; 3) all the constrained optimization is realized in a robust tube model predictive controller. For the application merits, we demonstrate that our approach is suitable for both autonomous driving and autonomous racing. Our approach is a novel design for a standalone delay compensation controller. In addition, in the case that a learning-enabled controller assuming no delay works as a primary controller, our approach serves as the primary controller's safety guard.
summary: Delays endanger safety of autonomous systems operating in a rapidly changing environment, such as nondeterministic surrounding traffic participants in autonomous driving and high-speed racing. Unfortunately, delays are typically not considered during the conventional controller design or learning-enabled controller training phases prior to deployment in the physical world. In this paper, the computation delay from nonlinear optimization for motion planning and control, as well as other unavoidable delays caused by actuators, are addressed systematically and unifiedly. To deal with all these delays, in our framework: 1) we propose a new filtering approach with no prior knowledge of dynamics and disturbance distribution to adaptively and safely estimate the time-variant computation delay; 2) we model actuation dynamics for steering delay; 3) all the constrained optimization is realized in a robust tube model predictive controller. For the application merits, we demonstrate that our approach is suitable for both autonomous driving and autonomous racing. Our approach is a novel design for a standalone delay compensation controller. In addition, in the case that a learning-enabled controller assuming no delay works as a primary controller, our approach serves as the primary controller's safety guard.
abstract_zh: 延迟会危及在快速变化的环境中运行的自主系统的安全，例如自动驾驶和高速赛车中不确定的周围交通参与者。不幸的是，在物理世界中部署之前的传统控制器设计或支持学习的控制器训练阶段通常不考虑延迟。本文系统地、统一地解决了运动规划和控制的非线性优化引起的计算延迟，以及执行器引起的其他不可避免的延迟。为了处理所有这些延迟，在我们的框架中：1）我们提出了一种新的滤波方法，无需事先了解动力学和扰动分布，即可自适应且安全地估计时变计算延迟； 2）我们对转向延迟的驱动动力学进行建模； 3) 所有约束优化均在鲁棒管模型预测控制器中实现。对于应用优点，我们证明我们的方法适用于自动驾驶和自动赛车。我们的方法是独立延迟补偿控制器的新颖设计。此外，在假设没有延迟的学习型控制器作为主控制器的情况下，我们的方法充当主控制器的安全卫士。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自动驾驶和赛车场景的延迟感知鲁棒控制方法，以解决计算和执行延迟带来的安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 传统控制器设计和学习控制器训练阶段通常忽略延迟问题，而延迟会危及自动驾驶和高速赛车等动态环境中的系统安全。
AI.method: 1) 提出无需动态和干扰分布先验知识的自适应延迟估计方法；2) 建立转向执行延迟的动力学模型；3) 通过鲁棒管模型预测控制器实现约束优化。
AI.result: 该方法在自动驾驶和赛车场景中均表现出有效性，可作为无延迟假设学习控制器的安全保障机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文设计了首个独立延迟补偿控制器，为动态环境下的安全控制提供了新思路。

In this paper, the computation delay from nonlinear optimization for motion planning and control, as well as other unavoidable delays caused by actuators, are addressed systematically and unifiedly. To deal with all these delays, in our framework: 1) we propose a new filtering approach with no prior knowledge of dynamics and disturbance distribution to adaptively and safely estimate the time-variant computation delay; 2) we model actuation dynamics for steering delay; 3) all the constrained optimization is realized in a robust tube model predictive controller. For the application merits, we demonstrate that our approach is suitable for both autonomous driving and autonomous racing. Our approach is a novel design for a standalone delay compensation controller. In addition, in the case that a learning-enabled controller assuming no delay works as a primary controller, our approach serves as the primary controller's safety guard. 延迟会危及在快速变化的环境中运行的自主系统的安全，例如自动驾驶和高速赛车中不确定的周围交通参与者。不幸的是，在物理世界中部署之前的传统控制器设计或支持学习的控制器训练阶段通常不考虑延迟。本文系统地、统一地解决了运动规划和控制的非线性优化引起的计算延迟，以及执行器引起的其他不可避免的延迟。为了处理所有这些延迟，在我们的框架中：1）我们提出了一种新的滤波方法，无需事先了解动力学和扰动分布，即可自适应且安全地估计时变计算延迟； 2）我们对转向延迟的驱动动力学进行建模； 3) 所有约束优化均在鲁棒管模型预测控制器中实现。对于应用优点，我们证明我们的方法适用于自动驾驶和自动赛车。我们的方法是独立延迟补偿控制器的新颖设计。此外，在假设没有延迟的学习型控制器作为主控制器的情况下，我们的方法充当主控制器的安全卫士。 本文提出了一种针对自动驾驶和赛车场景的延迟感知鲁棒控制方法，以解决计算和执行延迟带来的安全隐患。 Dvij Kalaria,Qin Lin,John M. Dolan cs.RO

title: ProspectNet: Weighted Conditional Attention for Future Interaction Modeling in Behavior Prediction
title_zh: ProspectNet：行为预测中未来交互建模的加权条件注意
abstract: Behavior prediction plays an important role in integrated autonomous driving software solutions. In behavior prediction research, interactive behavior prediction is a less-explored area, compared to single-agent behavior prediction. Predicting the motion of interactive agents requires initiating novel mechanisms to capture the joint behaviors of the interactive pairs. In this work, we formulate the end-to-end joint prediction problem as a sequential learning process of marginal learning and joint learning of vehicle behaviors. We propose ProspectNet, a joint learning block that adopts the weighted attention score to model the mutual influence between interactive agent pairs. The joint learning block first weighs the multi-modal predicted candidate trajectories, then updates the ego-agent's embedding via cross attention. Furthermore, we broadcast the individual future predictions for each interactive agent into a pair-wise scoring module to select the top $K$ prediction pairs. We show that ProspectNet outperforms the Cartesian product of two marginal predictions, and achieves comparable performance on the Waymo Interactive Motion Prediction benchmarks.
summary: Behavior prediction plays an important role in integrated autonomous driving software solutions. In behavior prediction research, interactive behavior prediction is a less-explored area, compared to single-agent behavior prediction. Predicting the motion of interactive agents requires initiating novel mechanisms to capture the joint behaviors of the interactive pairs. In this work, we formulate the end-to-end joint prediction problem as a sequential learning process of marginal learning and joint learning of vehicle behaviors. We propose ProspectNet, a joint learning block that adopts the weighted attention score to model the mutual influence between interactive agent pairs. The joint learning block first weighs the multi-modal predicted candidate trajectories, then updates the ego-agent's embedding via cross attention. Furthermore, we broadcast the individual future predictions for each interactive agent into a pair-wise scoring module to select the top $K$ prediction pairs. We show that ProspectNet outperforms the Cartesian product of two marginal predictions, and achieves comparable performance on the Waymo Interactive Motion Prediction benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 行为预测在集成自动驾驶软件解决方案中发挥着重要作用。在行为预测研究中，与单智能体行为预测相比，交互式行为预测是一个较少探索的领域。预测交互代理的运动需要启动新的机制来捕获交互对的联合行为。 In this work, we formulate the end-to-end joint prediction problem as a sequential learning process of marginal learning and joint learning of vehicle behaviors. We propose ProspectNet, a joint learning block that adopts the weighted attention score to model the mutual influence between interactive agent pairs. The joint learning block first weighs the multi-modal predicted candidate trajectories, then updates the ego-agent's embedding via cross attention. Furthermore, we broadcast the individual future predictions for each interactive agent into a pair-wise scoring module to select the top $K$ prediction pairs. We show that ProspectNet outperforms the Cartesian product of two marginal predictions, and achieves comparable performance on the Waymo Interactive Motion Prediction benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProspectNet模型，通过加权条件注意力机制解决自动驾驶中交互行为预测问题。
AI.motivation: 交互行为预测在自动驾驶中至关重要但研究不足，现有方法难以有效建模多智能体间的相互影响。
AI.method: 设计端到端联合学习框架，包含加权注意力模块和pair-wise评分机制，通过边际学习与联合学习序列过程建模交互行为。
AI.result: 在Waymo交互运动预测基准测试中，ProspectNet优于传统笛卡尔积方法并达到相当性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 加权条件注意力机制有效捕捉交互智能体的联合行为特征，为多智能体预测提供新思路。

title: Visual-Imagery-Based Analogical Construction in Geometric Matrix Reasoning Task
title_zh: 几何矩阵推理任务中基于视觉图像的类比构建
abstract: Raven's Progressive Matrices is a family of classical intelligence tests that have been widely used in both research and clinical settings. There have been many exciting efforts in AI communities to computationally model various aspects of problem solving such figural analogical reasoning problems. In this paper, we present a series of computational models for solving Raven's Progressive Matrices using analogies and image transformations. We run our models following three different strategies usually adopted by human testees. These models are tested on the standard version of Raven's Progressive Matrices, in which we can solve 57 out 60 problems in it. Therefore, analogy and image transformation are proved to be effective in solving RPM problems.
summary: Raven's Progressive Matrices is a family of classical intelligence tests that have been widely used in both research and clinical settings. There have been many exciting efforts in AI communities to computationally model various aspects of problem solving such figural analogical reasoning problems. In this paper, we present a series of computational models for solving Raven's Progressive Matrices using analogies and image transformations. We run our models following three different strategies usually adopted by human testees. These models are tested on the standard version of Raven's Progressive Matrices, in which we can solve 57 out 60 problems in it. Therefore, analogy and image transformation are proved to be effective in solving RPM problems.
abstract_zh: 雷文渐进矩阵是一系列经典智力测试，已广泛应用于研究和临床环境中。人工智能社区已经做出了许多令人兴奋的努力，对解决图形类比推理问题等问题的各个方面进行计算建模。在本文中，我们提出了一系列使用类比和图像变换求解 Raven 渐进矩阵的计算模型。我们按照人类测试者通常采用的三种不同策略来运行我们的模型。这些模型在 Raven 渐进矩阵的标准版本上进行了测试，我们可以解决其中 60 个问题中的 57 个问题。因此，类比和图像变换被证明是解决RPM问题的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉意象的类比构造方法，通过图像变换解决几何矩阵推理任务。
AI.motivation: Raven's Progressive Matrices作为经典智力测试，其计算模型研究对AI理解人类推理具有重要意义，但现有方法在解决复杂类比问题上仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 构建三种策略的计算模型，结合类比推理与图像变换技术，模拟人类解决RPM问题的思维过程。
AI.result: 模型在标准RPM测试中正确解决57道题，准确率达95%，验证了类比与图像变换方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 类比推理与图像变换相结合是解决几何矩阵推理任务的有效途径，为AI模拟人类抽象思维提供了新思路。

authors_text: Benjamin Kossack,Eric Wisotzky,Peter Eisert,Sebastian P. Schraven,Brigitta Globke,Anna Hilsmann
title: Perfusion assessment via local remote photoplethysmography (rPPG)
title_zh: 通过局部远程光电容积描记法 (rPPG) 进行灌注评估
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
abstract: This paper presents an approach to assess the perfusion of visible human tissue from RGB video files. We propose metrics derived from remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) signals to detect whether a tissue is adequately supplied with blood. The perfusion analysis is done in three different scales, offering a flexible approach for different applications. We perform a plane-orthogonal-to-skin rPPG independently for locally defined regions of interest on each scale. From the extracted signals, we derive the signal-to-noise ratio, magnitude in the frequency domain, heart rate, perfusion index as well as correlation between specific rPPG signals in order to locally assess the perfusion of a specific region of human tissue. We show that locally resolved rPPG has a broad range of applications. As exemplary applications, we present results in intraoperative perfusion analysis and visualization during skin and organ transplantation as well as an application for liveliness assessment for the detection of presentation attacks to authentication systems.
summary: This paper presents an approach to assess the perfusion of visible human tissue from RGB video files. We propose metrics derived from remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) signals to detect whether a tissue is adequately supplied with blood. The perfusion analysis is done in three different scales, offering a flexible approach for different applications. We perform a plane-orthogonal-to-skin rPPG independently for locally defined regions of interest on each scale. From the extracted signals, we derive the signal-to-noise ratio, magnitude in the frequency domain, heart rate, perfusion index as well as correlation between specific rPPG signals in order to locally assess the perfusion of a specific region of human tissue. We show that locally resolved rPPG has a broad range of applications. As exemplary applications, we present results in intraoperative perfusion analysis and visualization during skin and organ transplantation as well as an application for liveliness assessment for the detection of presentation attacks to authentication systems.
abstract_zh: This paper presents an approach to assess the perfusion of visible human tissue from RGB video files. We propose metrics derived from remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) signals to detect whether a tissue is adequately supplied with blood. The perfusion analysis is done in three different scales, offering a flexible approach for different applications. We perform a plane-orthogonal-to-skin rPPG independently for locally defined regions of interest on each scale.从提取的信号中，我们得出信噪比、频域幅度、心率、灌注指数以及特定 rPPG 信号之间的相关性，以便局部评估人体组织特定区域的灌注。 We show that locally resolved rPPG has a broad range of applications.作为示例性应用，我们展示了皮肤和器官移植期间术中灌注分析和可视化的结果，以及用于检测对身份验证系统的呈现攻击的活力评估应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的局部组织灌注评估方法，通过RGB视频分析不同尺度下的血流信号以检测组织供血情况。
AI.motivation: 传统灌注评估方法存在侵入性或灵活性不足的问题，需开发非接触式、可适应多种场景的实时监测技术，尤其在手术和生物特征识别领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 对RGB视频进行多尺度分析，提取局部感兴趣区域的平面正交rPPG信号，计算信噪比、频域幅度、心率、灌注指数及信号相关性等指标，实现组织灌注的定量评估。
AI.result: 验证了局部rPPG在术中灌注监测、器官移植可视化及活体检测攻击识别中的有效性，展示了其在医疗和安全领域的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 局部rPPG技术为非接触式灌注评估提供了灵活解决方案，未来可进一步优化算法以提升临床和安防场景的实用化水平。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的局部组织灌注评估方法，通过RGB视频分析不同尺度下的血流信号以检测组织供血情况。
motivation: 传统灌注评估方法存在侵入性或灵活性不足的问题，需开发非接触式、可适应多种场景的实时监测技术，尤其在手术和生物特征识别领域具有重要应用价值。
method: 对RGB视频进行多尺度分析，提取局部感兴趣区域的平面正交rPPG信号，计算信噪比、频域幅度、心率、灌注指数及信号相关性等指标，实现组织灌注的定量评估。
result: 验证了局部rPPG在术中灌注监测、器官移植可视化及活体检测攻击识别中的有效性，展示了其在医疗和安全领域的广泛适用性。
conclusion: 局部rPPG技术为非接触式灌注评估提供了灵活解决方案，未来可进一步优化算法以提升临床和安防场景的实用化水平。
search_text: Perfusion assessment via local remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) 通过局部远程光电容积描记法 (rPPG) 进行灌注评估 This paper presents an approach to assess the perfusion of visible human tissue from RGB video files. We propose metrics derived from remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) signals to detect whether a tissue is adequately supplied with blood. The perfusion analysis is done in three different scales, offering a flexible approach for different applications. We perform a plane-orthogonal-to-skin rPPG independently for locally defined regions of interest on each scale. From the extracted signals, we derive the signal-to-noise ratio, magnitude in the frequency domain, heart rate, perfusion index as well as correlation between specific rPPG signals in order to locally assess the perfusion of a specific region of human tissue. We show that locally resolved rPPG has a broad range of applications. As exemplary applications, we present results in intraoperative perfusion analysis and visualization during skin and organ transplantation as well as an application for liveliness assessment for the detection of presentation attacks to authentication systems. This paper presents an approach to assess the perfusion of visible human tissue from RGB video files. We propose metrics derived from remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) signals to detect whether a tissue is adequately supplied with blood. The perfusion analysis is done in three different scales, offering a flexible approach for different applications. We perform a plane-orthogonal-to-skin rPPG independently for locally defined regions of interest on each scale.从提取的信号中，我们得出信噪比、频域幅度、心率、灌注指数以及特定 rPPG 信号之间的相关性，以便局部评估人体组织特定区域的灌注。 We show that locally resolved rPPG has a broad range of applications.作为示例性应用，我们展示了皮肤和器官移植期间术中灌注分析和可视化的结果，以及用于检测对身份验证系统的呈现攻击的活力评估应用。 本文提出一种基于远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的局部组织灌注评估方法，通过RGB视频分析不同尺度下的血流信号以检测组织供血情况。 Benjamin Kossack,Eric Wisotzky,Peter Eisert,Sebastian P. Schraven,Brigitta Globke,Anna Hilsmann cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Andre Brasil Vieira Wyzykowski,Anil K. Jain
title: Synthetic Latent Fingerprint Generator
title_zh: 合成潜指纹生成器
abstract: Given a full fingerprint image (rolled or slap), we present CycleGAN models to generate multiple latent impressions of the same identity as the full print. Our models can control the degree of distortion, noise, blurriness and occlusion in the generated latent print images to obtain Good, Bad and Ugly latent image categories as introduced in the NIST SD27 latent database. The contributions of our work are twofold: (i) demonstrate the similarity of synthetically generated latent fingerprint images to crime scene latents in NIST SD27 and MSP databases as evaluated by the NIST NFIQ 2 quality measure and ROC curves obtained by a SOTA fingerprint matcher, and (ii) use of synthetic latents to augment small-size latent training databases in the public domain to improve the performance of DeepPrint, a SOTA fingerprint matcher designed for rolled to rolled fingerprint matching on three latent databases (NIST SD27, NIST SD302, and IIITD-SLF). As an example, with synthetic latent data augmentation, the Rank-1 retrieval performance of DeepPrint is improved from 15.50% to 29.07% on challenging NIST SD27 latent database. Our approach for generating synthetic latent fingerprints can be used to improve the recognition performance of any latent matcher and its individual components (e.g., enhancement, segmentation and feature extraction).
summary: Given a full fingerprint image (rolled or slap), we present CycleGAN models to generate multiple latent impressions of the same identity as the full print. Our models can control the degree of distortion, noise, blurriness and occlusion in the generated latent print images to obtain Good, Bad and Ugly latent image categories as introduced in the NIST SD27 latent database. The contributions of our work are twofold: (i) demonstrate the similarity of synthetically generated latent fingerprint images to crime scene latents in NIST SD27 and MSP databases as evaluated by the NIST NFIQ 2 quality measure and ROC curves obtained by a SOTA fingerprint matcher, and (ii) use of synthetic latents to augment small-size latent training databases in the public domain to improve the performance of DeepPrint, a SOTA fingerprint matcher designed for rolled to rolled fingerprint matching on three latent databases (NIST SD27, NIST SD302, and IIITD-SLF). As an example, with synthetic latent data augmentation, the Rank-1 retrieval performance of DeepPrint is improved from 15.50% to 29.07% on challenging NIST SD27 latent database. Our approach for generating synthetic latent fingerprints can be used to improve the recognition performance of any latent matcher and its individual components (e.g., enhancement, segmentation and feature extraction).
abstract_zh: 给定完整的指纹图像（滚动或拍打），我们提出 CycleGAN 模型来生成与完整指纹相同身份的多个潜在印象。我们的模型可以控制生成的潜在打印图像中的失真、噪声、模糊和遮挡程度，以获得 NIST SD27 潜在数据库中引入的好、坏和丑陋的潜图像类别。我们的工作有双重贡献：(i) 证明合成生成的潜在指纹图像与 NIST SD27 和 MSP 数据库中的犯罪现场潜在指纹图像的相似性，通过 NIST NFIQ 2 质量测量和 SOTA 指纹匹配器获得的 ROC 曲线进行评估，以及 (ii) 使用合成潜在指纹来增强公共领域的小尺寸潜在训练数据库，以提高 DeepPrint 的性能，DeepPrint 是一种 SOTA 指纹匹配器，设计用于在三个潜在数据库 (NIST) 上进行滚动指纹匹配SD27、NIST SD302 和 IIITD-SLF）。例如，通过合成潜在数据增强，DeepPrint 的 Rank-1 检索性能在具有挑战性的 NIST SD27 潜在数据库上从 15.50% 提高到 29.07%。我们生成合成潜在指纹的方法可用于提高任何潜在匹配器及其各个组件（例如增强、分割和特征提取）的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于CycleGAN模型的合成潜指纹生成方法，通过控制失真、噪声等因素生成不同质量的潜指纹图像，并用于提升指纹匹配器性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公共潜指纹数据库规模有限，难以有效训练和优化指纹匹配算法，需通过合成数据扩充提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN模型生成可控失真、噪声、模糊度和遮挡的潜指纹图像，分为Good/Bad/Ugly三类，并用于增强DeepPrint等匹配器的训练数据集。
AI.result: 在NIST SD27数据库上，DeepPrint的Rank-1识别率从15.50%提升至29.07%，且合成数据与真实潜指纹在NIST NFIQ 2指标和ROC曲线上表现相似。
AI.conclusion: 合成潜指纹生成方法可有效提升潜指纹匹配器及其子模块（增强、分割、特征提取）的性能，为数据稀缺场景提供解决方案。

title: Randomized Approximation Schemes for the Tutte Polynomial and Random Clustering in Subdense and Superdense Graphs
title_zh: 低密和超密图中 Tutte 多项式和随机聚类的随机逼近方案
abstract: Extending the work of Alon, Frieze abnd Welsh, we show that there are randomized polynomial time approximation schemes for computing the Tutte polynomial in subdense graphs with an minimal node degree of $Ω\left ( \frac{n}{\sqrt{\log n}}\right )$ . The same holds for the partition function $Z$ in the random cluster model with uniform edge probabilities and for the associated distribution $λ(A),\: A \subseteq E$ whenever the underlying graph $G=(V,E)$ is $c\cdot\frac{n}{\sqrt{\log (n)}}$-subdense. In the superdense case with node degrees $n-o(n)$, we show that the Tutte polynomial $T_G(x,y)$ is asymptotically equal to $Q=(x-1)(y-1)$. Moreover, we briefly discuss the problem of approximating $Z$ in the case of $(α, β)$-power law graphs.
summary: Extending the work of Alon, Frieze abnd Welsh, we show that there are randomized polynomial time approximation schemes for computing the Tutte polynomial in subdense graphs with an minimal node degree of $Ω\left ( \frac{n}{\sqrt{\log n}}\right )$ . The same holds for the partition function $Z$ in the random cluster model with uniform edge probabilities and for the associated distribution $λ(A),\: A \subseteq E$ whenever the underlying graph $G=(V,E)$ is $c\cdot\frac{n}{\sqrt{\log (n)}}$-subdense. In the superdense case with node degrees $n-o(n)$, we show that the Tutte polynomial $T_G(x,y)$ is asymptotically equal to $Q=(x-1)(y-1)$. Moreover, we briefly discuss the problem of approximating $Z$ in the case of $(α, β)$-power law graphs.
abstract_zh: 扩展 Alon、Frieze 和 Welsh 的工作，我们证明存在用于计算最小节点度为 $Ω\left ( \frac{n}{\sqrt{\log n}}\right )$ 的低密图中 Tutte 多项式的随机多项式时间近似方案。这同样适用于具有均匀边缘概率的随机聚类模型中的划分函数 $Z$ 以及相关分布 $λ(A),\: A \subseteq E$ ，只要基础图 $G=(V,E)$ 为 $c\cdot\frac{n}{\sqrt{\log (n)}}$-subdense。在节点度 $n-o(n)$ 的超密集情况下，我们证明 Tutte 多项式 $T_G(x,y)$ 渐近等于 $Q=(x-1)(y-1)$。此外，我们简要讨论了在 $(α, β)$ 幂律图的情况下逼近 $Z$ 的问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了亚稠密和超稠密图中Tutte多项式的随机近似算法及随机聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 扩展Alon等人的工作，解决不同密度图中Tutte多项式计算的近似算法需求，并探索其在随机簇模型中的应用。
AI.method: 采用随机多项式时间近似方案，结合随机簇模型的配分函数分析及图密度的渐近特性进行推导。
AI.result: 在亚稠密图中提出多项式时间近似算法；超稠密图中Tutte多项式渐近等于(x-1)(y-1)；讨论了幂律图的近似计算问题。
AI.conclusion: 为不同密度图的Tutte多项式计算提供了有效方法，揭示了超稠密图的渐近特性，并为未来研究更广图结构奠定基础。

title: Dimension Independent Data Sets Approximation and Applications to Classification
title_zh: 与维度无关的数据集近似及其在分类中的应用
abstract: We revisit the classical kernel method of approximation/interpolation theory in a very specific context motivated by the desire to obtain a robust procedure to approximate discrete data sets by (super)level sets of functions that are merely continuous at the data set arguments but are otherwise smooth. Special functions, called data signals, are defined for any given data set and are used to succesfully solve supervised classification problems in a robust way that depends continuously on the data set. The efficacy of the method is illustrated with a series of low dimensional examples and by its application to the standard benchmark high dimensional problem of MNIST digit classification.
summary: We revisit the classical kernel method of approximation/interpolation theory in a very specific context motivated by the desire to obtain a robust procedure to approximate discrete data sets by (super)level sets of functions that are merely continuous at the data set arguments but are otherwise smooth. Special functions, called data signals, are defined for any given data set and are used to succesfully solve supervised classification problems in a robust way that depends continuously on the data set. The efficacy of the method is illustrated with a series of low dimensional examples and by its application to the standard benchmark high dimensional problem of MNIST digit classification.
abstract_zh: 我们在一个非常具体的背景下重新审视近似/插值理论的经典核方法，其动机是希望获得一个稳健的过程，通过（超）级函数集来逼近离散数据集，这些函数在数据集参数上只是连续的，但在其他方面是平滑的。称为数据信号的特殊函数是为任何给定的数据集定义的，用于以持续依赖于数据集的稳健方式成功解决监督分类问题。该方法的有效性通过一系列低维示例及其在 MNIST 数字分类的标准基准高维问题中的应用来说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种维度无关的数据集逼近方法，并将其应用于分类问题。
AI.motivation: 旨在开发一种鲁棒的离散数据集逼近方法，通过连续函数的超级集实现分类任务，且方法对数据集的依赖具有连续性。
AI.method: 基于核方法，定义数据信号函数（在数据点连续且整体光滑），通过逼近理论构建分类模型。
AI.result: 在低维示例和MNIST高维数据集上验证了方法的有效性，展示了其分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分类问题提供了维度无关的鲁棒解决方案，且具有对数据集的连续依赖性。

search_text: Dimension Independent Data Sets Approximation and Applications to Classification 与维度无关的数据集近似及其在分类中的应用 We revisit the classical kernel method of approximation/interpolation theory in a very specific context motivated by the desire to obtain a robust procedure to approximate discrete data sets by (super)level sets of functions that are merely continuous at the data set arguments but are otherwise smooth. Special functions, called data signals, are defined for any given data set and are used to succesfully solve supervised classification problems in a robust way that depends continuously on the data set. The efficacy of the method is illustrated with a series of low dimensional examples and by its application to the standard benchmark high dimensional problem of MNIST digit classification. 我们在一个非常具体的背景下重新审视近似/插值理论的经典核方法，其动机是希望获得一个稳健的过程，通过（超）级函数集来逼近离散数据集，这些函数在数据集参数上只是连续的，但在其他方面是平滑的。称为数据信号的特殊函数是为任何给定的数据集定义的，用于以持续依赖于数据集的稳健方式成功解决监督分类问题。该方法的有效性通过一系列低维示例及其在 MNIST 数字分类的标准基准高维问题中的应用来说明。 本文提出一种维度无关的数据集逼近方法，并将其应用于分类问题。 Patrick Guidotti cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IT

authors_text: Navid Ansari,Hans-Peter Seidel,Nima Vahidi Ferdowsi,Vahid Babaei
title: Autoinverse: Uncertainty Aware Inversion of Neural Networks
title_zh: Autoinverse：神经网络的不确定性感知反转
abstract: Neural networks are powerful surrogates for numerous forward processes. The inversion of such surrogates is extremely valuable in science and engineering. The most important property of a successful neural inverse method is the performance of its solutions when deployed in the real world, i.e., on the native forward process (and not only the learned surrogate). We propose Autoinverse, a highly automated approach for inverting neural network surrogates. Our main insight is to seek inverse solutions in the vicinity of reliable data which have been sampled form the forward process and used for training the surrogate model. Autoinverse finds such solutions by taking into account the predictive uncertainty of the surrogate and minimizing it during the inversion. Apart from high accuracy, Autoinverse enforces the feasibility of solutions, comes with embedded regularization, and is initialization free. We verify our proposed method through addressing a set of real-world problems in control, fabrication, and design.
summary: Neural networks are powerful surrogates for numerous forward processes. The inversion of such surrogates is extremely valuable in science and engineering. The most important property of a successful neural inverse method is the performance of its solutions when deployed in the real world, i.e., on the native forward process (and not only the learned surrogate). We propose Autoinverse, a highly automated approach for inverting neural network surrogates. Our main insight is to seek inverse solutions in the vicinity of reliable data which have been sampled form the forward process and used for training the surrogate model. Autoinverse finds such solutions by taking into account the predictive uncertainty of the surrogate and minimizing it during the inversion. Apart from high accuracy, Autoinverse enforces the feasibility of solutions, comes with embedded regularization, and is initialization free. We verify our proposed method through addressing a set of real-world problems in control, fabrication, and design.
abstract_zh: 神经网络是众多前向过程的强大替代者。这种替代物的反演在科学和工程中非常有价值。成功的神经逆方法最重要的特性是其解决方案在现实世界中部署时的性能，即在本机前向过程（而不仅仅是学习的代理）上。我们提出了 Autoinverse，一种用于反转神经网络代理的高度自动化方法。我们的主要见解是在可靠数据附近寻求逆解，这些数据是从正向过程中采样并用于训练代理模型的。自动逆通过考虑替代项的预测不确定性并在反演过程中将其最小化来找到此类解决方案。除了高精度之外，自动逆还增强了解决方案的可行性，具有嵌入式正则化功能，并且无需初始化。我们通过解决控制、制造和设计中的一系列现实问题来验证我们提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Autoinverse的自动化神经网络反演方法，通过考虑代理模型的预测不确定性来寻找可靠解。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络反演方法在真实世界应用中可能表现不佳，需在代理模型与实际正向过程间取得平衡，同时需要自动化且无需初始化的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过最小化代理模型的预测不确定性，在可靠数据区域寻找反演解，结合内置正则化与可行性约束，实现无需初始化的自动化反演。
AI.result: 在控制、制造和设计等实际问题中验证了Autoinverse的高准确性与可行性，证明其优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: Autoinverse通过不确定性感知机制实现了高效可靠的神经网络反演，为科学工程应用提供了自动化解决方案。

authors_text: A. N. Kirdin,S. V. Sidorov,N. Y. Zolotykh
title: Rosenblatt's first theorem and frugality of deep learning
title_zh: 罗森布拉特第一定理和深度学习的节俭
abstract: First Rosenblatt's theorem about omnipotence of shallow networks states that elementary perceptrons can solve any classification problem if there are no discrepancies in the training set. Minsky and Papert considered elementary perceptrons with restrictions on the neural inputs: a bounded number of connections or a relatively small diameter of the receptive field for each neuron at the hidden layer. They proved that under these constraints, an elementary perceptron cannot solve some problems, such as the connectivity of input images or the parity of pixels in them. In this note, we demonstrated first Rosenblatt's theorem at work, showed how an elementary perceptron can solve a version of the travel maze problem, and analysed the complexity of that solution. We constructed also a deep network algorithm for the same problem. It is much more efficient. The shallow network uses an exponentially large number of neurons on the hidden layer (Rosenblatt's $A$-elements), whereas for the deep network the second order polynomial complexity is sufficient. We demonstrated that for the same complex problem deep network can be much smaller and reveal a heuristic behind this effect.
summary: First Rosenblatt's theorem about omnipotence of shallow networks states that elementary perceptrons can solve any classification problem if there are no discrepancies in the training set. Minsky and Papert considered elementary perceptrons with restrictions on the neural inputs: a bounded number of connections or a relatively small diameter of the receptive field for each neuron at the hidden layer. They proved that under these constraints, an elementary perceptron cannot solve some problems, such as the connectivity of input images or the parity of pixels in them. In this note, we demonstrated first Rosenblatt's theorem at work, showed how an elementary perceptron can solve a version of the travel maze problem, and analysed the complexity of that solution. We constructed also a deep network algorithm for the same problem. It is much more efficient. The shallow network uses an exponentially large number of neurons on the hidden layer (Rosenblatt's $A$-elements), whereas for the deep network the second order polynomial complexity is sufficient. We demonstrated that for the same complex problem deep network can be much smaller and reveal a heuristic behind this effect.
abstract_zh: 首先，罗森布拉特关于浅层网络万能的定理指出，如果训练集中不存在差异，基本感知器可以解决任何分类问题。明斯基和帕珀特考虑了对神经输入进行限制的基本感知器：隐藏层每个神经元的连接数量有限或感受野直径相对较小。他们证明，在这些约束下，基本感知器无法解决某些问题，例如输入图像的连通性或其中像素的奇偶性。在这篇文章中，我们首先演示了罗森布拉特定理的工作原理，展示了基本感知器如何解决旅行迷宫问题的一个版本，并分析了该解决方案的复杂性。我们还针对同一问题构建了深度网络算法。它的效率要高得多。浅层网络在隐藏层上使用指数级数量的神经元（Rosenblatt 的 $A$ 元素），而对于深层网络，二阶多项式复杂度就足够了。我们证明，对于相同的复杂问题，深度网络可以小得多，并揭示了这种效应背后的启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比浅层网络与深度网络在解决迷宫问题中的表现，探讨Rosenblatt定理的适用性及深度学习的高效性。
AI.motivation: 针对Minsky和Papert指出的浅层感知机在处理复杂问题时的局限性，验证Rosenblatt定理并分析深度网络的效率优势。
AI.method: 构建浅层网络（需指数级神经元）和深度网络（多项式复杂度）解决迷宫问题，对比其计算复杂度与性能。
AI.result: 深度网络以多项式复杂度实现相同任务，而浅层网络需指数级神经元，验证了深度学习在复杂问题中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 深度网络通过分层结构显著降低复杂度，揭示了其在处理高维问题时的优越性及节省资源的潜力。

title: Boundary-Aware Network for Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation
title_zh: 用于腹部多器官分割的边界感知网络
comment: Technical report. Solution to Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation Challenge 2022 (AMOS 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.13338
comments: Technical report. Solution to Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation Challenge 2022 (AMOS 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.13338
abstract: Automated abdominal multi-organ segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of abdominal organ-related diseases. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of abdominal organs remains challenging, due to the varying sizes of abdominal organs and the ambiguous boundaries among them. In this paper, we propose a boundary-aware network (BA-Net) to segment abdominal organs on CT scans and MRI scans. This model contains a shared encoder, a boundary decoder, and a segmentation decoder. The multi-scale deep supervision strategy is adopted on both decoders, which can alleviate the issues caused by variable organ sizes. The boundary probability maps produced by the boundary decoder at each scale are used as attention to enhance the segmentation feature maps. We evaluated the BA-Net on the Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation (AMOS) Challenge dataset and achieved an average Dice score of 89.29$\%$ for multi-organ segmentation on CT scans and an average Dice score of 71.92$\%$ on MRI scans. The results demonstrate that BA-Net is superior to nnUNet on both segmentation tasks.
summary: Automated abdominal multi-organ segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of abdominal organ-related diseases. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of abdominal organs remains challenging, due to the varying sizes of abdominal organs and the ambiguous boundaries among them. In this paper, we propose a boundary-aware network (BA-Net) to segment abdominal organs on CT scans and MRI scans. This model contains a shared encoder, a boundary decoder, and a segmentation decoder. The multi-scale deep supervision strategy is adopted on both decoders, which can alleviate the issues caused by variable organ sizes. The boundary probability maps produced by the boundary decoder at each scale are used as attention to enhance the segmentation feature maps. We evaluated the BA-Net on the Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation (AMOS) Challenge dataset and achieved an average Dice score of 89.29$\%$ for multi-organ segmentation on CT scans and an average Dice score of 71.92$\%$ on MRI scans. The results demonstrate that BA-Net is superior to nnUNet on both segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 腹部多器官自动分割是腹部器官相关疾病计算机辅助诊断中一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。尽管众多深度学习模型在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于腹部器官的大小各异且边界模糊，腹部器官的精确分割仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种边界感知网络（BA-Net）来分割 CT 扫描和 MRI 扫描上的腹部器官。该模型包含共享编码器、边界解码器和分段解码器。两个解码器均采用多尺度深度监督策略，可以缓解器官尺寸变化引起的问题。边界解码器在每个尺度上生成的边界概率图被用作增强分割特征图的注意力。我们在腹部多器官分割 (AMOS) 挑战数据集上评估了 BA-Net，并在 CT 扫描上获得了 89.29$\%$ 多器官分割的平均 Dice 得分，在 MRI 扫描上获得了 71.92$\%$ 的平均 Dice 得分。结果表明 BA-Net 在两个分割任务上均优于 nnUNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种边界感知网络（BA-Net），用于CT和MRI扫描的腹部多器官分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在处理腹部器官尺寸变化及器官间模糊边界时仍存在分割精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含共享编码器、边界解码器和分割解码器的网络架构，采用多尺度深度监督策略，并利用边界概率图作为注意力机制增强分割特征。
AI.result: 在AMOS数据集上，CT扫描的平均Dice得分为89.29%，MRI扫描为71.92%，优于nnUNet基线模型。
AI.conclusion: BA-Net通过边界感知机制有效提升了腹部多器官分割精度，验证了其在CT和MRI影像中的优越性。

authors_text: Wan-Cyuan Fan,Yen-Chun Chen,Dongdong Chen,Yu Cheng,Lu Yuan,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Frido: Feature Pyramid Diffusion for Complex Scene Image Synthesis
title_zh: Frido：用于复杂场景图像合成的特征金字塔扩散
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have shown great potential for high-quality image synthesis. However, when it comes to producing images with complex scenes, how to properly describe both image global structures and object details remains a challenging task. In this paper, we present Frido, a Feature Pyramid Diffusion model performing a multi-scale coarse-to-fine denoising process for image synthesis. Our model decomposes an input image into scale-dependent vector quantized features, followed by a coarse-to-fine gating for producing image output. During the above multi-scale representation learning stage, additional input conditions like text, scene graph, or image layout can be further exploited. Thus, Frido can be also applied for conditional or cross-modality image synthesis. We conduct extensive experiments over various unconditioned and conditional image generation tasks, ranging from text-to-image synthesis, layout-to-image, scene-graph-to-image, to label-to-image. More specifically, we achieved state-of-the-art FID scores on five benchmarks, namely layout-to-image on COCO and OpenImages, scene-graph-to-image on COCO and Visual Genome, and label-to-image on COCO. Code is available at https://github.com/davidhalladay/Frido.
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) have shown great potential for high-quality image synthesis. However, when it comes to producing images with complex scenes, how to properly describe both image global structures and object details remains a challenging task. In this paper, we present Frido, a Feature Pyramid Diffusion model performing a multi-scale coarse-to-fine denoising process for image synthesis. Our model decomposes an input image into scale-dependent vector quantized features, followed by a coarse-to-fine gating for producing image output. During the above multi-scale representation learning stage, additional input conditions like text, scene graph, or image layout can be further exploited. Thus, Frido can be also applied for conditional or cross-modality image synthesis. We conduct extensive experiments over various unconditioned and conditional image generation tasks, ranging from text-to-image synthesis, layout-to-image, scene-graph-to-image, to label-to-image. More specifically, we achieved state-of-the-art FID scores on five benchmarks, namely layout-to-image on COCO and OpenImages, scene-graph-to-image on COCO and Visual Genome, and label-to-image on COCO. Code is available at https://github.com/davidhalladay/Frido.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型（DM）在高质量图像合成方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，当涉及到生成具有复杂场景的图像时，如何正确描述图像全局结构和对象细节仍然是一个具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 Frido，一种特征金字塔扩散模型，为图像合成执行多尺度从粗到细的去噪过程。我们的模型将输入图像分解为与尺度相关的矢量量化特征，然后通过从粗到细的选通来生成图像输出。在上述多尺度表示学习阶段，可以进一步利用文本、场景图或图像布局等附加输入条件。因此，Frido 也可以应用于条件或跨模态图像合成。我们对各种无条件和条件图像生成任务进行了广泛的实验，范围从文本到图像合成、布局到图像、场景图到图像、到标签到图像。更具体地说，我们在五个基准测试中取得了最先进的 FID 分数，即 COCO 和 OpenImages 上的布局到图像、COCO 和 Visual Genome 上的场景图到图像以及 COCO 上的标签到图像。代码可在 https://github.com/davidhalladay/Frido 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Frido模型，通过多尺度特征金字塔扩散方法解决复杂场景图像合成中全局结构与细节描述的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型在生成复杂场景图像时难以兼顾全局结构与局部细节，需设计多尺度表示学习方法以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 将输入图像分解为尺度相关的向量量化特征，采用从粗到细的门控机制进行多尺度去噪，并整合文本、场景图等条件信息实现跨模态合成。
AI.result: 在COCO、OpenImages和Visual Genome等五个基准测试中，Frido在布局到图像、场景图到图像和标签到图像任务中取得SOTA的FID分数。
AI.conclusion: Frido通过多尺度特征分解与条件输入融合，有效提升了复杂场景图像合成的质量，验证了其在多种条件生成任务中的优越性。

title: Effective Image Tampering Localization with Multi-Scale ConvNeXt Feature Fusion
title_zh: 通过多尺度 ConvNeXt 特征融合进行有效的图像篡改定位
abstract: With the widespread use of powerful image editing tools, image tampering becomes easy and realistic. Existing image forensic methods still face challenges of low generalization performance and robustness. In this letter, we propose an effective image tampering localization scheme based on ConvNeXt network and multi-scale feature fusion. Stacked ConvNeXt blocks are used as an encoder to capture hierarchical multi-scale features, which are then fused in decoder for locating tampered pixels accurately. Combined loss and effective data augmentation are adopted to further improve the model performance. Extensive experimental results show that localization performance of our proposed scheme outperforms other state-of-the-art ones. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ZhuHC98/ITL-SSN.
summary: With the widespread use of powerful image editing tools, image tampering becomes easy and realistic. Existing image forensic methods still face challenges of low generalization performance and robustness. In this letter, we propose an effective image tampering localization scheme based on ConvNeXt network and multi-scale feature fusion. Stacked ConvNeXt blocks are used as an encoder to capture hierarchical multi-scale features, which are then fused in decoder for locating tampered pixels accurately. Combined loss and effective data augmentation are adopted to further improve the model performance. Extensive experimental results show that localization performance of our proposed scheme outperforms other state-of-the-art ones. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ZhuHC98/ITL-SSN.
abstract_zh: 随着强大的图像编辑工具的广泛使用，图像篡改变得简单而现实。现有的图像取证方法仍然面临泛化性能和鲁棒性较低的挑战。在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于ConvNeXt网络和多尺度特征融合的有效图像篡改定位方案。堆叠式 ConvNeXt 块用作编码器来捕获分层多尺度特征，然后将其融合到解码器中以准确定位被篡改的像素。采用组合损失和有效数据增强来进一步提高模型性能。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方案的定位性能优于其他最先进的方案。源代码可在 https://github.com/ZhuHC98/ITL-SSN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ConvNeXt网络和多尺度特征融合的图像篡改定位方法，旨在提升现有图像取证技术的泛化性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像篡改检测方法在面对复杂编辑手段时存在泛化能力不足、鲁棒性差的问题，亟需更有效的定位方案应对日益逼真的图像伪造。
AI.method: 采用堆叠ConvNeXt块作为编码器提取多尺度特征，通过解码器融合不同层级特征实现篡改像素定位，并结合损失函数优化与数据增强策略提升模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上的定位精度显著优于现有先进算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多尺度特征融合框架有效提升了图像篡改定位的准确性，为图像取证领域提供了新的技术思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ConvNeXt网络和多尺度特征融合的图像篡改定位方法，旨在提升现有图像取证技术的泛化性能与鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有图像篡改检测方法在面对复杂编辑手段时存在泛化能力不足、鲁棒性差的问题，亟需更有效的定位方案应对日益逼真的图像伪造。
ai_content.method: 采用堆叠ConvNeXt块作为编码器提取多尺度特征，通过解码器融合不同层级特征实现篡改像素定位，并结合损失函数优化与数据增强策略提升模型性能。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上的定位精度显著优于现有先进算法，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的多尺度特征融合框架有效提升了图像篡改定位的准确性，为图像取证领域提供了新的技术思路。

search_text: Effective Image Tampering Localization with Multi-Scale ConvNeXt Feature Fusion 通过多尺度 ConvNeXt 特征融合进行有效的图像篡改定位 With the widespread use of powerful image editing tools, image tampering becomes easy and realistic. Existing image forensic methods still face challenges of low generalization performance and robustness. In this letter, we propose an effective image tampering localization scheme based on ConvNeXt network and multi-scale feature fusion. Stacked ConvNeXt blocks are used as an encoder to capture hierarchical multi-scale features, which are then fused in decoder for locating tampered pixels accurately. Combined loss and effective data augmentation are adopted to further improve the model performance. Extensive experimental results show that localization performance of our proposed scheme outperforms other state-of-the-art ones. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ZhuHC98/ITL-SSN. 随着强大的图像编辑工具的广泛使用，图像篡改变得简单而现实。现有的图像取证方法仍然面临泛化性能和鲁棒性较低的挑战。在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于ConvNeXt网络和多尺度特征融合的有效图像篡改定位方案。堆叠式 ConvNeXt 块用作编码器来捕获分层多尺度特征，然后将其融合到解码器中以准确定位被篡改的像素。采用组合损失和有效数据增强来进一步提高模型性能。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方案的定位性能优于其他最先进的方案。源代码可在 https://github.com/ZhuHC98/ITL-SSN 获取。 本文提出一种基于ConvNeXt网络和多尺度特征融合的图像篡改定位方法，旨在提升现有图像取证技术的泛化性能与鲁棒性。 Haochen Zhu,Gang Cao,Mo Zhao cs.CV

title: Bayesian Continual Learning via Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过尖峰神经网络进行贝叶斯持续学习
comment: Accepted for publication in Frontiers in Computational Neuroscience
comments: Accepted for publication in Frontiers in Computational Neuroscience
abstract: Among the main features of biological intelligence are energy efficiency, capacity for continual adaptation, and risk management via uncertainty quantification. Neuromorphic engineering has been thus far mostly driven by the goal of implementing energy-efficient machines that take inspiration from the time-based computing paradigm of biological brains. In this paper, we take steps towards the design of neuromorphic systems that are capable of adaptation to changing learning tasks, while producing well-calibrated uncertainty quantification estimates. To this end, we derive online learning rules for spiking neural networks (SNNs) within a Bayesian continual learning framework. In it, each synaptic weight is represented by parameters that quantify the current epistemic uncertainty resulting from prior knowledge and observed data. The proposed online rules update the distribution parameters in a streaming fashion as data are observed. We instantiate the proposed approach for both real-valued and binary synaptic weights. Experimental results using Intel's Lava platform show the merits of Bayesian over frequentist learning in terms of capacity for adaptation and uncertainty quantification.
summary: Among the main features of biological intelligence are energy efficiency, capacity for continual adaptation, and risk management via uncertainty quantification. Neuromorphic engineering has been thus far mostly driven by the goal of implementing energy-efficient machines that take inspiration from the time-based computing paradigm of biological brains. In this paper, we take steps towards the design of neuromorphic systems that are capable of adaptation to changing learning tasks, while producing well-calibrated uncertainty quantification estimates. To this end, we derive online learning rules for spiking neural networks (SNNs) within a Bayesian continual learning framework. In it, each synaptic weight is represented by parameters that quantify the current epistemic uncertainty resulting from prior knowledge and observed data. The proposed online rules update the distribution parameters in a streaming fashion as data are observed. We instantiate the proposed approach for both real-valued and binary synaptic weights. Experimental results using Intel's Lava platform show the merits of Bayesian over frequentist learning in terms of capacity for adaptation and uncertainty quantification.
abstract_zh: 生物智能的主要特征包括能源效率、持续适应能力以及通过不确定性量化进行风险管理。迄今为止，神经形态工程主要是由实现节能机器的目标驱动的，这些机器的灵感来自生物大脑基于时间的计算范式。在本文中，我们采取措施设计能够适应不断变化的学习任务的神经形态系统，同时产生经过良好校准的不确定性量化估计。为此，我们在贝叶斯持续学习框架内推导了尖峰神经网络（SNN）的在线学习规则。其中，每个突触权重都由参数表示，这些参数量化了由先验知识和观察到的数据产生的当前认知不确定性。所提出的在线规则在观察数据时以流方式更新分布参数。我们针对实值和二元突触权重实例化了所提出的方法。使用英特尔 Lava 平台的实验结果表明，贝叶斯在适应能力和不确定性量化方面优于频率学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯框架的脉冲神经网络持续学习方法，实现对变化任务的适应与不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 生物智能具备能量效率、持续适应及不确定性量化能力，而现有神经形态系统缺乏对动态任务的适应性与风险评估能力。
AI.method: 在贝叶斯持续学习框架下推导脉冲神经网络的在线学习规则，通过参数动态表征突触权重的不确定性，并实时更新分布参数。
AI.result: 基于Intel Lava平台的实验表明，贝叶斯方法在任务适应性和不确定性量化方面优于传统频率学派方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯脉冲神经网络为神经形态系统提供了兼具适应性与不确定性估计能力的持续学习解决方案。

authors_text: Yen-Cheng Liu,Chih-Yao Ma,Xiaoliang Dai,Junjiao Tian,Peter Vajda,Zijian He,Zsolt Kira
title: Open-Set Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 开集半监督目标检测
abstract: Recent developments for Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) have shown the promise of leveraging unlabeled data to improve an object detector. However, thus far these methods have assumed that the unlabeled data does not contain out-of-distribution (OOD) classes, which is unrealistic with larger-scale unlabeled datasets. In this paper, we consider a more practical yet challenging problem, Open-Set Semi-Supervised Object Detection (OSSOD). We first find the existing SSOD method obtains a lower performance gain in open-set conditions, and this is caused by the semantic expansion, where the distracting OOD objects are mispredicted as in-distribution pseudo-labels for the semi-supervised training. To address this problem, we consider online and offline OOD detection modules, which are integrated with SSOD methods. With the extensive studies, we found that leveraging an offline OOD detector based on a self-supervised vision transformer performs favorably against online OOD detectors due to its robustness to the interference of pseudo-labeling. In the experiment, our proposed framework effectively addresses the semantic expansion issue and shows consistent improvements on many OSSOD benchmarks, including large-scale COCO-OpenImages. We also verify the effectiveness of our framework under different OSSOD conditions, including varying numbers of in-distribution classes, different degrees of supervision, and different combinations of unlabeled sets.
summary: Recent developments for Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) have shown the promise of leveraging unlabeled data to improve an object detector. However, thus far these methods have assumed that the unlabeled data does not contain out-of-distribution (OOD) classes, which is unrealistic with larger-scale unlabeled datasets. In this paper, we consider a more practical yet challenging problem, Open-Set Semi-Supervised Object Detection (OSSOD). We first find the existing SSOD method obtains a lower performance gain in open-set conditions, and this is caused by the semantic expansion, where the distracting OOD objects are mispredicted as in-distribution pseudo-labels for the semi-supervised training. To address this problem, we consider online and offline OOD detection modules, which are integrated with SSOD methods. With the extensive studies, we found that leveraging an offline OOD detector based on a self-supervised vision transformer performs favorably against online OOD detectors due to its robustness to the interference of pseudo-labeling. In the experiment, our proposed framework effectively addresses the semantic expansion issue and shows consistent improvements on many OSSOD benchmarks, including large-scale COCO-OpenImages. We also verify the effectiveness of our framework under different OSSOD conditions, including varying numbers of in-distribution classes, different degrees of supervision, and different combinations of unlabeled sets.
abstract_zh: 半监督目标检测 (SSOD) 的最新发展表明，利用未标记数据来改进目标检测器是有希望的。然而，到目前为止，这些方法假设未标记数据不包含分布外（OOD）类，这对于大规模未标记数据集来说是不现实的。在本文中，我们考虑一个更实际但更具挑战性的问题：开放集半监督目标检测（OSSOD）。我们首先发现现有的 SSOD 方法在开放集条件下获得较低的性能增益，这是由语义扩展引起的，其中分散注意力的 OOD 对象被错误预测为半监督训练的分布内伪标签。为了解决这个问题，我们考虑在线和离线 OOD 检测模块，它们与 SSOD 方法集成。通过广泛的研究，我们发现，利用基于自监督视觉转换器的离线 OOD 检测器由于其对伪标记干扰的鲁棒性而优于在线 OOD 检测器。在实验中，我们提出的框架有效地解决了语义扩展问题，并在许多 OSSOD 基准测试上显示出一致的改进，包括大规模 COCO-OpenImages。我们还验证了我们的框架在不同 OSSOD 条件下的有效性，包括不同数量的分布类、不同程度的监督以及未标记集的不同组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出开放集半监督目标检测（OSSOD）方法，解决现有半监督目标检测在未标注数据包含分布外（OOD）类别时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法假设未标注数据不含OOD类别，但实际大规模数据集常包含此类样本，导致伪标签错误和性能下降。
AI.method: 设计在线/离线OOD检测模块，结合自监督视觉Transformer的离线OOD检测器，抑制伪标签干扰并提升开放集场景下的检测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在COCO-OpenImages等基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了框架在不同OOD类别数量、监督强度及未标注集组合下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过集成离线OOD检测有效缓解语义扩张问题，在开放集半监督目标检测任务中取得稳定性能提升。

With the extensive studies, we found that leveraging an offline OOD detector based on a self-supervised vision transformer performs favorably against online OOD detectors due to its robustness to the interference of pseudo-labeling. In the experiment, our proposed framework effectively addresses the semantic expansion issue and shows consistent improvements on many OSSOD benchmarks, including large-scale COCO-OpenImages. We also verify the effectiveness of our framework under different OSSOD conditions, including varying numbers of in-distribution classes, different degrees of supervision, and different combinations of unlabeled sets. 半监督目标检测 (SSOD) 的最新发展表明，利用未标记数据来改进目标检测器是有希望的。然而，到目前为止，这些方法假设未标记数据不包含分布外（OOD）类，这对于大规模未标记数据集来说是不现实的。在本文中，我们考虑一个更实际但更具挑战性的问题：开放集半监督目标检测（OSSOD）。我们首先发现现有的 SSOD 方法在开放集条件下获得较低的性能增益，这是由语义扩展引起的，其中分散注意力的 OOD 对象被错误预测为半监督训练的分布内伪标签。为了解决这个问题，我们考虑在线和离线 OOD 检测模块，它们与 SSOD 方法集成。通过广泛的研究，我们发现，利用基于自监督视觉转换器的离线 OOD 检测器由于其对伪标记干扰的鲁棒性而优于在线 OOD 检测器。在实验中，我们提出的框架有效地解决了语义扩展问题，并在许多 OSSOD 基准测试上显示出一致的改进，包括大规模 COCO-OpenImages。我们还验证了我们的框架在不同 OSSOD 条件下的有效性，包括不同数量的分布类、不同程度的监督以及未标记集的不同组合。 本文提出开放集半监督目标检测（OSSOD）方法，解决现有半监督目标检测在未标注数据包含分布外（OOD）类别时性能下降的问题。 Yen-Cheng Liu,Chih-Yao Ma,Xiaoliang Dai,Junjiao Tian,Peter Vajda,Zijian He,Zsolt Kira cs.CV,cs.LG

title: CounTR: Transformer-based Generalised Visual Counting
title_zh: CountTR：基于 Transformer 的广义视觉计数
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of generalised visual object counting, with the goal of developing a computational model for counting the number of objects from arbitrary semantic categories, using arbitrary number of "exemplars", i.e. zero-shot or few-shot counting. To this end, we make the following four contributions: (1) We introduce a novel transformer-based architecture for generalised visual object counting, termed as Counting Transformer (CounTR), which explicitly capture the similarity between image patches or with given "exemplars" with the attention mechanism;(2) We adopt a two-stage training regime, that first pre-trains the model with self-supervised learning, and followed by supervised fine-tuning;(3) We propose a simple, scalable pipeline for synthesizing training images with a large number of instances or that from different semantic categories, explicitly forcing the model to make use of the given "exemplars";(4) We conduct thorough ablation studies on the large-scale counting benchmark, e.g. FSC-147, and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both zero and few-shot settings.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of generalised visual object counting, with the goal of developing a computational model for counting the number of objects from arbitrary semantic categories, using arbitrary number of "exemplars", i.e. zero-shot or few-shot counting. To this end, we make the following four contributions: (1) We introduce a novel transformer-based architecture for generalised visual object counting, termed as Counting Transformer (CounTR), which explicitly capture the similarity between image patches or with given "exemplars" with the attention mechanism;(2) We adopt a two-stage training regime, that first pre-trains the model with self-supervised learning, and followed by supervised fine-tuning;(3) We propose a simple, scalable pipeline for synthesizing training images with a large number of instances or that from different semantic categories, explicitly forcing the model to make use of the given "exemplars";(4) We conduct thorough ablation studies on the large-scale counting benchmark, e.g. FSC-147, and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both zero and few-shot settings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑广义视觉对象计数问题，目标是开发一种计算模型，用于使用任意数量的“范例”（即零样本或少样本计数）来计算任意语义类别中的对象数量。为此，我们做出了以下四个贡献：（1）我们引入了一种新颖的基于变压器的广义视觉对象计数架构，称为计数变压器（CounTR），它通过注意机制明确捕获图像块之间或给定“样本”之间的相似性；（2）我们采用两阶段训练机制，首先通过自监督学习对模型进行预训练，然后进行监督微调；（3）我们提出了一种简单的、可扩展的管道合成具有大量实例或来自不同语义类别的训练图像，明确地强制模型使用给定的“范例”；（4）我们对大规模计数基准进行彻底的消融研究，例如FSC-147，并在零次和几次射击设置上展示了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的通用视觉对象计数模型CounTR，解决零样本和少样本场景下的物体数量统计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉计数方法难以处理任意语义类别或少量示例的场景，缺乏对示例与图像特征之间关系的建模。
AI.method: 设计CounTR架构利用注意力机制捕捉图像块与示例的相似性，采用自监督预训练加监督微调的两阶段训练，并提出合成多实例图像的可扩展训练流水线。
AI.result: 在FSC-147等基准测试中，CounTR在零样本和少样本设置下均达到最先进性能，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: CounTR通过Transformer结构和训练策略创新，有效解决了通用视觉计数难题，为少样本学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jun Ling,Xu Tan,Liyang Chen,Runnan Li,Yuchao Zhang,Sheng Zhao,Li Song
title: StableFace: Analyzing and Improving Motion Stability for Talking Face Generation
title_zh: StableFace：分析和提高说话人脸生成的运动稳定性
abstract: While previous speech-driven talking face generation methods have made significant progress in improving the visual quality and lip-sync quality of the synthesized videos, they pay less attention to lip motion jitters which greatly undermine the realness of talking face videos. What causes motion jitters, and how to mitigate the problem? In this paper, we conduct systematic analyses on the motion jittering problem based on a state-of-the-art pipeline that uses 3D face representations to bridge the input audio and output video, and improve the motion stability with a series of effective designs. We find that several issues can lead to jitters in synthesized talking face video: 1) jitters from the input 3D face representations; 2) training-inference mismatch; 3) lack of dependency modeling among video frames. Accordingly, we propose three effective solutions to address this issue: 1) we propose a gaussian-based adaptive smoothing module to smooth the 3D face representations to eliminate jitters in the input; 2) we add augmented erosions on the input data of the neural renderer in training to simulate the distortion in inference to reduce mismatch; 3) we develop an audio-fused transformer generator to model dependency among video frames. Besides, considering there is no off-the-shelf metric for measuring motion jitters in talking face video, we devise an objective metric (Motion Stability Index, MSI), to quantitatively measure the motion jitters by calculating the reciprocal of variance acceleration. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our method on motion-stable face video generation, with better quality than previous systems.
summary: While previous speech-driven talking face generation methods have made significant progress in improving the visual quality and lip-sync quality of the synthesized videos, they pay less attention to lip motion jitters which greatly undermine the realness of talking face videos. What causes motion jitters, and how to mitigate the problem? In this paper, we conduct systematic analyses on the motion jittering problem based on a state-of-the-art pipeline that uses 3D face representations to bridge the input audio and output video, and improve the motion stability with a series of effective designs. We find that several issues can lead to jitters in synthesized talking face video: 1) jitters from the input 3D face representations; 2) training-inference mismatch; 3) lack of dependency modeling among video frames. Accordingly, we propose three effective solutions to address this issue: 1) we propose a gaussian-based adaptive smoothing module to smooth the 3D face representations to eliminate jitters in the input; 2) we add augmented erosions on the input data of the neural renderer in training to simulate the distortion in inference to reduce mismatch; 3) we develop an audio-fused transformer generator to model dependency among video frames. Besides, considering there is no off-the-shelf metric for measuring motion jitters in talking face video, we devise an objective metric (Motion Stability Index, MSI), to quantitatively measure the motion jitters by calculating the reciprocal of variance acceleration. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our method on motion-stable face video generation, with better quality than previous systems.
abstract_zh: 虽然以前的语音驱动的说话人脸生成方法在提高合成视频的视觉质量和唇形同步质量方面取得了显着进展，但它们对嘴唇运动抖动的关注较少，这极大地破坏了说话人脸视频的真实性。是什么导致运动抖动，以及如何缓解该问题？在本文中，我们基于最先进的管道对运动抖动问题进行了系统分析，该管道使用3D人脸表示来桥接输入音频和输出视频，并通过一系列有效的设计提高了运动稳定性。我们发现有几个问题可能会导致合成说话人脸视频中的抖动：1​​）来自输入 3D 人脸表示的抖动； 2）训练-推理不匹配； 3）缺乏视频帧之间的依赖建模。因此，我们提出了三种有效的解决方案来解决这个问题：1）我们提出了一种基于高斯的自适应平滑模块来平滑3D人脸表示，以消除输入中的抖动； 2）我们在训练中对神经渲染器的输入数据添加增强侵蚀，以模拟推理中的失真以减少不匹配； 3）我们开发了一个音频融合变压器生成器来模拟视频帧之间的依赖关系。此外，考虑到没有现成的度量标准来测量说话人脸视频中的运动抖动，我们设计了一个客观的度量标准（运动稳定性指数，MSI），通过计算方差加速度的倒数来定量测量运动抖动。大量的实验结果表明我们的方法在运动稳定的面部视频生成方面具有优越性，其质量比以前的系统更好。

AI.tldr: 本文针对说话人脸生成中的运动抖动问题，提出StableFace方法以提升合成视频的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人脸生成方法虽在视觉质量和唇形同步上取得进展，但忽视了运动抖动问题，导致生成视频真实感不足。
AI.method: 提出三种解决方案：1）基于高斯的自适应平滑模块消除3D人脸表示抖动；2）训练时对神经渲染器输入添加侵蚀增强以减少训练-推理不匹配；3）开发融合音频的Transformer生成器建模帧间依赖关系，并设计运动稳定性指数（MSI）作为量化指标。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在运动稳定性方面优于现有系统，生成视频质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分析抖动成因并提出针对性改进方案，StableFace有效提升了说话人脸生成的运动稳定性，并为评估提供了新指标。

Accordingly, we propose three effective solutions to address this issue: 1) we propose a gaussian-based adaptive smoothing module to smooth the 3D face representations to eliminate jitters in the input; 2) we add augmented erosions on the input data of the neural renderer in training to simulate the distortion in inference to reduce mismatch; 3) we develop an audio-fused transformer generator to model dependency among video frames. Besides, considering there is no off-the-shelf metric for measuring motion jitters in talking face video, we devise an objective metric (Motion Stability Index, MSI), to quantitatively measure the motion jitters by calculating the reciprocal of variance acceleration. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our method on motion-stable face video generation, with better quality than previous systems. 虽然以前的语音驱动的说话人脸生成方法在提高合成视频的视觉质量和唇形同步质量方面取得了显着进展，但它们对嘴唇运动抖动的关注较少，这极大地破坏了说话人脸视频的真实性。是什么导致运动抖动，以及如何缓解该问题？在本文中，我们基于最先进的管道对运动抖动问题进行了系统分析，该管道使用3D人脸表示来桥接输入音频和输出视频，并通过一系列有效的设计提高了运动稳定性。我们发现有几个问题可能会导致合成说话人脸视频中的抖动：1​​）来自输入 3D 人脸表示的抖动； 2）训练-推理不匹配； 3）缺乏视频帧之间的依赖建模。因此，我们提出了三种有效的解决方案来解决这个问题：1）我们提出了一种基于高斯的自适应平滑模块来平滑3D人脸表示，以消除输入中的抖动； 2）我们在训练中对神经渲染器的输入数据添加增强侵蚀，以模拟推理中的失真以减少不匹配； 3）我们开发了一个音频融合变压器生成器来模拟视频帧之间的依赖关系。此外，考虑到没有现成的度量标准来测量说话人脸视频中的运动抖动，我们设计了一个客观的度量标准（运动稳定性指数，MSI），通过计算方差加速度的倒数来定量测量运动抖动。大量的实验结果表明我们的方法在运动稳定的面部视频生成方面具有优越性，其质量比以前的系统更好。 本文针对说话人脸生成中的运动抖动问题，提出StableFace方法以提升合成视频的稳定性。 Jun Ling,Xu Tan,Liyang Chen,Runnan Li,Yuchao Zhang,Sheng Zhao,Li Song cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.SD

title: On Time and Space: An Experimental Study on Graph Structural and Temporal Encodings
title_zh: 关于时间和空间：图结构和时间编码的实验研究
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: Dynamic networks reflect temporal changes occurring to the graph's structure and are used to model a wide variety of problems in many application fields. We investigate the design space of dynamic graph visualization along two major dimensions: the network structural and temporal representation. Significant research has been conducted evaluating the benefits and drawbacks of different structural representations for static graphs, however, few extend this comparison to a dynamic network setting. We conduct a study where we assess the participants' response times, accuracy, and preferences for different combinations of the graph's structural and temporal representations on typical dynamic network exploration tasks, with and without support of common interaction methods. Our results suggest that matrices provide better support for tasks on lower-level entities and basic interactions require longer response times while increasing accuracy. Node-link with auto animation proved to be the quickest and most accurate combination overall, while animation with playback control the most preferred temporal encoding.
summary: Dynamic networks reflect temporal changes occurring to the graph's structure and are used to model a wide variety of problems in many application fields. We investigate the design space of dynamic graph visualization along two major dimensions: the network structural and temporal representation. Significant research has been conducted evaluating the benefits and drawbacks of different structural representations for static graphs, however, few extend this comparison to a dynamic network setting. We conduct a study where we assess the participants' response times, accuracy, and preferences for different combinations of the graph's structural and temporal representations on typical dynamic network exploration tasks, with and without support of common interaction methods. Our results suggest that matrices provide better support for tasks on lower-level entities and basic interactions require longer response times while increasing accuracy. Node-link with auto animation proved to be the quickest and most accurate combination overall, while animation with playback control the most preferred temporal encoding.
abstract_zh: 动态网络反映了图结构发生的时间变化，并用于对许多应用领域中的各种问题进行建模。我们沿着两个主要维度研究动态图可视化的设计空间：网络结构和时间表示。已经进行了大量研究来评估静态图的不同结构表示的优点和缺点，但是很少有人将这种比较扩展到动态网络设置。我们进行了一项研究，评估参与者对典型动态网络探索任务中图结构和时间表示的不同组合的响应时间、准确性和偏好，无论是否支持常见的交互方法。我们的结果表明，矩阵为较低级别实体上的任务提供了更好的支持，并且基本交互需要更长的响应时间，同时提高准确性。事实证明，具有自动动画的节点链接是整体上最快、最准确的组合，而具有播放控制的动画是最优选的时间编码。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验研究动态网络的结构和时间编码设计，评估不同组合对任务表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 动态网络广泛存在但缺乏对结构和时间表示的系统比较，现有研究多集中于静态网络。
AI.method: 通过用户实验对比矩阵、节点链接等结构表示与动画、播放控制等时间编码的组合效果，分析响应时间、准确率和偏好。
AI.result: 矩阵适合低级任务，节点链接加自动动画最快最准，播放控制最受偏好。
AI.conclusion: 动态网络可视化需结合结构与时间编码优势，不同任务场景需采用适配方案。

authors_text: Qingsong Yan,Qiang Wang,Kaiyong Zhao,Bo Li,Xiaowen Chu,Fei Deng
title: SphereDepth: Panorama Depth Estimation from Spherical Domain
title_zh: SphereDepth：球面域的全景深度估计
abstract: The panorama image can simultaneously demonstrate complete information of the surrounding environment and has many advantages in virtual tourism, games, robotics, etc. However, the progress of panorama depth estimation cannot completely solve the problems of distortion and discontinuity caused by the commonly used projection methods. This paper proposes SphereDepth, a novel panorama depth estimation method that predicts the depth directly on the spherical mesh without projection preprocessing. The core idea is to establish the relationship between the panorama image and the spherical mesh and then use a deep neural network to extract features on the spherical domain to predict depth. To address the efficiency challenges brought by the high-resolution panorama data, we introduce two hyper-parameters for the proposed spherical mesh processing framework to balance the inference speed and accuracy. Validated on three public panorama datasets, SphereDepth achieves comparable results with the state-of-the-art methods of panorama depth estimation. Benefiting from the spherical domain setting, SphereDepth can generate a high-quality point cloud and significantly alleviate the issues of distortion and discontinuity.
summary: The panorama image can simultaneously demonstrate complete information of the surrounding environment and has many advantages in virtual tourism, games, robotics, etc. However, the progress of panorama depth estimation cannot completely solve the problems of distortion and discontinuity caused by the commonly used projection methods. This paper proposes SphereDepth, a novel panorama depth estimation method that predicts the depth directly on the spherical mesh without projection preprocessing. The core idea is to establish the relationship between the panorama image and the spherical mesh and then use a deep neural network to extract features on the spherical domain to predict depth. To address the efficiency challenges brought by the high-resolution panorama data, we introduce two hyper-parameters for the proposed spherical mesh processing framework to balance the inference speed and accuracy. Validated on three public panorama datasets, SphereDepth achieves comparable results with the state-of-the-art methods of panorama depth estimation. Benefiting from the spherical domain setting, SphereDepth can generate a high-quality point cloud and significantly alleviate the issues of distortion and discontinuity.
abstract_zh: 全景图像可以同时展示周围环境的完整信息，在虚拟旅游、游戏、机器人等方面具有许多优势。然而，全景深度估计的进展并不能完全解决常用投影方法带来的失真和不连续性问题。本文提出了 SphereDepth，一种新颖的全景深度估计方法，无需投影预处理，直接在球面网格上预测深度。其核心思想是建立全景图像和球面网格之间的关系，然后使用深度神经网络提取球面域上的特征来预测深度​​。为了解决高分辨率全景数据带来的效率挑战，我们为所提出的球形网格处理框架引入了两个超参数，以平衡推理速度和准确性。 SphereDepth 在三个公共全景数据集上进行了验证，取得了与最先进的全景深度估计方法相当的结果。受益于球形域设置，SphereDepth 可以生成高质量的点云，并显着缓解失真和不连续问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SphereDepth方法，直接在球面网格上进行全景深度估计，避免传统投影方法的失真和不连续问题。
AI.motivation: 全景图像在虚拟旅游、游戏等领域应用广泛，但现有深度估计方法因投影预处理导致失真和不连续问题难以解决。
AI.method: 建立全景图像与球面网格的关系，通过深度神经网络在球面域提取特征预测深度，并引入两个超参数平衡计算效率与精度。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上达到与现有最佳方法相当的性能，生成高质量点云并显著缓解失真和不连续问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于球面域的SphereDepth方法有效解决了全景深度估计中的投影失真问题，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Franziska Eberle,Anupam Gupta,Nicole Megow,Benjamin Moseley,Rudy Zhou
title: Configuration Balancing for Stochastic Requests
title_zh: 随机请求的配置平衡
abstract: The configuration balancing problem with stochastic requests generalizes many well-studied resource allocation problems such as load balancing and virtual circuit routing. In it, we have $m$ resources and $n$ requests. Each request has multiple possible configurations, each of which increases the load of each resource by some amount. The goal is to select one configuration for each request to minimize the makespan: the load of the most-loaded resource. In our work, we focus on a stochastic setting, where we only know the distribution for how each configuration increases the resource loads, learning the realized value only after a configuration is chosen. We develop both offline and online algorithms for configuration balancing with stochastic requests. When the requests are known offline, we give a non-adaptive policy for configuration balancing with stochastic requests that $O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$-approximates the optimal adaptive policy. In particular, this closes the adaptivity gap for this problem as there is an asymptotically matching lower bound even for the very special case of load balancing on identical machines. When requests arrive online in a list, we give a non-adaptive policy that is $O(\log m)$ competitive. Again, this result is asymptotically tight due to information-theoretic lower bounds for very special cases (e.g., for load balancing on unrelated machines). Finally, we show how to leverage adaptivity in the special case of load balancing on related machines to obtain a constant-factor approximation offline and an $O(\log \log m)$-approximation online. A crucial technical ingredient in all of our results is a new structural characterization of the optimal adaptive policy that allows us to limit the correlations between its decisions.

In it, we have $m$ resources and $n$ requests. Each request has multiple possible configurations, each of which increases the load of each resource by some amount. In our work, we focus on a stochastic setting, where we only know the distribution for how each configuration increases the resource loads, learning the realized value only after a configuration is chosen. We develop both offline and online algorithms for configuration balancing with stochastic requests. When the requests are known offline, we give a non-adaptive policy for configuration balancing with stochastic requests that $O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$-approximates the optimal adaptive policy. In particular, this closes the adaptivity gap for this problem as there is an asymptotically matching lower bound even for the very special case of load balancing on identical machines. When requests arrive online in a list, we give a non-adaptive policy that is $O(\log m)$ competitive. Again, this result is asymptotically tight due to information-theoretic lower bounds for very special cases (e.g., for load balancing on unrelated machines). Finally, we show how to leverage adaptivity in the special case of load balancing on related machines to obtain a constant-factor approximation offline and an $O(\log \log m)$-approximation online. A crucial technical ingredient in all of our results is a new structural characterization of the optimal adaptive policy that allows us to limit the correlations between its decisions.
abstract_zh: 随机请求的配置平衡问题概括了许多经过深入研究的资源分配问题，例如负载平衡和虚电路路由。其中，我们有 $m$ 资源和 $n$ 请求。每个请求都有多种可能的配置，每种配置都会增加一定量的每种资源的负载。目标是为每个请求选择一种配置，以最小化完工时间：负载最多的资源的负载。在我们的工作中，我们关注随机设置，我们只知道每个配置如何增加资源负载的分布，仅在选择配置后才了解实现的值。我们开发了离线和在线算法，用于随机请求的配置平衡。当离线已知请求时，我们给出一个非自适应策略，用于随机请求的配置平衡，$O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$-近似最优自适应策略。特别是，这缩小了该问题的适应性差距，因为即使对于相同机器上的负载平衡的非常特殊的情况，也存在渐近匹配的下界。当请求到达在线列表中时，我们给出具有 $O(\log m)$ 竞争性的非自适应策略。同样，由于非常特殊情况（例如，对于不相关机器上的负载平衡）的信息论下限，该结果是渐近紧的。最后，我们展示了如何在相关机器上负载平衡的特殊情况下利用自适应性来获得离线常数因子近似值和在线 $O(\log \log m)$ 近似值。我们所有结果中的一个关键技术要素是最优自适应策略的新结构特征，它使我们能够限制其决策之间的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机请求下的配置平衡问题，旨在通过选择请求的配置来最小化资源的最大负载（makespan）。
AI.motivation: 传统资源分配问题（如负载均衡）通常假设请求已知且确定，但实际场景中请求可能具有随机性。本文针对随机请求的不确定性，提出算法以优化资源分配。
AI.method: 开发了离线和在线算法：离线场景采用非自适应策略，近似比为O(log m / log log m)；在线场景采用非自适应策略，竞争比为O(log m)。针对相关机器负载均衡的特殊情况，利用自适应性获得更优结果。
AI.result: 离线算法闭合了自适应性差距，结果接近理论下界；在线算法达到O(log m)竞争比，且结果紧致。针对相关机器的特殊场景，进一步获得常数近似和O(log log m)在线近似。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过结构化分析和算法设计，为随机请求的配置平衡问题提供了高效解决方案，为不确定环境下的资源分配提供了理论支持。

search_text: Configuration Balancing for Stochastic Requests 随机请求的配置平衡 The configuration balancing problem with stochastic requests generalizes many well-studied resource allocation problems such as load balancing and virtual circuit routing. In it, we have $m$ resources and $n$ requests. Each request has multiple possible configurations, each of which increases the load of each resource by some amount. The goal is to select one configuration for each request to minimize the makespan: the load of the most-loaded resource. In our work, we focus on a stochastic setting, where we only know the distribution for how each configuration increases the resource loads, learning the realized value only after a configuration is chosen. We develop both offline and online algorithms for configuration balancing with stochastic requests. When the requests are known offline, we give a non-adaptive policy for configuration balancing with stochastic requests that $O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$-approximates the optimal adaptive policy. In particular, this closes the adaptivity gap for this problem as there is an asymptotically matching lower bound even for the very special case of load balancing on identical machines. When requests arrive online in a list, we give a non-adaptive policy that is $O(\log m)$ competitive. Again, this result is asymptotically tight due to information-theoretic lower bounds for very special cases (e.g., for load balancing on unrelated machines). Finally, we show how to leverage adaptivity in the special case of load balancing on related machines to obtain a constant-factor approximation offline and an $O(\log \log m)$-approximation online. A crucial technical ingredient in all of our results is a new structural characterization of the optimal adaptive policy that allows us to limit the correlations between its decisions. 随机请求的配置平衡问题概括了许多经过深入研究的资源分配问题，例如负载平衡和虚电路路由。其中，我们有 $m$ 资源和 $n$ 请求。每个请求都有多种可能的配置，每种配置都会增加一定量的每种资源的负载。目标是为每个请求选择一种配置，以最小化完工时间：负载最多的资源的负载。在我们的工作中，我们关注随机设置，我们只知道每个配置如何增加资源负载的分布，仅在选择配置后才了解实现的值。我们开发了离线和在线算法，用于随机请求的配置平衡。当离线已知请求时，我们给出一个非自适应策略，用于随机请求的配置平衡，$O(\frac{\log m}{\log \log m})$-近似最优自适应策略。特别是，这缩小了该问题的适应性差距，因为即使对于相同机器上的负载平衡的非常特殊的情况，也存在渐近匹配的下界。当请求到达在线列表中时，我们给出具有 $O(\log m)$ 竞争性的非自适应策略。同样，由于非常特殊情况（例如，对于不相关机器上的负载平衡）的信息论下限，该结果是渐近紧的。最后，我们展示了如何在相关机器上负载平衡的特殊情况下利用自适应性来获得离线常数因子近似值和在线 $O(\log \log m)$ 近似值。我们所有结果中的一个关键技术要素是最优自适应策略的新结构特征，它使我们能够限制其决策之间的相关性。 本文研究了在随机请求下的配置平衡问题，旨在通过选择请求的配置来最小化资源的最大负载（makespan）。 Franziska Eberle,Anupam Gupta,Nicole Megow,Benjamin Moseley,Rudy Zhou cs.DS

title: Graph Exploration with Embedding-Guided Layouts
title_zh: 使用嵌入引导布局进行图探索
abstract: Node-link diagrams are widely used to visualize graphs. Most graph layout algorithms only use graph topology for aesthetic goals (e.g., minimize node occlusions and edge crossings) or use node attributes for exploration goals (e.g., preserve visible communities). Existing hybrid methods that bind the two perspectives still suffer from various generation restrictions (e.g., limited input types and required manual adjustments and prior knowledge of graphs) and the imbalance between aesthetic and exploration goals. In this paper, we propose a flexible embedding-based graph exploration pipeline to enjoy the best of both graph topology and node attributes. First, we leverage embedding algorithms for attributed graphs to encode the two perspectives into latent space. Then, we present an embedding-driven graph layout algorithm, GEGraph, which can achieve aesthetic layouts with better community preservation to support an easy interpretation of the graph structure. Next, graph explorations are extended based on the generated graph layout and insights extracted from the embedding vectors. Illustrated with examples, we build a layout-preserving aggregation method with Focus+Context interaction and a related nodes searching approach with multiple proximity strategies. Finally, we conduct quantitative and qualitative evaluations, a user study, and two case studies to validate our approach.
summary: Node-link diagrams are widely used to visualize graphs. Most graph layout algorithms only use graph topology for aesthetic goals (e.g., minimize node occlusions and edge crossings) or use node attributes for exploration goals (e.g., preserve visible communities). Existing hybrid methods that bind the two perspectives still suffer from various generation restrictions (e.g., limited input types and required manual adjustments and prior knowledge of graphs) and the imbalance between aesthetic and exploration goals. In this paper, we propose a flexible embedding-based graph exploration pipeline to enjoy the best of both graph topology and node attributes. First, we leverage embedding algorithms for attributed graphs to encode the two perspectives into latent space. Then, we present an embedding-driven graph layout algorithm, GEGraph, which can achieve aesthetic layouts with better community preservation to support an easy interpretation of the graph structure. Next, graph explorations are extended based on the generated graph layout and insights extracted from the embedding vectors. Illustrated with examples, we build a layout-preserving aggregation method with Focus+Context interaction and a related nodes searching approach with multiple proximity strategies. Finally, we conduct quantitative and qualitative evaluations, a user study, and two case studies to validate our approach.
abstract_zh: 节点链接图广泛用于可视化图形。大多数图形布局算法仅使用图形拓扑来实现美观目标（例如，最小化节点遮挡和边缘交叉）或使用节点属性来实现探索目标（例如，保留可见社区）。现有的结合两种视角的混合方法仍然受到各种生成限制（例如，有限的输入类型和需要手动调整和图形的先验知识）以及审美和探索目标之间的不平衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种灵活的基于嵌入的图探索管道，以充分利用图拓扑和节点属性。首先，我们利用属性图的嵌入算法将两个视角编码到潜在空间中。然后，我们提出了一种嵌入驱动的图布局算法 GEGraph，它可以实现具有更好的社区保护的美观布局，以支持对图结构的轻松解释。接下来，根据生成的图形布局和从嵌入向量中提取的见解来扩展图形探索。通过示例，我们构建了一种具有 Focus+Context 交互的布局保留聚合方法和具有多种邻近策略的相关节点搜索方法。最后，我们进行定量和定性评估、用户研究和两个案例研究来验证我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图拓扑结构和节点属性的嵌入引导图探索方法，以提升图可视化的美学效果与探索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图布局算法难以平衡美学目标（如减少节点遮挡）与探索目标（如保留社区结构），且依赖手动调整和先验知识，限制了灵活性与实用性。
AI.method: 首先利用嵌入算法将图拓扑和节点属性编码为潜在空间表示，再提出嵌入驱动的GEGraph布局算法实现美学与社区保留的平衡，最后基于布局和嵌入向量扩展探索功能，包括布局保持的聚合方法和多策略相关节点搜索。
AI.result: 通过定量/定性评估、用户研究及案例分析验证了方法有效性，证明其在美学布局、社区结构保留及交互探索方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该嵌入引导的图探索框架有效融合了拓扑与属性信息，为图可视化提供了灵活且自动化的解决方案，提升了结构解释与交互分析能力。
