title: Minimizing Completion Times for Stochastic Jobs via Batched Free Times
title_zh: 通过批量空闲时间最小化随机作业的完成时间
abstract: We study the classic problem of minimizing the expected total completion time of jobs on $m$ identical machines in the setting where the sizes of the jobs are stochastic. Specifically, the size of each job is a random variable whose distribution is known to the algorithm, but whose realization is revealed only after the job is scheduled. While minimizing the total completion time is easy in the deterministic setting, the stochastic problem has long been notorious: all known algorithms have approximation ratios that either depend on the variances, or depend linearly on the number of machines. We give an $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{m})$-approximation for stochastic jobs which have Bernoulli processing times. This is the first approximation for this problem that is both independent of the variance in the job sizes, and is sublinear in the number of machines $m$. Our algorithm is based on a novel reduction from minimizing the total completion time to a natural makespan-like objective, which we call the weighted free time. We hope this free time objective will be useful in further improvements to this problem, as well as other stochastic scheduling problems.
summary: We study the classic problem of minimizing the expected total completion time of jobs on $m$ identical machines in the setting where the sizes of the jobs are stochastic. Specifically, the size of each job is a random variable whose distribution is known to the algorithm, but whose realization is revealed only after the job is scheduled. While minimizing the total completion time is easy in the deterministic setting, the stochastic problem has long been notorious: all known algorithms have approximation ratios that either depend on the variances, or depend linearly on the number of machines. We give an $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{m})$-approximation for stochastic jobs which have Bernoulli processing times. This is the first approximation for this problem that is both independent of the variance in the job sizes, and is sublinear in the number of machines $m$. Our algorithm is based on a novel reduction from minimizing the total completion time to a natural makespan-like objective, which we call the weighted free time. We hope this free time objective will be useful in further improvements to this problem, as well as other stochastic scheduling problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在作业规模随机的情况下最小化 $m$ 相同机器上作业的预期总完成时间的经典问题。具体来说，每个作业的大小是一个随机变量，其分布对于算法来说是已知的，但其实现仅在作业调度后才被揭示。虽然在确定性设置中最小化总完成时间很容易，但随机问题长期以来一直臭名昭著：所有已知算法都具有取决于方差或线性取决于机器数量的近似比率。我们为具有伯努利处理时间的随机作业给出 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{m})$ 近似。这是该问题的第一个近似值，它既与作业大小的方差无关，又与机器数量 $m$ 呈次线性关系。我们的算法基于一种新颖的减少方法，从最小化总完成时间到自然的完工时间目标，我们称之为加权空闲时间。我们希望这个空闲时间目标将有助于进一步改进这个问题以及其他随机调度问题。

AI.motivation: 传统算法在处理随机作业大小时，其近似比依赖于方差或机器数量，缺乏高效且通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的转换方法，将总完成时间最小化问题转化为基于加权空闲时间的类似makespan的目标函数。
AI.result: 首次实现了与作业方差无关且机器数量亚线性的O~(√m)近似比，适用于伯努利处理时间的随机作业。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为随机调度问题提供了新思路，可能推动相关领域的进一步优化研究。

search_text: Minimizing Completion Times for Stochastic Jobs via Batched Free Times 通过批量空闲时间最小化随机作业的完成时间 We study the classic problem of minimizing the expected total completion time of jobs on $m$ identical machines in the setting where the sizes of the jobs are stochastic. Specifically, the size of each job is a random variable whose distribution is known to the algorithm, but whose realization is revealed only after the job is scheduled. While minimizing the total completion time is easy in the deterministic setting, the stochastic problem has long been notorious: all known algorithms have approximation ratios that either depend on the variances, or depend linearly on the number of machines. We give an $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{m})$-approximation for stochastic jobs which have Bernoulli processing times. This is the first approximation for this problem that is both independent of the variance in the job sizes, and is sublinear in the number of machines $m$. Our algorithm is based on a novel reduction from minimizing the total completion time to a natural makespan-like objective, which we call the weighted free time. We hope this free time objective will be useful in further improvements to this problem, as well as other stochastic scheduling problems. 我们研究了在作业规模随机的情况下最小化 $m$ 相同机器上作业的预期总完成时间的经典问题。具体来说，每个作业的大小是一个随机变量，其分布对于算法来说是已知的，但其实现仅在作业调度后才被揭示。虽然在确定性设置中最小化总完成时间很容易，但随机问题长期以来一直臭名昭著：所有已知算法都具有取决于方差或线性取决于机器数量的近似比率。我们为具有伯努利处理时间的随机作业给出 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{m})$ 近似。这是该问题的第一个近似值，它既与作业大小的方差无关，又与机器数量 $m$ 呈次线性关系。我们的算法基于一种新颖的减少方法，从最小化总完成时间到自然的完工时间目标，我们称之为加权空闲时间。我们希望这个空闲时间目标将有助于进一步改进这个问题以及其他随机调度问题。 本文研究了在随机作业环境下，如何通过批量空闲时间最小化多台相同机器的总完成时间。 Anupam Gupta,Benjamin Moseley,Rudy Zhou cs.DS

title: A Data-Centric Approach For Dual-Arm Robotic Garment Flattening
title_zh: 以数据为中心的双臂机器人服装整平方法
abstract: Due to the high dimensionality of object states, a garment flattening pipeline requires recognising the configurations of garments for a robot to produce/select manipulation plans to flatten garments. In this paper, we propose a data-centric approach to identify known configurations of garments based on a known configuration network (KCNet) trained on depth images that capture the known configurations of garments and prior knowledge of garment shapes. In this paper, we propose a data-centric approach to identify the known configurations of garments based on a known configuration network (KCNet) trained on the depth images that capture the known configurations of garments and prior knowledge of garment shapes. The known configurations of garments are the configurations of garments when a robot hangs garments in the middle of the air. We found that it is possible to achieve 92\% accuracy if we let the robot recognise the common hanging configurations (the known configurations) of garments. We also demonstrate an effective robot garment flattening pipeline with our proposed approach on a dual-arm Baxter robot. The robot achieved an average operating time of 221.6 seconds and successfully manipulated garments of five different shapes.
summary: Due to the high dimensionality of object states, a garment flattening pipeline requires recognising the configurations of garments for a robot to produce/select manipulation plans to flatten garments. In this paper, we propose a data-centric approach to identify known configurations of garments based on a known configuration network (KCNet) trained on depth images that capture the known configurations of garments and prior knowledge of garment shapes. In this paper, we propose a data-centric approach to identify the known configurations of garments based on a known configuration network (KCNet) trained on the depth images that capture the known configurations of garments and prior knowledge of garment shapes. The known configurations of garments are the configurations of garments when a robot hangs garments in the middle of the air. We found that it is possible to achieve 92\% accuracy if we let the robot recognise the common hanging configurations (the known configurations) of garments. We also demonstrate an effective robot garment flattening pipeline with our proposed approach on a dual-arm Baxter robot. The robot achieved an average operating time of 221.6 seconds and successfully manipulated garments of five different shapes.
abstract_zh: 由于对象状态的高维性，服装平整管道需要识别服装的配置，以便机器人产生/选择操作计划来平整服装。在本文中，我们提出了一种以数据为中心的方法，基于在深度图像上训练的已知配置网络（KCNet）来识别已知的服装配置，该网络捕获服装的已知配置和服装形状的先验知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种以数据为中心的方法，基于在深度图像上训练的已知配置网络（KCNet）来识别服装的已知配置，该网络捕获服装的已知配置和服装形状的先验知识。已知的服装形态是机器人将服装悬挂在空中时的服装形态。我们发现，如果让机器人识别服装的常见悬挂配置（已知配置），准确率可以达到 92%。我们还在双臂 Baxter 机器人上使用我们提出的方法展示了有效的机器人服装压平管道。该机器人的平均操作时间为221.6秒，成功操控了五种不同形状的服装。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，利用已知配置网络（KCNet）识别衣物悬挂状态，实现双臂机器人衣物平整。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理高维衣物状态空间，需更高效识别衣物配置以制定操作计划。
AI.method: 基于深度图像训练的已知配置网络（KCNet），结合衣物形状先验知识，识别悬挂状态下的已知配置。
AI.result: 机器人识别准确率达92%，双臂Baxter机器人平均操作时间221.6秒，成功处理五种不同形状衣物。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法有效提升衣物平整效率，为复杂场景下机器人操作提供新思路。

title: Using Speech to Reduce Loss of Trust in Humanoid Social Robots
title_zh: 使用语音减少对人形社交机器人的信任损失
comment: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
comments: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
abstract: We present data from two online human-robot interaction experiments where 227 participants viewed videos of a humanoid robot exhibiting faulty or non-faulty behaviours while either remaining mute or speaking. The participants were asked to evaluate their perception of the robot's trustworthiness, as well as its likeability, animacy, and perceived intelligence. The results show that, while a non-faulty robot achieves the highest trust, an apparently faulty robot that can speak manages to almost completely mitigate the loss of trust that is otherwise seen with faulty behaviour. We theorize that this mitigation is correlated with the increase in perceived intelligence that is also seen when speech is present.
summary: We present data from two online human-robot interaction experiments where 227 participants viewed videos of a humanoid robot exhibiting faulty or non-faulty behaviours while either remaining mute or speaking. The participants were asked to evaluate their perception of the robot's trustworthiness, as well as its likeability, animacy, and perceived intelligence. The results show that, while a non-faulty robot achieves the highest trust, an apparently faulty robot that can speak manages to almost completely mitigate the loss of trust that is otherwise seen with faulty behaviour. We theorize that this mitigation is correlated with the increase in perceived intelligence that is also seen when speech is present.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了两个在线人机交互实验的数据，其中 227 名参与者观看了人形机器人在保持沉默或说话的情况下表现出错误或正常行为的视频。参与者被要求评估他们对机器人的可信度、可爱度、活泼性和感知智力的看法。结果表明，虽然一个没有缺陷的机器人获得了最高的信任，但一个明显有缺陷的会说话的机器人几乎完全减轻了因错误行为而导致的信任损失。我们推测，这种缓解与感知智力的增加相关，当存在语音时也会出现这种情况。

AI.tldr: 研究语音如何减少人形社交机器人因故障行为导致的信任度下降
AI.motivation: 解决人形机器人出现故障行为时如何维持用户信任的问题，探索语音在其中的作用
AI.method: 通过两个在线实验，让参与者观看机器人故障或非故障行为的视频，比较机器人说话与沉默对信任度的影响
AI.result: 非故障机器人获得最高信任，而能说话的故障机器人显著减少信任度下降，且感知智能提升
AI.conclusion: 语音通过提升机器人感知智能，有效缓解故障行为导致的信任度下降

title: Categorical semantics of compositional reinforcement learning
title_zh: 组合强化学习的分类语义
abstract: Compositional knowledge representations in reinforcement learning (RL) facilitate modular, interpretable, and safe task specifications. However, generating compositional models requires the characterization of minimal assumptions for the robustness of the compositionality feature, especially in the case of functional decompositions. Using a categorical point of view, we develop a knowledge representation framework for a compositional theory of RL. Our approach relies on the theoretical study of the category MDP, whose objects are Markov decision processes (MDPs) acting as models of tasks. The categorical semantics models the compositionality of tasks through the application of pushout operations akin to combining puzzle pieces. As a practical application of these pushout operations, we introduce zig-zag diagrams that rely on the compositional guarantees engendered by the category MDP. We further prove that properties of the category MDP unify concepts, such as enforcing safety requirements and exploiting symmetries, generalizing previous abstraction theories for RL.
summary: Compositional knowledge representations in reinforcement learning (RL) facilitate modular, interpretable, and safe task specifications. However, generating compositional models requires the characterization of minimal assumptions for the robustness of the compositionality feature, especially in the case of functional decompositions. Using a categorical point of view, we develop a knowledge representation framework for a compositional theory of RL. Our approach relies on the theoretical study of the category MDP, whose objects are Markov decision processes (MDPs) acting as models of tasks. The categorical semantics models the compositionality of tasks through the application of pushout operations akin to combining puzzle pieces. As a practical application of these pushout operations, we introduce zig-zag diagrams that rely on the compositional guarantees engendered by the category MDP. We further prove that properties of the category MDP unify concepts, such as enforcing safety requirements and exploiting symmetries, generalizing previous abstraction theories for RL.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 中的组合知识表示有助于模块化、可解释且安全的任务规范。然而，生成组合模型需要对组合特征的鲁棒性进行最小假设的表征，特别是在功能分解的情况下。我们使用分类的观点，为强化学习的组合理论开发了一个知识表示框架。我们的方法依赖于 MDP 类别的理论研究，其对象是充当任务模型的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。分类语义通过应用类似于组合拼图的推出操作来模拟任务的组合性。作为这些推出操作的实际应用，我们引入了依赖于类别 MDP 产生的组合保证的锯齿形图。我们进一步证明 MDP 类别的属性统一了概念，例如强制安全要求和利用对称性，概括了先前的 RL 抽象理论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于范畴论的强化学习组合性知识表示框架，通过定义马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的范畴结构，利用推出操作实现任务组合，并引入zig-zag图进行应用验证。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习模型在模块化、可解释性和安全性方面存在不足，组合性建模需更稳健的理论基础以确保功能分解的可靠性。
AI.method: 构建MDP范畴理论，通过推出操作（类似拼图组合）建模任务组合性，设计zig-zag图实现组合性保证的应用，并证明范畴性质可统一安全约束与对称性利用等概念。
AI.result: 建立了组合强化学习的范畴语义框架，证明MDP范畴属性可推广至安全要求约束和对称性利用，统一了先前的抽象理论。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为组合性强化学习提供了理论基础，通过范畴论方法实现了模块化、可解释且安全的任务建模，推动了RL理论与应用的结合。

authors_text: Huiqiao Xie,Yang Lei,Yabo Fu,Tonghe Wang,Justin Roper,Jeffrey D. Bradley,Pretesh Patel,Tian Liu,Xiaofeng Yang
title: Deformable Image Registration using Unsupervised Deep Learning for CBCT-guided Abdominal Radiotherapy
title_zh: 使用无监督深度学习进行变形图像配准，用于 CBCT 引导的腹部放射治疗
abstract: CBCTs in image-guided radiotherapy provide crucial anatomy information for patient setup and plan evaluation. Longitudinal CBCT image registration could quantify the inter-fractional anatomic changes. The purpose of this study is to propose an unsupervised deep learning based CBCT-CBCT deformable image registration. The proposed deformable registration workflow consists of training and inference stages that share the same feed-forward path through a spatial transformation-based network (STN). The STN consists of a global generative adversarial network (GlobalGAN) and a local GAN (LocalGAN) to predict the coarse- and fine-scale motions, respectively. The network was trained by minimizing the image similarity loss and the deformable vector field (DVF) regularization loss without the supervision of ground truth DVFs. During the inference stage, patches of local DVF were predicted by the trained LocalGAN and fused to form a whole-image DVF. The local whole-image DVF was subsequently combined with the GlobalGAN generated DVF to obtain final DVF. The proposed method was evaluated using 100 fractional CBCTs from 20 abdominal cancer patients in the experiments and 105 fractional CBCTs from a cohort of 21 different abdominal cancer patients in a holdout test. Qualitatively, the registration results show great alignment between the deformed CBCT images and the target CBCT image. Quantitatively, the average target registration error (TRE) calculated on the fiducial markers and manually identified landmarks was 1.91+-1.11 mm. The average mean absolute error (MAE), normalized cross correlation (NCC) between the deformed CBCT and target CBCT were 33.42+-7.48 HU, 0.94+-0.04, respectively. This promising registration method could provide fast and accurate longitudinal CBCT alignment to facilitate inter-fractional anatomic changes analysis and prediction.

abstract_zh: 图像引导放射治疗中的 CBCT 为患者设置和计划评估提供了重要的解剖信息。纵向 CBCT 图像配准可以量化分次间的解剖变化。本研究的目的是提出一种基于无监督深度学习的 CBCT-CBCT 变形图像配准。所提出的变形配准工作流程由训练和推理阶段组成，它们通过基于空间变换的网络（STN）共享相同的前馈路径。 STN 由全局生成对抗网络 (GlobalGAN) 和局部 GAN (LocalGAN) 组成，分别用于预测粗尺度运动和细尺度运动。该网络是通过最小化图像相似性损失和可变形矢量场（DVF）正则化损失来训练的，而无需地面实况 DVF 的监督。在推理阶段，局部 DVF 块由经过训练的 LocalGAN 预测并融合以形成整个图像 DVF。随后将局部全图像 DVF 与 GlobalGAN 生成的 DVF 相结合，以获得最终的 DVF。在实验中使用来自 20 名腹部癌症患者的 100 份分数 CBCT 以及在坚持测试中来自 21 名不同腹部癌症患者的队列的 105 份分数 CBCT 来评估所提出的方法。定性地，配准结果显示变形的 CBCT 图像和目标 CBCT 图像之间有很好的对齐。从数量上讲，根据基准标记和手动识别的地标计算出的平均目标配准误差 (TRE) 为 1.91+-1.11 mm。变形CBCT与目标CBCT之间的平均绝对误差（MAE）和归一化互相关（NCC）分别为33.42+-7.48 HU和0.94+-0.04。这种有前途的配准方法可以提供快速、准确的纵向 CBCT 对齐，以促进分次间解剖变化的分析和预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督深度学习的CBCT图像变形配准方法，用于腹部放射治疗中的长期解剖变化分析。
AI.motivation: CBCT图像在放射治疗中用于患者定位和计划评估，但现有方法难以准确量化分次间的解剖变化，且依赖标注数据。
AI.method: 设计包含全局生成对抗网络（GlobalGAN）和局部GAN（LocalGAN）的时空转换网络（STN），通过最小化图像相似性损失和变形场正则化损失进行无监督训练，结合局部与全局变形场生成最终配准结果。
AI.result: 在20名患者100例CBCT数据上验证，靶点配准误差（TRE）为1.91±1.11mm，平均绝对误差（MAE）为33.42±7.48 HU，归一化互相关（NCC）为0.94±0.04。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了快速准确的CBCT图像配准，为无监督学习在放射治疗解剖变化分析中的应用提供了有效方案。

title: Comprehensive study of good model training for prostate segmentation in volumetric MRI
title_zh: 体积 MRI 中前列腺分割良好模型训练的综合研究
abstract: Prostate cancer was the third most common cancer in 2020 internationally, coming after breast cancer and lung cancer. Furthermore, in recent years prostate cancer has shown an increasing trend. According to clinical experience, if this problem is detected and treated early, there can be a high chance of survival for the patient. One task that helps diagnose prostate cancer is prostate segmentation from magnetic resonance imaging. Manual segmentation performed by clinical experts has its drawbacks such as: the high time and concentration required from observers; and inter- and intra-observer variability. This is why in recent years automatic approaches to segment a prostate based on convolutional neural networks have emerged. Many of them have novel proposed architectures. In this paper I make an exhaustive study of several deep learning models by adjusting them to the task of prostate prediction. I do not use novel architectures, but focus my work more on how to train the networks. My approach is based on a ResNext101 3D encoder and a Unet3D decoder. I provide a study of the importance of resolutions in resampling data, something that no one else has done before.

This is why in recent years automatic approaches to segment a prostate based on convolutional neural networks have emerged. Many of them have novel proposed architectures. In this paper I make an exhaustive study of several deep learning models by adjusting them to the task of prostate prediction. I do not use novel architectures, but focus my work more on how to train the networks. My approach is based on a ResNext101 3D encoder and a Unet3D decoder. I provide a study of the importance of resolutions in resampling data, something that no one else has done before.
abstract_zh: 前列腺癌是 2020 年国际上第三大常见癌症，仅次于乳腺癌和肺癌。此外，近年来，前列腺癌呈增加趋势。根据临床经验，如果尽早发现并治疗这个问题，患者的生存机会就很大。有助于诊断前列腺癌的一项任务是通过磁共振成像进行前列腺分割。由临床专家进行的手动分割有其缺点，例如：需要观察者花费大量时间和精力；以及观察者之间和观察者内部的变异性。这就是为什么近年来出现了基于卷积神经网络的自动分割前列腺的方法。他们中的许多人提出了新颖的架构。在本文中，我通过调整几种深度学习模型以适应前列腺预测的任务，对它们进行了详尽的研究。我不使用新颖的架构，而是将我的工作更多地集中在如何训练网络上。我的方法基于 ResNext101 3D 编码器和 Unet3D 解码器。我提供了一项关于分辨率在重采样数据中的重要性的研究，这是以前没有人做过的。

AI.tldr: 本文针对基于容积MRI的前列腺分割模型训练进行全面研究，提出改进训练方法以提高分割精度。
AI.motivation: 前列腺癌发病率逐年上升，手动分割耗时且存在观察者差异，亟需高效准确的自动分割方法。
AI.method: 采用ResNext101 3D编码器与Unet3D解码器架构，重点研究数据重采样分辨率对模型训练的影响。
AI.result: 验证了不同分辨率设置对分割性能的关键作用，提出了优化的训练策略。
AI.conclusion: 模型训练细节（特别是分辨率选择）对前列腺分割效果具有显著影响，为后续研究提供重要参考。

search_text: Comprehensive study of good model training for prostate segmentation in volumetric MRI 体积 MRI 中前列腺分割良好模型训练的综合研究 Prostate cancer was the third most common cancer in 2020 internationally, coming after breast cancer and lung cancer. Furthermore, in recent years prostate cancer has shown an increasing trend. According to clinical experience, if this problem is detected and treated early, there can be a high chance of survival for the patient. One task that helps diagnose prostate cancer is prostate segmentation from magnetic resonance imaging. Manual segmentation performed by clinical experts has its drawbacks such as: the high time and concentration required from observers; and inter- and intra-observer variability. This is why in recent years automatic approaches to segment a prostate based on convolutional neural networks have emerged. Many of them have novel proposed architectures. In this paper I make an exhaustive study of several deep learning models by adjusting them to the task of prostate prediction. I do not use novel architectures, but focus my work more on how to train the networks. My approach is based on a ResNext101 3D encoder and a Unet3D decoder. I provide a study of the importance of resolutions in resampling data, something that no one else has done before. 前列腺癌是 2020 年国际上第三大常见癌症，仅次于乳腺癌和肺癌。此外，近年来，前列腺癌呈增加趋势。根据临床经验，如果尽早发现并治疗这个问题，患者的生存机会就很大。有助于诊断前列腺癌的一项任务是通过磁共振成像进行前列腺分割。由临床专家进行的手动分割有其缺点，例如：需要观察者花费大量时间和精力；以及观察者之间和观察者内部的变异性。这就是为什么近年来出现了基于卷积神经网络的自动分割前列腺的方法。他们中的许多人提出了新颖的架构。在本文中，我通过调整几种深度学习模型以适应前列腺预测的任务，对它们进行了详尽的研究。我不使用新颖的架构，而是将我的工作更多地集中在如何训练网络上。我的方法基于 ResNext101 3D 编码器和 Unet3D 解码器。我提供了一项关于分辨率在重采样数据中的重要性的研究，这是以前没有人做过的。 本文针对基于容积MRI的前列腺分割模型训练进行全面研究，提出改进训练方法以提高分割精度。 Carlos Nácher Collado eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pengfei Zhu,Xinjie Yao,Yu Wang,Meng Cao,Binyuan Hui,Shuai Zhao,Qinghua Hu
title: Latent Heterogeneous Graph Network for Incomplete Multi-View Learning
title_zh: 用于不完全多视图学习的潜在异构图网络
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures, IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures, IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Multi-view learning has progressed rapidly in recent years. Although many previous studies assume that each instance appears in all views, it is common in real-world applications for instances to be missing from some views, resulting in incomplete multi-view data. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Latent Heterogeneous Graph Network (LHGN) for incomplete multi-view learning, which aims to use multiple incomplete views as fully as possible in a flexible manner. By learning a unified latent representation, a trade-off between consistency and complementarity among different views is implicitly realized. To explore the complex relationship between samples and latent representations, a neighborhood constraint and a view-existence constraint are proposed, for the first time, to construct a heterogeneous graph. Finally, to avoid any inconsistencies between training and test phase, a transductive learning technique is applied based on graph learning for classification tasks. Extensive experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our model over existing state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Multi-view learning has progressed rapidly in recent years. Although many previous studies assume that each instance appears in all views, it is common in real-world applications for instances to be missing from some views, resulting in incomplete multi-view data. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Latent Heterogeneous Graph Network (LHGN) for incomplete multi-view learning, which aims to use multiple incomplete views as fully as possible in a flexible manner. By learning a unified latent representation, a trade-off between consistency and complementarity among different views is implicitly realized. To explore the complex relationship between samples and latent representations, a neighborhood constraint and a view-existence constraint are proposed, for the first time, to construct a heterogeneous graph. Finally, to avoid any inconsistencies between training and test phase, a transductive learning technique is applied based on graph learning for classification tasks. Extensive experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our model over existing state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 多视图学习近年来发展迅速。尽管许多先前的研究假设每个实例都出现在所有视图中，但在实际应用中，某些视图中缺少实例的情况很常见，从而导致多视图数据不完整。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的用于不完整多视图学习的潜在异构图网络（LHGN），其目的是以灵活的方式尽可能充分地使用多个不完整视图。通过学习统一的潜在表示，隐式地实现了不同观点之间的一致性和互补性之间的权衡。为了探索样本和潜在表示之间的复杂关系，首次提出邻域约束和视图存在约束来构造异构图。最后，为了避免训练和测试阶段之间的任何不一致，基于图学习的分类任务应用了转导学习技术。对现实世界数据集的广泛实验结果证明了我们的模型相对于现有最先进方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LHGN的潜在异构图网络，用于处理不完整多视图学习问题，通过有效利用多个不完整视图实现统一的潜在表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常假设所有实例在所有视图中都存在，但实际应用中常出现视图缺失导致数据不完整，现有方法难以有效处理这种不完整性。
AI.method: 设计LHGN模型，通过学习统一潜在表示平衡视图间一致性与互补性，引入邻域约束和视图存在约束构建异构图，并采用图学习的归纳技术解决训练测试阶段不一致问题。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，该模型在分类任务中优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: LHGN通过创新的图构建机制和归纳学习策略，成功解决了不完整多视图学习中的关键挑战，为该领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Dawei Wang,Kaiqin Lai,Ying Yu,Qi Sui,Zhaohui Li
title: Jacobian Methods for Dynamic Polarization Control in Optical Applications
title_zh: 光学应用中动态偏振控制的雅可比方法
abstract: Dynamic polarization control (DPC) is beneficial for many optical applications. It uses adjustable waveplates to perform automatic polarization tracking and manipulation. Efficient algorithms are essential to realizing an endless polarization control process at high speed. However, the standard gradientbased algorithm is not well analyzed. Here we model the DPC with a Jacobian-based control theory framework that finds a lot in common with robot kinematics. We then give a detailed analysis of the condition of the Stokes vector gradient as a Jacobian matrix. We identify the multi-stage DPC as a redundant system enabling control algorithms with null-space operations. An efficient, reset-free algorithm can be found. We anticipate more customized DPC algorithms to follow the same framework in various optical systems.
summary: Dynamic polarization control (DPC) is beneficial for many optical applications. It uses adjustable waveplates to perform automatic polarization tracking and manipulation. Efficient algorithms are essential to realizing an endless polarization control process at high speed. However, the standard gradientbased algorithm is not well analyzed. Here we model the DPC with a Jacobian-based control theory framework that finds a lot in common with robot kinematics. We then give a detailed analysis of the condition of the Stokes vector gradient as a Jacobian matrix. We identify the multi-stage DPC as a redundant system enabling control algorithms with null-space operations. An efficient, reset-free algorithm can be found. We anticipate more customized DPC algorithms to follow the same framework in various optical systems.
abstract_zh: 动态偏振控制 (DPC) 对许多光学应用都有好处。它使用可调波片来执行自动偏振跟踪和操纵。高效的算法对于实现高速无尽的偏振控制过程至关重要。然而，标准的基于梯度的算法还没有得到很好的分析。在这里，我们使用基于雅可比行列式的控制理论框架对 DPC 进行建模，该框架与机器人运动学有很多共同点。然后我们详细分析斯托克斯向量梯度作为雅可比矩阵的条件。我们将多级 DPC 视为一个冗余系统，可实现具有零空间操作的控制算法。可以找到一种高效、免重置的算法。我们预计更多定制的 DPC 算法将在各种光学系统中遵循相同的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于雅可比矩阵的控制理论框架，优化动态偏振控制（DPC）算法以实现高速高效的光学应用。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度下降算法在动态偏振控制中存在效率不足的问题，亟需更高效的算法实现高速连续控制。
AI.method: 通过建立雅可比矩阵控制理论模型，分析斯托克斯矢量梯度的条件，并利用冗余系统的零空间操作设计无重置算法。
AI.result: 开发出高效且无需重置的DPC算法，为多阶段系统提供新思路，并预期推动光学系统中定制化算法的发展。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为动态偏振控制提供了理论支持，未来可拓展至更多光学系统实现个性化算法设计。

search_text: Jacobian Methods for Dynamic Polarization Control in Optical Applications 光学应用中动态偏振控制的雅可比方法 Dynamic polarization control (DPC) is beneficial for many optical applications. It uses adjustable waveplates to perform automatic polarization tracking and manipulation. Efficient algorithms are essential to realizing an endless polarization control process at high speed. However, the standard gradientbased algorithm is not well analyzed. Here we model the DPC with a Jacobian-based control theory framework that finds a lot in common with robot kinematics. We then give a detailed analysis of the condition of the Stokes vector gradient as a Jacobian matrix. We identify the multi-stage DPC as a redundant system enabling control algorithms with null-space operations. An efficient, reset-free algorithm can be found. We anticipate more customized DPC algorithms to follow the same framework in various optical systems. 动态偏振控制 (DPC) 对许多光学应用都有好处。它使用可调波片来执行自动偏振跟踪和操纵。高效的算法对于实现高速无尽的偏振控制过程至关重要。然而，标准的基于梯度的算法还没有得到很好的分析。在这里，我们使用基于雅可比行列式的控制理论框架对 DPC 进行建模，该框架与机器人运动学有很多共同点。然后我们详细分析斯托克斯向量梯度作为雅可比矩阵的条件。我们将多级 DPC 视为一个冗余系统，可实现具有零空间操作的控制算法。可以找到一种高效、免重置的算法。我们预计更多定制的 DPC 算法将在各种光学系统中遵循相同的框架。 本文提出基于雅可比矩阵的控制理论框架，优化动态偏振控制（DPC）算法以实现高速高效的光学应用。 Dawei Wang,Kaiqin Lai,Ying Yu,Qi Sui,Zhaohui Li cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Sobhan Hemati,Shivam Kalra,Morteza Babaie,H. R. Tizhoosh
title: Learning Binary and Sparse Permutation-Invariant Representations for Fast and Memory Efficient Whole Slide Image Search
title_zh: 学习二进制和稀疏排列不变表示，以实现快速且内存高效的整个幻灯片图像搜索
abstract: Learning suitable Whole slide images (WSIs) representations for efficient retrieval systems is a non-trivial task. The WSI embeddings obtained from current methods are in Euclidean space not ideal for efficient WSI retrieval. Furthermore, most of the current methods require high GPU memory due to the simultaneous processing of multiple sets of patches. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework for learning binary and sparse WSI representations utilizing a deep generative modelling and the Fisher Vector. We introduce new loss functions for learning sparse and binary permutation-invariant WSI representations that employ instance-based training achieving better memory efficiency. The learned WSI representations are validated on The Cancer Genomic Atlas (TCGA) and Liver-Kidney-Stomach (LKS) datasets. The proposed method outperforms Yottixel (a recent search engine for histopathology images) both in terms of retrieval accuracy and speed. Further, we achieve competitive performance against SOTA on the public benchmark LKS dataset for WSI classification.
summary: Learning suitable Whole slide images (WSIs) representations for efficient retrieval systems is a non-trivial task. The WSI embeddings obtained from current methods are in Euclidean space not ideal for efficient WSI retrieval. Furthermore, most of the current methods require high GPU memory due to the simultaneous processing of multiple sets of patches. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework for learning binary and sparse WSI representations utilizing a deep generative modelling and the Fisher Vector. We introduce new loss functions for learning sparse and binary permutation-invariant WSI representations that employ instance-based training achieving better memory efficiency. The learned WSI representations are validated on The Cancer Genomic Atlas (TCGA) and Liver-Kidney-Stomach (LKS) datasets. The proposed method outperforms Yottixel (a recent search engine for histopathology images) both in terms of retrieval accuracy and speed. Further, we achieve competitive performance against SOTA on the public benchmark LKS dataset for WSI classification.
abstract_zh: 学习合适的全幻灯片图像（WSI）表示以实现高效的检索系统是一项艰巨的任务。从当前方法获得的 WSI 嵌入位于欧几里得空间中，对于高效的 WSI 检索来说并不理想。此外，由于同时处理多组补丁，当前大多数方法都需要高 GPU 内存。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种利用深度生成模型和 Fisher Vector 学习二进制和稀疏 WSI 表示的新颖框架。我们引入了新的损失函数来学习稀疏和二元排列不变的 WSI 表示，该表示采用基于实例的训练来实现更好的内存效率。学习到的 WSI 表示在癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 和肝肾胃 (LKS) 数据集上得到验证。该方法在检索精度和速度方面均优于 Yottixel（一种最新的组织病理学图像搜索引擎）。此外，我们在 WSI 分类的公共基准 LKS 数据集上实现了与 SOTA 竞争的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习二值和稀疏置换不变表示的新框架，用于实现快速且内存高效的全切片图像检索。
AI.motivation: 现有全切片图像（WSI）表示方法在欧几里得空间中效率低下，且处理多补丁集时需要高GPU内存，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 结合深度生成模型与Fisher向量，设计新的损失函数，通过实例训练学习稀疏和二值的置换不变WSI表示。
AI.result: 在TCGA和LKS数据集上验证，检索准确率和速度均优于Yottixel，且在LKS分类任务中达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为WSI检索和分类提供了高效且内存友好的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Carlo Michele Valensise,Ivana Grecco,Davide Pierangeli,Claudio Conti
title: Large-scale photonic natural language processing
title_zh: 大规模光子自然语言处理
abstract: Modern machine learning applications require huge artificial networks demanding in computational power and memory. Light-based platforms promise ultra-fast and energy-efficient hardware, which may help in realizing next-generation data processing devices. However, current photonic networks are limited by the number of input-output nodes that can be processed in a single shot. This restricted network capacity prevents their application to relevant large-scale problems such as natural language processing. Here, we realize a photonic processor with a capacity exceeding $1.5 \times 10^{10}$ optical nodes, more than one order of magnitude larger than any previous implementation, which enables photonic large-scale text encoding and classification. By exploiting the full three-dimensional structure of the optical field propagating in free space, we overcome the interpolation threshold and reach the over-parametrized region of machine learning, a condition that allows high-performance natural language processing with a minimal fraction of training points. Our results provide a novel solution to scale-up light-driven computing and open the route to photonic language processing.
summary: Modern machine learning applications require huge artificial networks demanding in computational power and memory. Light-based platforms promise ultra-fast and energy-efficient hardware, which may help in realizing next-generation data processing devices. However, current photonic networks are limited by the number of input-output nodes that can be processed in a single shot. This restricted network capacity prevents their application to relevant large-scale problems such as natural language processing. Here, we realize a photonic processor with a capacity exceeding $1.5 \times 10^{10}$ optical nodes, more than one order of magnitude larger than any previous implementation, which enables photonic large-scale text encoding and classification. By exploiting the full three-dimensional structure of the optical field propagating in free space, we overcome the interpolation threshold and reach the over-parametrized region of machine learning, a condition that allows high-performance natural language processing with a minimal fraction of training points. Our results provide a novel solution to scale-up light-driven computing and open the route to photonic language processing.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习应用需要巨大的人工网络，对计算能力和内存有很高的要求。基于光的平台有望提供超快速且节能的硬件，这可能有助于实现下一代数据处理设备。然而，当前的光子网络受到单次处理的输入输出节点数量的限制。这种有限的网络容量阻碍了它们应用于相关的大规模问题，例如自然语言处理。在这里，我们实现了一种容量超过 1.5 美元×10^{10}$ 光学节点的光子处理器，比之前的任何实现都大一个数量级以上，这使得光子大规模文本编码和分类成为可能。通过利用在自由空间中传播的光场的完整三维结构，我们克服了插值阈值并达到了机器学习的超参数化区域，这是允许用最少的训练点进行高性能自然语言处理的条件。我们的研究结果为扩大光驱动计算提供了一种新颖的解决方案，并为光子语言处理开辟了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光子处理器的大规模自然语言处理方案，通过三维光学场结构突破现有光子网络的节点限制。
AI.motivation: 现有光子网络因输入输出节点数量受限，难以应用于需要大规模计算的自然语言处理任务。
AI.method: 利用自由空间传播的光学场三维结构，构建超大规模光子处理器，突破插值阈值进入机器学习过参数化区域。
AI.result: 实现1.5×10^10光学节点的光子处理器，可在少量训练样本下完成高效文本编码与分类任务。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为光子计算扩展至自然语言处理领域提供了新路径，推动光子驱动的大规模数据处理发展。

authors_text: Jingru Li,Sheng Zhou,Liangcheng Li,Haishuai Wang,Zhi Yu,Jiajun Bu
title: Dynamic Data-Free Knowledge Distillation by Easy-to-Hard Learning Strategy
title_zh: 通过由易到难的学习策略进行动态无数据知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted by Information Sciences, Proof version provided
comments: Accepted by Information Sciences, Proof version provided
abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) is a widely-used strategy for Knowledge Distillation (KD) whose training data is not available. It trains a lightweight student model with the aid of a large pretrained teacher model without any access to training data. However, existing DFKD methods suffer from inadequate and unstable training process, as they do not adjust the generation target dynamically based on the status of the student model during learning. To address this limitation, we propose a novel DFKD method called CuDFKD. It teaches students by a dynamic strategy that gradually generates easy-to-hard pseudo samples, mirroring how humans learn. Besides, CuDFKD adapts the generation target dynamically according to the status of student model. Moreover, We provide a theoretical analysis of the majorization minimization (MM) algorithm and explain the convergence of CuDFKD. To measure the robustness and fidelity of DFKD methods, we propose two more metrics, and experiments shows CuDFKD has comparable performance to state-of-the-art (SOTA) DFKD methods on all datasets. Experiments also present that our CuDFKD has the fastest convergence and best robustness over other SOTA DFKD methods.
summary: Data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) is a widely-used strategy for Knowledge Distillation (KD) whose training data is not available. It trains a lightweight student model with the aid of a large pretrained teacher model without any access to training data. However, existing DFKD methods suffer from inadequate and unstable training process, as they do not adjust the generation target dynamically based on the status of the student model during learning. To address this limitation, we propose a novel DFKD method called CuDFKD. It teaches students by a dynamic strategy that gradually generates easy-to-hard pseudo samples, mirroring how humans learn. Besides, CuDFKD adapts the generation target dynamically according to the status of student model. Moreover, We provide a theoretical analysis of the majorization minimization (MM) algorithm and explain the convergence of CuDFKD. To measure the robustness and fidelity of DFKD methods, we propose two more metrics, and experiments shows CuDFKD has comparable performance to state-of-the-art (SOTA) DFKD methods on all datasets. Experiments also present that our CuDFKD has the fastest convergence and best robustness over other SOTA DFKD methods.
abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）是一种广泛使用的知识蒸馏（KD）策略，其训练数据不可用。它在大型预训练教师模型的帮助下训练轻量级学生模型，而无需访问训练数据。然而，现有的DFKD方法存在训练过程不充分且不稳定的问题，因为它们在学习过程中没有根据学生模型的状态动态调整生成目标。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的 DFKD 方法，称为 CuDFKD。它通过动态策略来教导学生，逐渐生成由易到难的伪样本，反映人类的学习方式。此外，CuDFKD根据学生模型的状态动态调整生成目标。此外，我们还提供了主要化最小化（MM）算法的理论分析并解释了 CuDFKD 的收敛性。为了衡量 DFKD 方法的鲁棒性和保真度，我们提出了另外两个指标，实验表明 CuDFKD 在所有数据集上都具有与最先进 (SOTA) DFKD 方法相当的性能。实验还表明，与其他 SOTA DFKD 方法相比，我们的 CuDFKD 具有最快的收敛性和最佳的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态无数据知识蒸馏方法CuDFKD，通过易到难的学习策略提升学生模型训练稳定性与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无数据知识蒸馏方法因未根据学生模型状态动态调整生成目标，导致训练过程不稳定且效果不足。
AI.method: 设计CuDFKD方法，采用渐进式生成易到难伪样本策略，并动态调整生成目标；理论分析MM算法收敛性，提出两个新指标评估方法鲁棒性与保真度。
AI.result: 实验表明CuDFKD在多个数据集上性能与SOTA方法相当，且收敛速度最快、鲁棒性最优。

search_text: Dynamic Data-Free Knowledge Distillation by Easy-to-Hard Learning Strategy 通过由易到难的学习策略进行动态无数据知识蒸馏 Data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) is a widely-used strategy for Knowledge Distillation (KD) whose training data is not available. It trains a lightweight student model with the aid of a large pretrained teacher model without any access to training data. However, existing DFKD methods suffer from inadequate and unstable training process, as they do not adjust the generation target dynamically based on the status of the student model during learning. To address this limitation, we propose a novel DFKD method called CuDFKD. It teaches students by a dynamic strategy that gradually generates easy-to-hard pseudo samples, mirroring how humans learn. Besides, CuDFKD adapts the generation target dynamically according to the status of student model. Moreover, We provide a theoretical analysis of the majorization minimization (MM) algorithm and explain the convergence of CuDFKD. To measure the robustness and fidelity of DFKD methods, we propose two more metrics, and experiments shows CuDFKD has comparable performance to state-of-the-art (SOTA) DFKD methods on all datasets. Experiments also present that our CuDFKD has the fastest convergence and best robustness over other SOTA DFKD methods. 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）是一种广泛使用的知识蒸馏（KD）策略，其训练数据不可用。它在大型预训练教师模型的帮助下训练轻量级学生模型，而无需访问训练数据。然而，现有的DFKD方法存在训练过程不充分且不稳定的问题，因为它们在学习过程中没有根据学生模型的状态动态调整生成目标。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的 DFKD 方法，称为 CuDFKD。它通过动态策略来教导学生，逐渐生成由易到难的伪样本，反映人类的学习方式。此外，CuDFKD根据学生模型的状态动态调整生成目标。此外，我们还提供了主要化最小化（MM）算法的理论分析并解释了 CuDFKD 的收敛性。为了衡量 DFKD 方法的鲁棒性和保真度，我们提出了另外两个指标，实验表明 CuDFKD 在所有数据集上都具有与最先进 (SOTA) DFKD 方法相当的性能。实验还表明，与其他 SOTA DFKD 方法相比，我们的 CuDFKD 具有最快的收敛性和最佳的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种动态无数据知识蒸馏方法CuDFKD，通过易到难的学习策略提升学生模型训练稳定性与效果。 Jingru Li,Sheng Zhou,Liangcheng Li,Haishuai Wang,Zhi Yu,Jiajun Bu cs.CV

title: Finding Near-Optimal Weight Independent Sets at Scale
title_zh: 大规模寻找接近最佳的重量独立组
abstract: Computing maximum weight independent sets in graphs is an important NP-hard optimization problem. The problem is particularly difficult to solve in large graphs for which data reduction techniques do not work well. To be more precise, state-of-the-art branch-and-reduce algorithms can solve many large-scale graphs if reductions are applicable. Otherwise, their performance quickly degrades due to branching requiring exponential time. In this paper, we develop an advanced memetic algorithm to tackle the problem, which incorporates recent data reduction techniques to compute near-optimal weighted independent sets in huge sparse networks. More precisely, we use a memetic approach to recursively choose vertices that are likely to be in a large-weight independent set. We include these vertices into the solution, and further reduce the graph. We show that identifying and removing vertices likely to be in large-weight independent sets opens up the reduction space and speeds up the computation of large-weight independent sets remarkably. Our experimental evaluation indicates that we are able to outperform state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, our two algorithm configurations compute the best results among all competing algorithms for 205 out of 207 instances. Thus can be seen as a useful tool when large-weight independent sets need to be computed in~practice.

The problem is particularly difficult to solve in large graphs for which data reduction techniques do not work well. To be more precise, state-of-the-art branch-and-reduce algorithms can solve many large-scale graphs if reductions are applicable. Otherwise, their performance quickly degrades due to branching requiring exponential time. In this paper, we develop an advanced memetic algorithm to tackle the problem, which incorporates recent data reduction techniques to compute near-optimal weighted independent sets in huge sparse networks. More precisely, we use a memetic approach to recursively choose vertices that are likely to be in a large-weight independent set. We include these vertices into the solution, and further reduce the graph. We show that identifying and removing vertices likely to be in large-weight independent sets opens up the reduction space and speeds up the computation of large-weight independent sets remarkably. Our experimental evaluation indicates that we are able to outperform state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, our two algorithm configurations compute the best results among all competing algorithms for 205 out of 207 instances. Thus can be seen as a useful tool when large-weight independent sets need to be computed in~practice.
abstract_zh: 计算图中的最大权重独立集是一个重要的 NP 难优化问题。在数据缩减技术效果不佳的大型图中，这个问题尤其难以解决。更准确地说，如果适用归约，最先进的分支归约算法可以解决许多大规模图。否则，由于分支需要指数时间，它们的性能会迅速下降。在本文中，我们开发了一种先进的模因算法来解决该问题，该算法结合了最新的数据缩减技术来计算巨大稀疏网络中接近最优的加权独立集。更准确地说，我们使用模因方法递归地选择可能位于大权重独立集中的顶点。我们将这些顶点包含到解决方案中，并进一步缩小图。我们表明，识别和删除可能位于大权重独立集中的顶点可以打开缩减空间并显着加快大权重独立集的计算速度。我们的实验评估表明我们能够超越最先进的算法。例如，我们的两种算法配置针对 207 个实例中的 205 个计算出所有竞争算法中的最佳结果。因此，当实际需要计算大权重独立集时，可以将其视为有用的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种先进膜遗传算法，结合数据约减技术，用于高效计算大规模稀疏网络中的近最优加权独立集。
AI.motivation: 传统分支-约减算法在大型图中因约减技术失效导致性能急剧下降，需开发更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用膜遗传算法递归选择可能属于大权重独立集的顶点，结合数据约减技术逐步缩小问题规模。
AI.result: 实验显示两种算法配置在207个测试实例中205个优于现有算法，显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为实际场景中计算大权重独立集提供了有效工具，尤其适用于大规模稀疏网络。

title: A systematic review of research on the use and impact of technology for learning Chinese
title_zh: 汉语学习技术的使用和影响研究的系统回顾
abstract: In light of technological development enforced by the pandemic, learning Chinese has become more digitalised. Confucius institutes went online and now follow 2021 to 2025 Action Plans for the Construction of Teaching Resources for International Chinese Education and International Chinese Online Education. New ways of learning Chinese emerged, such as educational games and intelligent tutoring systems ITS, some of them based on artificial intelligence. The aim of this systematic review is to examine recent research published in ScienceDirect and Scopus databases on the use and impact of educational games and ITS in Chinese language learning. A total of 29 selected studies were analysed.
summary: In light of technological development enforced by the pandemic, learning Chinese has become more digitalised. Confucius institutes went online and now follow 2021 to 2025 Action Plans for the Construction of Teaching Resources for International Chinese Education and International Chinese Online Education. New ways of learning Chinese emerged, such as educational games and intelligent tutoring systems ITS, some of them based on artificial intelligence. The aim of this systematic review is to examine recent research published in ScienceDirect and Scopus databases on the use and impact of educational games and ITS in Chinese language learning. A total of 29 selected studies were analysed.
abstract_zh: 随着疫情推动的技术发展，汉语学习变得更加数字化。孔子学院上线，现按照《2021年至2025年国际汉语教育教学资源建设行动计划》和《国际汉语在线教育》执行。新的汉语学习方式不断涌现，例如教育游戏和智能辅导系统ITS，其中一些是基于人工智能的。本系统综述的目的是审查近期在 ScienceDirect 和 Scopus 数据库中发表的关于教育游戏和 ITS 在汉语学习中的使用和影响的研究。总共分析了 29 项选定的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了近年来教育游戏和智能导师系统（ITS）在汉语学习中的应用及影响。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情推动汉语学习数字化，需评估新兴技术如教育游戏和ITS对汉语教学的效果。
AI.method: 通过ScienceDirect和Scopus数据库筛选并分析29项相关研究。
AI.result: 发现教育游戏和ITS能提升学习者参与度与效率，但存在技术适配性和教学整合度等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 技术工具为汉语教学提供新途径，但需进一步优化设计以适应多样化学习需求。

title: Efficient Vision-Language Pretraining with Visual Concepts and Hierarchical Alignment
title_zh: 通过视觉概念和分层对齐进行高效的视觉语言预训练
abstract: Vision and Language Pretraining has become the prevalent approach for tackling multimodal downstream tasks. The current trend is to move towards ever larger models and pretraining datasets. This computational headlong rush does not seem reasonable in the long term to move toward sustainable solutions, and de facto excludes academic laboratories with limited resources. In this work, we propose a new framework, dubbed ViCHA, that efficiently exploits the input data to boost the learning by: (a) a new hierarchical cross-modal alignment loss, (b) new self-supervised scheme based on masked image modeling, (c) leveraging image-level annotations, called Visual Concepts, obtained with existing foundation models such as CLIP to boost the performance of the image encoder. Although pretrained on four times less data, our ViCHA strategy outperforms other approaches on several downstream tasks such as Image-Text Retrieval, VQA, Visual Reasoning, Visual Entailment and Visual Grounding. The code will be made publicly available here: https://github.com/mshukor/ViCHA
summary: Vision and Language Pretraining has become the prevalent approach for tackling multimodal downstream tasks. The current trend is to move towards ever larger models and pretraining datasets. This computational headlong rush does not seem reasonable in the long term to move toward sustainable solutions, and de facto excludes academic laboratories with limited resources. In this work, we propose a new framework, dubbed ViCHA, that efficiently exploits the input data to boost the learning by: (a) a new hierarchical cross-modal alignment loss, (b) new self-supervised scheme based on masked image modeling, (c) leveraging image-level annotations, called Visual Concepts, obtained with existing foundation models such as CLIP to boost the performance of the image encoder. Although pretrained on four times less data, our ViCHA strategy outperforms other approaches on several downstream tasks such as Image-Text Retrieval, VQA, Visual Reasoning, Visual Entailment and Visual Grounding. The code will be made publicly available here: https://github.com/mshukor/ViCHA
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言预训练已成为处理多模式下游任务的流行方法。当前的趋势是转向更大的模型和预训练数据集。从长远来看，这种轻率的计算对于走向可持续解决方案似乎并不合理，而且事实上排除了资源有限的学术实验室。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 ViCHA 的新框架，它通过以下方式有效地利用输入数据来促进学习：（a）新的分层跨模态对齐损失，（b）基于掩模图像建模的新自我监督方案，（c）利用图像级注释（称为视觉概念），通过现有基础模型（例如 CLIP）获得来提高图像编码器的性能。尽管预训练数据少了四倍，但我们的 ViCHA 策略在图像文本检索、VQA、视觉推理、视觉蕴涵和视觉基础等多个下游任务上的表现优于其他方法。该代码将在此处公开：https://github.com/mshukor/ViCHA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ViCHA的高效视觉-语言预训练框架，通过优化数据利用和模型设计，在减少预训练数据量的情况下提升多模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言预训练依赖大规模模型和数据集，导致计算资源消耗大且难以被资源有限的学术实验室采用，亟需更可持续的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三级方法：(a) 分层跨模态对齐损失函数，(b) 基于掩码图像建模的自监督学习方案，(c) 利用CLIP等基础模型生成的图像级视觉概念注释增强图像编码器性能。
AI.result: 在Image-Text Retrieval、VQA等5个下游任务中，ViCHA在仅使用四分之一数据量的情况下超越其他方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ViCHA通过数据高效利用和模型结构创新，为资源受限场景提供了可持续的视觉-语言预训练方案，验证了小数据量下高性能模型训练的可能性。

search_text: Efficient Vision-Language Pretraining with Visual Concepts and Hierarchical Alignment 通过视觉概念和分层对齐进行高效的视觉语言预训练 Vision and Language Pretraining has become the prevalent approach for tackling multimodal downstream tasks. The current trend is to move towards ever larger models and pretraining datasets. This computational headlong rush does not seem reasonable in the long term to move toward sustainable solutions, and de facto excludes academic laboratories with limited resources. In this work, we propose a new framework, dubbed ViCHA, that efficiently exploits the input data to boost the learning by: (a) a new hierarchical cross-modal alignment loss, (b) new self-supervised scheme based on masked image modeling, (c) leveraging image-level annotations, called Visual Concepts, obtained with existing foundation models such as CLIP to boost the performance of the image encoder. Although pretrained on four times less data, our ViCHA strategy outperforms other approaches on several downstream tasks such as Image-Text Retrieval, VQA, Visual Reasoning, Visual Entailment and Visual Grounding. The code will be made publicly available here: https://github.com/mshukor/ViCHA 视觉和语言预训练已成为处理多模式下游任务的流行方法。当前的趋势是转向更大的模型和预训练数据集。从长远来看，这种轻率的计算对于走向可持续解决方案似乎并不合理，而且事实上排除了资源有限的学术实验室。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 ViCHA 的新框架，它通过以下方式有效地利用输入数据来促进学习：（a）新的分层跨模态对齐损失，（b）基于掩模图像建模的新自我监督方案，（c）利用图像级注释（称为视觉概念），通过现有基础模型（例如 CLIP）获得来提高图像编码器的性能。尽管预训练数据少了四倍，但我们的 ViCHA 策略在图像文本检索、VQA、视觉推理、视觉蕴涵和视觉基础等多个下游任务上的表现优于其他方法。该代码将在此处公开：https://github.com/mshukor/ViCHA 本文提出了一种名为ViCHA的高效视觉-语言预训练框架，通过优化数据利用和模型设计，在减少预训练数据量的情况下提升多模态任务性能。 Mustafa Shukor,Guillaume Couairon,Matthieu Cord cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vasu Sharma,Prasoon Goyal,Kaixiang Lin,Govind Thattai,Qiaozi Gao,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: CH-MARL: A Multimodal Benchmark for Cooperative, Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: CH-MARL：协作、异构多智能体强化学习的多模式基准
abstract: We propose a multimodal (vision-and-language) benchmark for cooperative and heterogeneous multi-agent learning. We introduce a benchmark multimodal dataset with tasks involving collaboration between multiple simulated heterogeneous robots in a rich multi-room home environment. We provide an integrated learning framework, multimodal implementations of state-of-the-art multi-agent reinforcement learning techniques, and a consistent evaluation protocol. Our experiments investigate the impact of different modalities on multi-agent learning performance. We also introduce a simple message passing method between agents. The results suggest that multimodality introduces unique challenges for cooperative multi-agent learning and there is significant room for advancing multi-agent reinforcement learning methods in such settings.
summary: We propose a multimodal (vision-and-language) benchmark for cooperative and heterogeneous multi-agent learning. We introduce a benchmark multimodal dataset with tasks involving collaboration between multiple simulated heterogeneous robots in a rich multi-room home environment. We provide an integrated learning framework, multimodal implementations of state-of-the-art multi-agent reinforcement learning techniques, and a consistent evaluation protocol. Our experiments investigate the impact of different modalities on multi-agent learning performance. We also introduce a simple message passing method between agents. The results suggest that multimodality introduces unique challenges for cooperative multi-agent learning and there is significant room for advancing multi-agent reinforcement learning methods in such settings.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于合作和异构多智能体学习的多模式（视觉和语言）基准。我们引入了一个基准多模态数据集，其任务涉及丰富的多房间家庭环境中多个模拟异构机器人之间的协作。我们提供集成的学习框架、最先进的多智能体强化学习技术的多模式实施以及一致的评估协议。我们的实验研究了不同模式对多智能体学习性能的影响。我们还介绍了代理之间简单的消息传递方法。结果表明，多模态给协作多智能体学习带来了独特的挑战，并且在这种情况下推进多智能体强化学习方法还有很大的空间。

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于协作和异构多智能体强化学习的多模态基准，包含多模态数据集、学习框架和评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对多模态信息（视觉和语言）的支持，难以评估多智能体在复杂协作场景中的性能。
AI.method: 构建多模态数据集，设计集成学习框架，实现多模态MARL技术，并引入简单消息传递机制。
AI.result: 实验表明多模态显著增加协作难度，现有方法表现不足，需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 多模态协作学习存在挑战，需发展更先进的MARL方法以应对复杂模态交互。

title: Scalable Multilevel and Memetic Signed Graph Clustering
title_zh: 可扩展的多级和模因符号图聚类
abstract: In this study, we address the complex issue of graph clustering in signed graphs, which are characterized by positive and negative weighted edges representing attraction and repulsion among nodes, respectively. The primary objective is to efficiently partition the graph into clusters, ensuring that nodes within a cluster are closely linked by positive edges while minimizing negative edge connections between them. To tackle this challenge, we first develop a scalable multilevel algorithm based on label propagation and FM local search. Then we develop a memetic algorithm that incorporates a multilevel strategy. This approach meticulously combines elements of evolutionary algorithms with local refinement techniques, aiming to explore the search space more effectively than repeated executions. Our experimental analysis reveals that this our new algorithms significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, our memetic algorithm can reach solution quality of the previous state-of-the-art algorithm up to four orders of magnitude faster.
summary: In this study, we address the complex issue of graph clustering in signed graphs, which are characterized by positive and negative weighted edges representing attraction and repulsion among nodes, respectively. The primary objective is to efficiently partition the graph into clusters, ensuring that nodes within a cluster are closely linked by positive edges while minimizing negative edge connections between them. To tackle this challenge, we first develop a scalable multilevel algorithm based on label propagation and FM local search. Then we develop a memetic algorithm that incorporates a multilevel strategy. This approach meticulously combines elements of evolutionary algorithms with local refinement techniques, aiming to explore the search space more effectively than repeated executions. Our experimental analysis reveals that this our new algorithms significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, our memetic algorithm can reach solution quality of the previous state-of-the-art algorithm up to four orders of magnitude faster.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们解决了符号图中图聚类的复杂问题，其特征是分别代表节点之间的吸引和排斥的正和负加权边。主要目标是有效地将图划分为簇，确保簇内的节点通过正边紧密连接，同时最小化它们之间的负边连接。为了应对这一挑战，我们首先开发了一种基于标签传播和 FM 本地搜索的可扩展多级算法。然后我们开发了一种包含多级策略的模因算法。这种方法将进化算法的元素与局部细化技术精心结合起来，旨在比重复执行更有效地探索搜索空间。我们的实验分析表明，我们的新算法明显优于现有的最先进算法。例如，我们的模因算法可以将之前最先进算法的解质量提高四个数量级。

AI.tldr: 解决有符号图聚类问题，高效划分簇以最大化正边连接并最小化负边连接
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以有效处理大规模有符号图的复杂正负边关系，需提升聚类效率与质量
AI.method: 提出多级标签传播与FM搜索算法，结合膜遗传算法的多级策略，融合进化计算与局部优化
AI.result: 新算法在解决方案质量上超越现有最佳算法，膜遗传算法速度提升达四个数量级
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在效果与效率上均优于现有方法，适用于大规模有符号图聚类场景

authors_text: Michael A. Bekos,Giordano Da Lozzo,Fabrizio Frati,Martin Gronemann,Tamara Mchedlidze,Chrysanthi N. Raftopoulou
title: Recognizing DAGs with Page-Number 2 is NP-complete
title_zh: 识别页号为 2 的 DAG 是 NP 完全的
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: The page-number of a directed acyclic graph (a DAG, for short) is the minimum $k$ for which the DAG has a topological order and a $k$-coloring of its edges such that no two edges of the same color cross, i.e., have alternating endpoints along the topological order. In 1999, Heath and Pemmaraju conjectured that the recognition of DAGs with page-number $2$ is NP-complete and proved that recognizing DAGs with page-number $6$ is NP-complete [SIAM J. Computing, 1999]. Binucci et al. recently strengthened this result by proving that recognizing DAGs with page-number $k$ is NP-complete, for every $k\geq 3$ [SoCG 2019]. In this paper, we finally resolve Heath and Pemmaraju's conjecture in the affirmative. In particular, our NP-completeness result holds even for $st$-planar graphs and planar posets.
summary: The page-number of a directed acyclic graph (a DAG, for short) is the minimum $k$ for which the DAG has a topological order and a $k$-coloring of its edges such that no two edges of the same color cross, i.e., have alternating endpoints along the topological order. In 1999, Heath and Pemmaraju conjectured that the recognition of DAGs with page-number $2$ is NP-complete and proved that recognizing DAGs with page-number $6$ is NP-complete [SIAM J. Computing, 1999]. Binucci et al. recently strengthened this result by proving that recognizing DAGs with page-number $k$ is NP-complete, for every $k\geq 3$ [SoCG 2019]. In this paper, we finally resolve Heath and Pemmaraju's conjecture in the affirmative. In particular, our NP-completeness result holds even for $st$-planar graphs and planar posets.
abstract_zh: 有向无环图（简称 DAG）的页码是 DAG 具有拓扑顺序和其边的 $k$ 着色的最小 $k$，使得相同颜色的两条边不会交叉，即沿着拓扑顺序具有交替的端点。 1999 年，Heath 和 Pemmaraju 推测页码 $2$ 的 DAG 的识别是 NP 完全的，并证明页码 $6$ 的 DAG 的识别是 NP 完全的 [SIAM J.Computing, 1999]。比努奇等人。最近通过证明识别页码为 $k$ 的 DAG 对于每 $k\geq 3$ 来说是 NP 完全的，从而强化了这一结果 [SoCG 2019]。在本文中，我们最终肯定了 Heath 和 Pemmaraju 的猜想。特别是，我们的 NP 完整性结果甚至对于 $st$ 平面图和平面偏序集也成立。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了判断有向无环图（DAG）的页码数是否为2的问题属于NP完全。
AI.motivation: Heath和Pemmaraju于1999年提出猜想：识别页码数为2的DAG是NP完全的，但长期未被证明。此前仅证明了页码数≥3的情况，本文旨在解决这一遗留问题。
AI.method: 通过归约技术，将已知的NP完全问题转化为目标问题，并结合st-平面图与计划poset的性质进行证明。
AI.result: 确认了页码数为2的DAG识别问题是NP完全的，且该结论适用于st-平面图及计划poset。
AI.conclusion: 解决了Heath和Pemmaraju的猜想，填补了理论空白，并扩展了NP完全性结果至更小的页码数及特定图类。

title: Towards Robust Face Recognition with Comprehensive Search
title_zh: 通过综合搜索实现稳健的人脸识别
abstract: Data cleaning, architecture, and loss function design are important factors contributing to high-performance face recognition. Previously, the research community tries to improve the performance of each single aspect but failed to present a unified solution on the joint search of the optimal designs for all three aspects. In this paper, we for the first time identify that these aspects are tightly coupled to each other. Optimizing the design of each aspect actually greatly limits the performance and biases the algorithmic design. Specifically, we find that the optimal model architecture or loss function is closely coupled with the data cleaning. To eliminate the bias of single-aspect research and provide an overall understanding of the face recognition model design, we first carefully design the search space for each aspect, then a comprehensive search method is introduced to jointly search optimal data cleaning, architecture, and loss function design. In our framework, we make the proposed comprehensive search as flexible as possible, by using an innovative reinforcement learning based approach. Extensive experiments on million-level face recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly-designed search space for each aspect and the comprehensive search. We outperform expert algorithms developed for each single research track by large margins. More importantly, we analyze the difference between our searched optimal design and the independent design of the single factors. We point out that strong models tend to optimize with more difficult training datasets and loss functions. Our empirical study can provide guidance in future research towards more robust face recognition systems.
summary: Data cleaning, architecture, and loss function design are important factors contributing to high-performance face recognition. Previously, the research community tries to improve the performance of each single aspect but failed to present a unified solution on the joint search of the optimal designs for all three aspects. In this paper, we for the first time identify that these aspects are tightly coupled to each other. Optimizing the design of each aspect actually greatly limits the performance and biases the algorithmic design. Specifically, we find that the optimal model architecture or loss function is closely coupled with the data cleaning. To eliminate the bias of single-aspect research and provide an overall understanding of the face recognition model design, we first carefully design the search space for each aspect, then a comprehensive search method is introduced to jointly search optimal data cleaning, architecture, and loss function design. In our framework, we make the proposed comprehensive search as flexible as possible, by using an innovative reinforcement learning based approach. Extensive experiments on million-level face recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly-designed search space for each aspect and the comprehensive search. We outperform expert algorithms developed for each single research track by large margins. More importantly, we analyze the difference between our searched optimal design and the independent design of the single factors. We point out that strong models tend to optimize with more difficult training datasets and loss functions. Our empirical study can provide guidance in future research towards more robust face recognition systems.
abstract_zh: 数据清理、架构和损失函数设计是实现高性能人脸识别的重要因素。此前，研究界试图提高各个单一方面的性能，但未能针对这三个方面的联合搜索最优设计提出统一的解决方案。在本文中，我们第一次发现这些方面是相互紧密耦合的。优化各个方面的设计，实际上极大地限制了性能，并使算法设计产生偏差。具体来说，我们发现最佳模型架构或损失函数与数据清理密切相关。为了消除单方面研究的偏差并提供对人脸识别模型设计的整体了解，我们首先仔细设计每个方面的搜索空间，然后引入综合搜索方法来共同搜索最佳的数据清理、架构和损失函数设计。在我们的框架中，我们通过使用基于强化学习的创新方法，使所提出的综合搜索尽可能灵活。在百万级人脸识别基准上的大量实验证明了我们新设计的各个方面的搜索空间和综合搜索的有效性。我们的性能远远优于为每个研究方向开发的专家算法。更重要的是，我们分析了我们搜索的最优设计与单因素独立设计之间的差异。我们指出，强大的模型往往会使用更困难的训练数据集和损失函数进行优化。我们的实证研究可以为未来研究更强大的人脸识别系统提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种综合搜索框架，通过联合优化数据清洗、模型架构和损失函数设计，提升人脸识别系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别优化人脸识别的单一因素（数据清洗、架构或损失函数），但未考虑三者间的紧密耦合关系，导致设计偏倚和性能局限。
AI.method: 设计各因素的搜索空间，并引入基于强化学习的综合搜索方法，联合优化数据清洗、架构及损失函数。
AI.result: 在百万级基准测试中，综合搜索方法显著优于单因素专家算法，且分析表明强模型需依赖更难的训练数据集和损失函数。
AI.conclusion: 综合优化三要素可提升人脸识别性能，未来研究应关注多因素协同设计以构建更鲁棒的系统。

title: Chosen methods of improving small object recognition with weak recognizable features
title_zh: 改善具有弱可识别特征的小物体识别的方法选择
abstract: Many object detection models struggle with several problematic aspects of small object detection including the low number of samples, lack of diversity and low features representation. Taking into account that GANs belong to generative models class, their initial objective is to learn to mimic any data distribution. Using the proper GAN model would enable augmenting low precision data increasing their amount and diversity. This solution could potentially result in improved object detection results. Additionally, incorporating GAN-based architecture inside deep learning model can increase accuracy of small objects recognition. In this work the GAN-based method with augmentation is presented to improve small object detection on VOC Pascal dataset. The method is compared with different popular augmentation strategies like object rotations, shifts etc. The experiments are based on FasterRCNN model.
summary: Many object detection models struggle with several problematic aspects of small object detection including the low number of samples, lack of diversity and low features representation. Taking into account that GANs belong to generative models class, their initial objective is to learn to mimic any data distribution. Using the proper GAN model would enable augmenting low precision data increasing their amount and diversity. This solution could potentially result in improved object detection results. Additionally, incorporating GAN-based architecture inside deep learning model can increase accuracy of small objects recognition. In this work the GAN-based method with augmentation is presented to improve small object detection on VOC Pascal dataset. The method is compared with different popular augmentation strategies like object rotations, shifts etc. The experiments are based on FasterRCNN model.
abstract_zh: 许多目标检测模型都在努力解决小目标检测的几个问题，包括样本数量少、缺乏多样性和特征表示低。考虑到 GAN 属于生成模型类别，它们的最初目标是学习模仿任何数据分布。使用正确的 GAN 模型可以增强低精度数据，从而增加其数量和多样性。该解决方案可能会改善对象检测结果。此外，将基于 GAN 的架构融入深度学习模型中可以提高小物体识别的准确性。在这项工作中，提出了基于 GAN 的增强方法来改进 VOC Pascal 数据集上的小物体检测。该方法与不同流行的增强策略（如对象旋转、移位等）进行了比较。实验基于 FasterRCNN 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的数据增强方法，用于改进小目标检测中的弱可识别特征问题，并在VOC Pascal数据集上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测面临样本数量少、多样性不足及特征表示弱等挑战，传统数据增强方法效果有限，需探索更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用GAN生成高质量的增强数据以提升样本数量和多样性，并将GAN架构集成到FasterRCNN模型中，与旋转、平移等传统增强方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的GAN增强方法在小目标检测任务中优于传统增强策略，有效提升了检测精度。
AI.conclusion: GAN驱动的数据增强能够有效改善小目标检测中的特征弱化问题，为后续研究提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Chosen methods of improving small object recognition with weak recognizable features 改善具有弱可识别特征的小物体识别的方法选择 Many object detection models struggle with several problematic aspects of small object detection including the low number of samples, lack of diversity and low features representation. Taking into account that GANs belong to generative models class, their initial objective is to learn to mimic any data distribution. Using the proper GAN model would enable augmenting low precision data increasing their amount and diversity. This solution could potentially result in improved object detection results. Additionally, incorporating GAN-based architecture inside deep learning model can increase accuracy of small objects recognition. In this work the GAN-based method with augmentation is presented to improve small object detection on VOC Pascal dataset. The method is compared with different popular augmentation strategies like object rotations, shifts etc. The experiments are based on FasterRCNN model. 许多目标检测模型都在努力解决小目标检测的几个问题，包括样本数量少、缺乏多样性和特征表示低。考虑到 GAN 属于生成模型类别，它们的最初目标是学习模仿任何数据分布。使用正确的 GAN 模型可以增强低精度数据，从而增加其数量和多样性。该解决方案可能会改善对象检测结果。此外，将基于 GAN 的架构融入深度学习模型中可以提高小物体识别的准确性。在这项工作中，提出了基于 GAN 的增强方法来改进 VOC Pascal 数据集上的小物体检测。该方法与不同流行的增强策略（如对象旋转、移位等）进行了比较。实验基于 FasterRCNN 模型。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的数据增强方法，用于改进小目标检测中的弱可识别特征问题，并在VOC Pascal数据集上进行了验证。 Magdalena Stachoń,Marcin Pietroń cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Evolving the MCTS Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees Using a Semantic-inspired Evolutionary Algorithm in the Game of Carcassonne
title_zh: 在卡尔卡松游戏中使用语义启发的进化算法进化树的 MCTS 上置信界
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 11 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.09697
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, 11 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.09697
abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a sampling best-first method to search for optimal decisions. The success of MCTS depends heavily on how the tree is built and the selection process plays a fundamental role in this. One particular selection mechanism that has proved to be reliable is based on the Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees (UCT). The UCT attempts to balance exploration and exploitation by considering the values stored in the statistical tree of the MCTS. However, some tuning of the MCTS UCT is necessary for this to work well. In this work, we use Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) to evolve mathematical expressions with the goal to substitute the UCT formula and use the evolved expressions in MCTS. More specifically, we evolve expressions by means of our proposed Semantic-inspired Evolutionary Algorithm in MCTS approach (SIEA-MCTS). This is inspired by semantics in Genetic Programming (GP), where the use of fitness cases is seen as a requirement to be adopted in GP. Fitness cases are normally used to determine the fitness of individuals and can be used to compute the semantic similarity (or dissimilarity) of individuals. However, fitness cases are not available in MCTS. We extend this notion by using multiple reward values from MCTS that allow us to determine both the fitness of an individual and its semantics. By doing so, we show how SIEA-MCTS is able to successfully evolve mathematical expressions that yield better or competitive results compared to UCT without the need of tuning these evolved expressions. We compare the performance of the proposed SIEA-MCTS against MCTS algorithms, MCTS Rapid Action Value Estimation algorithms, three variants of the *-minimax family of algorithms, a random controller and two more EA approaches. We consistently show how SIEA-MCTS outperforms most of these intelligent controllers in the challenging game of Carcassonne.

The success of MCTS depends heavily on how the tree is built and the selection process plays a fundamental role in this. One particular selection mechanism that has proved to be reliable is based on the Upper Confidence Bounds for Trees (UCT). The UCT attempts to balance exploration and exploitation by considering the values stored in the statistical tree of the MCTS. However, some tuning of the MCTS UCT is necessary for this to work well. In this work, we use Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) to evolve mathematical expressions with the goal to substitute the UCT formula and use the evolved expressions in MCTS. More specifically, we evolve expressions by means of our proposed Semantic-inspired Evolutionary Algorithm in MCTS approach (SIEA-MCTS). This is inspired by semantics in Genetic Programming (GP), where the use of fitness cases is seen as a requirement to be adopted in GP. Fitness cases are normally used to determine the fitness of individuals and can be used to compute the semantic similarity (or dissimilarity) of individuals. However, fitness cases are not available in MCTS. We extend this notion by using multiple reward values from MCTS that allow us to determine both the fitness of an individual and its semantics. By doing so, we show how SIEA-MCTS is able to successfully evolve mathematical expressions that yield better or competitive results compared to UCT without the need of tuning these evolved expressions. We compare the performance of the proposed SIEA-MCTS against MCTS algorithms, MCTS Rapid Action Value Estimation algorithms, three variants of the *-minimax family of algorithms, a random controller and two more EA approaches. We consistently show how SIEA-MCTS outperforms most of these intelligent controllers in the challenging game of Carcassonne.
abstract_zh: 蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 是一种搜索最佳决策的采样最佳优先方法。 MCTS 的成功在很大程度上取决于树的构建方式，而选择过程在其中发挥着基础作用。一种已被证明可靠的特定选择机制是基于树的置信上限 (UCT)。 UCT 尝试通过考虑 MCTS 统计树中存储的值来平衡探索和利用。然而，为了使其正常工作，需要对 MCTS UCT 进行一些调整。在这项工作中，我们使用进化算法（EA）来进化数学表达式，目标是替代 UCT 公式并在 MCTS 中使用进化后的表达式。更具体地说，我们通过我们提出的 MCTS 方法中的语义启发进化算法 (SIEA-MCTS) 来进化表达式。这是受到遗传编程（GP）语义的启发，其中适应度案例的使用被视为 GP 中采用的要求。适应度案例通常用于确定个体的适应度，并可用于计算个体的语义相似性（或相异性）。但是，MCTS 中不提供健身案例。我们通过使用 MCTS 的多个奖励值来扩展这个概念，这使我们能够确定个体的适应性及其语义。通过这样做，我们展示了 SIEA-MCTS 如何能够成功演化数学表达式，与 UCT 相比，产生更好或有竞争力的结果，而无需调整这些演化表达式。我们将所提出的 SIEA-MCTS 与 MCTS 算法、MCTS 快速行动值估计算法、*-minimax 系列算法的三种变体、随机控制器和另外两种 EA 方法的性能进行了比较。我们始终如一地展示 SIEA-MCTS 如何在具有挑战性的卡尔卡松游戏中胜过大多数智能控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义启发的进化算法（SIEA-MCTS），用于在卡卡颂游戏中优化蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的UCT公式，通过进化数学表达式替代传统UCT公式以提升决策效果。
AI.motivation: 传统UCT公式需要手动调参以平衡探索与利用，而该研究旨在通过进化算法自动优化UCT公式，减少人工干预并提升MCTS在复杂游戏中的表现。
AI.method: 提出SIEA-MCTS方法，利用MCTS中的多奖励值作为语义相似性评估依据，通过进化算法生成数学表达式替代UCT公式，并在卡卡颂游戏中与多种算法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，SIEA-MCTS在卡卡颂游戏中显著优于传统MCTS、快速动作价值估计算法、*-minimax变体及两种其他进化算法，且无需手动调参即可达到竞争力结果。
AI.conclusion: SIEA-MCTS通过语义启发的进化算法有效优化了MCTS的决策机制，在无需人工调参的情况下实现了优于现有方法的性能，为复杂游戏AI设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vanessa R. C. Leite,Zhe Su,Adrian M. Whatley,Giacomo Indiveri
title: Cortical-inspired placement and routing: minimizing the memory resources in multi-core neuromorphic processors
title_zh: 受皮质启发的布局和布线：最大限度地减少多核神经形态处理器中的内存资源
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.00655
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.00655
abstract: Brain-inspired event-based neuromorphic processing systems have emerged as a promising technology in particular for bio-medical circuits and systems. However, both neuromorphic and biological implementations of neural networks have critical energy and memory constraints. To minimize the use of memory resources in multi-core neuromorphic processors, we propose a network design approach inspired by biological neural networks. We use this approach to design a new routing scheme optimized for small-world networks and, at the same time, to present a hardware-aware placement algorithm that optimizes the allocation of resources for small-world network models. We validate the algorithm with a canonical small-world network and present preliminary results for other networks derived from it
summary: Brain-inspired event-based neuromorphic processing systems have emerged as a promising technology in particular for bio-medical circuits and systems. However, both neuromorphic and biological implementations of neural networks have critical energy and memory constraints. To minimize the use of memory resources in multi-core neuromorphic processors, we propose a network design approach inspired by biological neural networks. We use this approach to design a new routing scheme optimized for small-world networks and, at the same time, to present a hardware-aware placement algorithm that optimizes the allocation of resources for small-world network models. We validate the algorithm with a canonical small-world network and present preliminary results for other networks derived from it
abstract_zh: 受大脑启发的基于事件的神经形态处理系统已成为一项有前景的技术，特别是对于生物医学电路和系统。然而，神经网络的神经形态和生物实现都具有关键的能量和记忆限制。为了最大限度地减少多核神经形态处理器中内存资源的使用，我们提出了一种受生物神经网络启发的网络设计方法。我们使用这种方法设计了一种针对小世界网络优化的新路由方案，同时提出了一种硬件感知的布局算法，可以优化小世界网络模型的资源分配。我们使用规范的小世界网络验证该算法，并为由此派生的其他网络提供初步结果

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物神经网络启发的布局与路由方法，旨在减少多核神经形态处理器的内存资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 神经形态处理器和生物神经网络在能效与内存资源上存在严格限制，需优化内存使用以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计基于小世界网络优化的路由方案，并结合硬件感知的布局算法，实现资源分配优化。
AI.result: 通过经典小世界网络验证算法有效性，并展示其他衍生网络的初步实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低内存需求的神经形态处理器设计提供了可行方案，具有潜在应用价值。
