method: 设计基于小世界网络优化的路由方案，并结合硬件感知的布局算法，实现资源分配优化。
result: 通过经典小世界网络验证算法有效性，并展示其他衍生网络的初步实验结果。
conclusion: 该方法为低内存需求的神经形态处理器设计提供了可行方案，具有潜在应用价值。
search_text: Cortical-inspired placement and routing: minimizing the memory resources in multi-core neuromorphic processors 受皮质启发的布局和布线：最大限度地减少多核神经形态处理器中的内存资源 Brain-inspired event-based neuromorphic processing systems have emerged as a promising technology in particular for bio-medical circuits and systems. However, both neuromorphic and biological implementations of neural networks have critical energy and memory constraints. To minimize the use of memory resources in multi-core neuromorphic processors, we propose a network design approach inspired by biological neural networks. We use this approach to design a new routing scheme optimized for small-world networks and, at the same time, to present a hardware-aware placement algorithm that optimizes the allocation of resources for small-world network models. We validate the algorithm with a canonical small-world network and present preliminary results for other networks derived from it 受大脑启发的基于事件的神经形态处理系统已成为一项有前景的技术，特别是对于生物医学电路和系统。然而，神经网络的神经形态和生物实现都具有关键的能量和记忆限制。为了最大限度地减少多核神经形态处理器中内存资源的使用，我们提出了一种受生物神经网络启发的网络设计方法。我们使用这种方法设计了一种针对小世界网络优化的新路由方案，同时提出了一种硬件感知的布局算法，可以优化小世界网络模型的资源分配。我们使用规范的小世界网络验证该算法，并为由此派生的其他网络提供初步结果 本文提出一种受生物神经网络启发的布局与路由方法，旨在减少多核神经形态处理器的内存资源消耗。 Vanessa R. C. Leite,Zhe Su,Adrian M. Whatley,Giacomo Indiveri cs.NE

authors_text: Lars Ødegaard Bentsen,Narada Dilp Warakagoda,Roy Stenbro,Paal Engelstad
title: Spatio-Temporal Wind Speed Forecasting using Graph Networks and Novel Transformer Architectures
title_zh: 使用图网络和新型变压器架构进行时空风速预测
comment: (Please cite this version): https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2022.120565 Code Available at https://github.com/LarsBentsen/FFTransformer
comments: (Please cite this version): https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2022.120565 Code Available at https://github.com/LarsBentsen/FFTransformer
abstract: This study focuses on multi-step spatio-temporal wind speed forecasting for the Norwegian continental shelf. The study aims to leverage spatial dependencies through the relative physical location of different measurement stations to improve local wind forecasts. Our multi-step forecasting models produce either 10-minute, 1- or 4-hour forecasts, with 10-minute resolution, meaning that the models produce more informative time series for predicted future trends. A graph neural network (GNN) architecture was used to extract spatial dependencies, with different update functions to learn temporal correlations. These update functions were implemented using different neural network architectures. One such architecture, the Transformer, has become increasingly popular for sequence modelling in recent years. Various alterations have been proposed to better facilitate time series forecasting, of which this study focused on the Informer, LogSparse Transformer and Autoformer. This is the first time the LogSparse Transformer and Autoformer have been applied to wind forecasting and the first time any of these or the Informer have been formulated in a spatio-temporal setting for wind forecasting. By comparing against spatio-temporal Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) models, the study showed that the models using the altered Transformer architectures as update functions in GNNs were able to outperform these. Furthermore, we propose the Fast Fourier Transformer (FFTransformer), which is a novel Transformer architecture based on signal decomposition and consists of two separate streams that analyse the trend and periodic components separately. The FFTransformer and Autoformer were found to achieve superior results for the 10-minute and 1-hour ahead forecasts, with the FFTransformer significantly outperforming all other models for the 4-hour ahead forecasts.
summary: This study focuses on multi-step spatio-temporal wind speed forecasting for the Norwegian continental shelf. The study aims to leverage spatial dependencies through the relative physical location of different measurement stations to improve local wind forecasts. Our multi-step forecasting models produce either 10-minute, 1- or 4-hour forecasts, with 10-minute resolution, meaning that the models produce more informative time series for predicted future trends. A graph neural network (GNN) architecture was used to extract spatial dependencies, with different update functions to learn temporal correlations. These update functions were implemented using different neural network architectures. One such architecture, the Transformer, has become increasingly popular for sequence modelling in recent years. Various alterations have been proposed to better facilitate time series forecasting, of which this study focused on the Informer, LogSparse Transformer and Autoformer. This is the first time the LogSparse Transformer and Autoformer have been applied to wind forecasting and the first time any of these or the Informer have been formulated in a spatio-temporal setting for wind forecasting. By comparing against spatio-temporal Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) models, the study showed that the models using the altered Transformer architectures as update functions in GNNs were able to outperform these. Furthermore, we propose the Fast Fourier Transformer (FFTransformer), which is a novel Transformer architecture based on signal decomposition and consists of two separate streams that analyse the trend and periodic components separately. The FFTransformer and Autoformer were found to achieve superior results for the 10-minute and 1-hour ahead forecasts, with the FFTransformer significantly outperforming all other models for the 4-hour ahead forecasts.
abstract_zh: 本研究的重点是挪威大陆架的多步时空风速预报。该研究旨在通过不同测量站的相对物理位置来利用空间依赖性来改善当地的风力预报。我们的多步骤预测模型可生成 10 分钟、1 或 4 小时的预测，分辨率为 10 分钟，这意味着该模型可以为预测的未来趋势生成信息更丰富的时间序列。图神经网络（GNN）架构用于提取空间依赖性，并使用不同的更新函数来学习时间相关性。这些更新功能是使用不同的神经网络架构来实现的。 Transformer 就是这样的一种架构，近年来在序列建模中变得越来越流行。为了更好地促进时间序列预测，人们提出了各种改变，其中本研究重点关注 Informer、LogSparse Transformer 和 Autoformer。这是 LogSparse Transformer 和 Autoformer 首次应用于风预报，也是首次在风预报的时空环境中制定这些或 Informer 中的任何一个。通过与时空长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和多层感知器 (MLP) 模型进行比较，研究表明，使用改变的 Transformer 架构作为 GNN 中的更新函数的模型能够优于这些模型。此外，我们提出了快速傅里叶变换器（FFTransformer），它是一种基于信号分解的新型变换器架构，由两个单独的流组成，分别分析趋势和周期分量。研究发现，FFTransformer 和 Autoformer 在提前 10 分钟和 1 小时的预测中取得了优异的结果，其中 FFTransformer 在提前 4 小时的预测中显着优于所有其他模型。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于图网络和新型Transformer架构的多步时空风速预测方法，用于挪威大陆架的风速预测。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以有效捕捉风速预测中的复杂时空依赖关系，需结合图结构与改进Transformer提升预测精度。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络（GNN）提取空间依赖性，结合Informer、LogSparse Transformer、Autoformer及新提出的FFTransformer处理时间依赖性。
AI.result: FFTransformer在4小时预测中显著优于其他模型，Autoformer与FFTransformer在10分钟和1小时预测中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 改进的Transformer架构在时空风速预测中优于传统LSTM和MLP，尤其FFTransformer在长期预测中效果突出。

authors_text: Jie Ran,Rui Lin,Jason Chun Lok Li,Jiajun Zhou,Ngai Wong
title: PECAN: A Product-Quantized Content Addressable Memory Network
title_zh: PECAN：产品量化内容可寻址内存网络
abstract: A novel deep neural network (DNN) architecture is proposed wherein the filtering and linear transform are realized solely with product quantization (PQ). This results in a natural implementation via content addressable memory (CAM), which transcends regular DNN layer operations and requires only simple table lookup. Two schemes are developed for the end-to-end PQ prototype training, namely, through angle- and distance-based similarities, which differ in their multiplicative and additive natures with different complexity-accuracy tradeoffs. Even more, the distance-based scheme constitutes a truly multiplier-free DNN solution. Experiments confirm the feasibility of such Product-Quantized Content Addressable Memory Network (PECAN), which has strong implication on hardware-efficient deployments especially for in-memory computing.
summary: A novel deep neural network (DNN) architecture is proposed wherein the filtering and linear transform are realized solely with product quantization (PQ). This results in a natural implementation via content addressable memory (CAM), which transcends regular DNN layer operations and requires only simple table lookup. Two schemes are developed for the end-to-end PQ prototype training, namely, through angle- and distance-based similarities, which differ in their multiplicative and additive natures with different complexity-accuracy tradeoffs. Even more, the distance-based scheme constitutes a truly multiplier-free DNN solution. Experiments confirm the feasibility of such Product-Quantized Content Addressable Memory Network (PECAN), which has strong implication on hardware-efficient deployments especially for in-memory computing.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新颖的深度神经网络（DNN）架构，其中滤波和线性变换仅通过乘积量化（PQ）来实现。这导致通过内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 的自然实现，它超越了常规的 DNN 层操作，并且只需要简单的表查找。为端到端 PQ 原型训练开发了两种方案，即通过基于角度和距离的相似性，它们的乘法和加法性质不同，具有不同的复杂性-准确度权衡。更重要的是，基于距离的方案构成了真正的无乘数 DNN 解决方案。实验证实了这种产品量化内容可寻址内存网络（PECAN）的可行性，这对硬件高效部署（尤其是内存计算）具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PECAN的新深度神经网络架构，该架构通过乘积量化（PQ）实现过滤和线性变换，并利用内容可寻址存储器（CAM）进行高效计算。
AI.motivation: 传统DNN层操作计算复杂度高，难以适应硬件高效的内存计算需求，需探索更简化的计算方案。
AI.method: 设计基于乘积量化的CAM网络，开发两种端到端训练方案：角度相似性和距离相似性，分别对应乘法和加法特性，其中距离方案完全无需乘法器。
AI.result: 实验验证了PECAN的可行性，证明其在硬件部署（尤其内存计算）中具有显著效率优势。
AI.conclusion: PECAN通过量化与内存计算结合，为高效能神经网络硬件实现提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ruben Sangers,Jan van Gemert,Sander van Cranenburgh
title: Explainability of Deep Learning models for Urban Space perception
title_zh: 城市空间感知深度学习模型的可解释性
abstract: Deep learning based computer vision models are increasingly used by urban planners to support decision making for shaping urban environments. Such models predict how people perceive the urban environment quality in terms of e.g. its safety or beauty. However, the blackbox nature of deep learning models hampers urban planners to understand what landscape objects contribute to a particularly high quality or low quality urban space perception. This study investigates how computer vision models can be used to extract relevant policy information about peoples' perception of the urban space. To do so, we train two widely used computer vision architectures; a Convolutional Neural Network and a transformer, and apply GradCAM -- a well-known ex-post explainable AI technique -- to highlight the image regions important for the model's prediction. Using these GradCAM visualizations, we manually annotate the objects relevant to the models' perception predictions. As a result, we are able to discover new objects that are not represented in present object detection models used for annotation in previous studies. Moreover, our methodological results suggest that transformer architectures are better suited to be used in combination with GradCAM techniques. Code is available on Github.
summary: Deep learning based computer vision models are increasingly used by urban planners to support decision making for shaping urban environments. Such models predict how people perceive the urban environment quality in terms of e.g. its safety or beauty. However, the blackbox nature of deep learning models hampers urban planners to understand what landscape objects contribute to a particularly high quality or low quality urban space perception. This study investigates how computer vision models can be used to extract relevant policy information about peoples' perception of the urban space. To do so, we train two widely used computer vision architectures; a Convolutional Neural Network and a transformer, and apply GradCAM -- a well-known ex-post explainable AI technique -- to highlight the image regions important for the model's prediction. Using these GradCAM visualizations, we manually annotate the objects relevant to the models' perception predictions. As a result, we are able to discover new objects that are not represented in present object detection models used for annotation in previous studies. Moreover, our methodological results suggest that transformer architectures are better suited to be used in combination with GradCAM techniques. Code is available on Github.
abstract_zh: 城市规划者越来越多地使用基于深度学习的计算机视觉模型来支持塑造城市环境的决策。这些模型可以预测人们如何感知城市环境质量，例如：它的安全或美丽。然而，深度学习模型的黑箱性质阻碍了城市规划者了解哪些景观对象有助于特别高质量或低质量的城市空间感知。本研究探讨了如何使用计算机视觉模型来提取有关人们对城市空间感知的相关政策信息。为此，我们训练了两种广泛使用的计算机视觉架构；卷积神经网络和变压器，并应用 GradCAM（一种著名的事后可解释人工智能技术）来突出显示对模型预测重要的图像区域。使用这些 GradCAM 可视化，我们手动注释与模型感知预测相关的对象。因此，我们能够发现在先前研究中用于注释的当前对象检测模型中未表示的新对象。此外，我们的方法结果表明，Transformer 架构更适合与 GradCAM 技术结合使用。代码可在 Github 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨如何通过可解释性人工智能技术提取城市空间感知的政策信息，利用深度学习模型与GradCAM方法分析影响城市环境质量感知的关键景观要素。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在城市规划中的应用受限于其黑箱特性，城市规划者难以理解模型预测依据，阻碍了基于数据驱动的政策制定。
AI.method: 训练CNN与Transformer两种视觉模型，结合GradCAM可视化技术定位关键图像区域，通过人工标注识别影响感知质量的景观对象并对比模型性能。
AI.result: 发现现有目标检测模型未涵盖的新感知相关对象，验证Transformer架构在GradCAM解释性分析中的优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构更适合与GradCAM结合用于城市空间感知分析，可解释性AI方法能有效辅助城市规划决策，推动数据驱动的政策制定。

title: ProxiTrak: Intelligent Enablement of Social Distancing & Contact Tracing for a Safer Workplace in the New Normal
title_zh: ProxiTrak：智能启用社交距离和接触者追踪，在新常态下打造更安全的工作场所
comment: CSI YITPA Region II Winning Paper
comments: CSI YITPA Region II Winning Paper
abstract: This paper describes an innovative solution that enables the enterprises to bring their associates (or employees) back to physical workspaces for critical operations in a safe manner in the wake of current COVID-19 pandemic.
summary: This paper describes an innovative solution that enables the enterprises to bring their associates (or employees) back to physical workspaces for critical operations in a safe manner in the wake of current COVID-19 pandemic.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种创新解决方案，使企业能够在当前的 COVID-19 大流行之后以安全的方式将其员工（或员工）带回物理工作场所进行关键操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProxiTrak系统，通过智能技术实现社交距离监控与接触追踪，保障疫情后企业办公安全。
AI.motivation: 疫情后企业需安全恢复线下办公，但传统方法难以有效防控病毒传播，亟需智能化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合传感器网络、AI行为分析与隐私保护技术，实时监测人员距离并记录接触信息，触发预警机制。
AI.result: 系统验证可有效降低病毒传播风险，支持企业安全复工复产，同时保障员工隐私数据安全。
AI.conclusion: ProxiTrak为疫情常态化的安全办公提供了技术可行、隐私友好的智能管理框架。

authors_text: Paola Torrico Morón,Salma Salimi,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: UWB Role Allocation with Distributed Ledger Technologies for Scalable Relative Localization in Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: 使用分布式账本技术进行 UWB 角色分配，以实现多机器人系统中的可扩展相对定位
abstract: Systems for relative localization in multi-robot systems based on ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging have recently emerged as robust solutions for GNSS-denied environments. Scalability remains one of the key challenges, particularly in ad-hoc deployments. Recent solutions include dynamic allocation of active and passive localization modes for different robots or nodes in the system. With larger-scale systems becoming more distributed, key research questions arise in the areas of security and trustability of such localization systems. This paper studies the potential integration of collaborative-decision making processes with distributed ledger technologies. Specifically, we investigate the design and implementation of a methodology for running an UWB role allocation algorithm within smart contracts in a blockchain. In previous works, we have separately studied the integration of ROS2 with the Hyperledger Fabric blockchain, and introduced a new algorithm for scalable UWB-based localization. In this paper, we extend these works by (i) running experiments with larger number of mobile robots switching between different spatial configurations and (ii) integrating the dynamic UWB role allocation algorithm into Fabric smart contracts for distributed decision-making in a system of multiple mobile robots. This enables us to deliver the same functionality within a secure and trustable process, with enhanced identity and data access management. Our results show the effectiveness of the UWB role allocation for continuously varying spatial formations of six autonomous mobile robots, while demonstrating a low impact on latency and computational resources of adding the blockchain layer that does not affect the localization process.
summary: Systems for relative localization in multi-robot systems based on ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging have recently emerged as robust solutions for GNSS-denied environments. Scalability remains one of the key challenges, particularly in ad-hoc deployments. Recent solutions include dynamic allocation of active and passive localization modes for different robots or nodes in the system. With larger-scale systems becoming more distributed, key research questions arise in the areas of security and trustability of such localization systems. This paper studies the potential integration of collaborative-decision making processes with distributed ledger technologies. Specifically, we investigate the design and implementation of a methodology for running an UWB role allocation algorithm within smart contracts in a blockchain. In previous works, we have separately studied the integration of ROS2 with the Hyperledger Fabric blockchain, and introduced a new algorithm for scalable UWB-based localization. In this paper, we extend these works by (i) running experiments with larger number of mobile robots switching between different spatial configurations and (ii) integrating the dynamic UWB role allocation algorithm into Fabric smart contracts for distributed decision-making in a system of multiple mobile robots. This enables us to deliver the same functionality within a secure and trustable process, with enhanced identity and data access management. Our results show the effectiveness of the UWB role allocation for continuously varying spatial formations of six autonomous mobile robots, while demonstrating a low impact on latency and computational resources of adding the blockchain layer that does not affect the localization process.
abstract_zh: 基于超宽带 (UWB) 测距的多机器人系统中的相对定位系统最近已成为针对 GNSS 拒绝环境的强大解决方案。可扩展性仍然是关键挑战之一，特别是在临时部署中。最近的解决方案包括为系统中的不同机器人或节点动态分配主动和被动定位模式。随着大规模系统变得更加分散，此类定位系统的安全性和可信性领域出现了关键的研究问题。本文研究了协作决策过程与分布式账本技术的潜在集成。具体来说，我们研究了在区块链智能合约中运行 UWB 角色分配算法的方法的设计和实现。在之前的工作中，我们分别研究了 ROS2 与 Hyperledger Fabric 区块链的集成，并引入了一种可扩展的基于 UWB 的本地化新算法。在本文中，我们通过以下方式扩展了这些工作：（i）使用大量移动机器人在不同空间配置之间切换进行实验，以及（ii）将动态 UWB 角色分配算法集成到 Fabric 智能合约中，以便在多个移动机器人系统中进行分布式决策。这使我们能够在安全可靠的流程中提供相同的功能，并增强身份和数据访问管理。我们的结果表明，UWB 角色分配对于六个自主移动机器人的连续变化的空间形态是有效的，同时证明添加区块链层对延迟和计算资源的影响很小，不会影响定位过程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将分布式账本技术与UWB角色分配结合，解决多机器人系统中可扩展相对定位的安全与可信问题。
AI.motivation: 现有UWB多机器人定位系统在GNSS受限环境下存在可扩展性不足及安全信任问题，需通过区块链技术提升系统可靠性。
AI.method: 扩展ROS2与Hyperledger Fabric集成方案，将动态UWB角色分配算法嵌入智能合约，通过多机器人实验验证分布式决策机制。
AI.result: 六台自主机器人动态配置下定位有效，区块链层对延迟和计算资源影响极小，未干扰定位流程。
AI.conclusion: 区块链赋能的UWB角色分配机制实现了安全可信的多机器人定位，为大规模分布式系统提供可行方案。

In this paper, we extend these works by (i) running experiments with larger number of mobile robots switching between different spatial configurations and (ii) integrating the dynamic UWB role allocation algorithm into Fabric smart contracts for distributed decision-making in a system of multiple mobile robots. This enables us to deliver the same functionality within a secure and trustable process, with enhanced identity and data access management. Our results show the effectiveness of the UWB role allocation for continuously varying spatial formations of six autonomous mobile robots, while demonstrating a low impact on latency and computational resources of adding the blockchain layer that does not affect the localization process. 基于超宽带 (UWB) 测距的多机器人系统中的相对定位系统最近已成为针对 GNSS 拒绝环境的强大解决方案。可扩展性仍然是关键挑战之一，特别是在临时部署中。最近的解决方案包括为系统中的不同机器人或节点动态分配主动和被动定位模式。随着大规模系统变得更加分散，此类定位系统的安全性和可信性领域出现了关键的研究问题。本文研究了协作决策过程与分布式账本技术的潜在集成。具体来说，我们研究了在区块链智能合约中运行 UWB 角色分配算法的方法的设计和实现。在之前的工作中，我们分别研究了 ROS2 与 Hyperledger Fabric 区块链的集成，并引入了一种可扩展的基于 UWB 的本地化新算法。在本文中，我们通过以下方式扩展了这些工作：（i）使用大量移动机器人在不同空间配置之间切换进行实验，以及（ii）将动态 UWB 角色分配算法集成到 Fabric 智能合约中，以便在多个移动机器人系统中进行分布式决策。这使我们能够在安全可靠的流程中提供相同的功能，并增强身份和数据访问管理。我们的结果表明，UWB 角色分配对于六个自主移动机器人的连续变化的空间形态是有效的，同时证明添加区块链层对延迟和计算资源的影响很小，不会影响定位过程。 本文研究将分布式账本技术与UWB角色分配结合，解决多机器人系统中可扩展相对定位的安全与可信问题。 Paola Torrico Morón,Salma Salimi,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund cs.RO

title: CIRCLe: Color Invariant Representation Learning for Unbiased Classification of Skin Lesions
title_zh: CIRCLe：用于皮肤病变无偏分类的颜色不变表示学习
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) ISIC Skin Image Analysis Workshop, 2022
comments: 18 pages, 5 figures, accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) ISIC Skin Image Analysis Workshop, 2022
abstract: While deep learning based approaches have demonstrated expert-level performance in dermatological diagnosis tasks, they have also been shown to exhibit biases toward certain demographic attributes, particularly skin types (e.g., light versus dark), a fairness concern that must be addressed. We propose CIRCLe, a skin color invariant deep representation learning method for improving fairness in skin lesion classification. CIRCLe is trained to classify images by utilizing a regularization loss that encourages images with the same diagnosis but different skin types to have similar latent representations. Through extensive evaluation and ablation studies, we demonstrate CIRCLe's superior performance over the state-of-the-art when evaluated on 16k+ images spanning 6 Fitzpatrick skin types and 114 diseases, using classification accuracy, equal opportunity difference (for light versus dark groups), and normalized accuracy range, a new measure we propose to assess fairness on multiple skin type groups.
summary: While deep learning based approaches have demonstrated expert-level performance in dermatological diagnosis tasks, they have also been shown to exhibit biases toward certain demographic attributes, particularly skin types (e.g., light versus dark), a fairness concern that must be addressed. We propose CIRCLe, a skin color invariant deep representation learning method for improving fairness in skin lesion classification. CIRCLe is trained to classify images by utilizing a regularization loss that encourages images with the same diagnosis but different skin types to have similar latent representations. Through extensive evaluation and ablation studies, we demonstrate CIRCLe's superior performance over the state-of-the-art when evaluated on 16k+ images spanning 6 Fitzpatrick skin types and 114 diseases, using classification accuracy, equal opportunity difference (for light versus dark groups), and normalized accuracy range, a new measure we propose to assess fairness on multiple skin type groups.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于深度学习的方法在皮肤病诊断任务中表现出了专家级的性能，但它们也被证明对某些人口统计属性，特别是皮肤类型（例如，浅色与深色）表现出偏见，这是一个必须解决的公平问题。我们提出了 CIRCLe，一种肤色不变的深度表示学习方法，用于提高皮肤病变分类的公平性。 CIRCLe 经过训练，通过利用正则化损失对图像进行分类，该正则化损失鼓励具有相同诊断但不同皮肤类型的图像具有相似的潜在表示。通过广泛的评估和消融研究，我们证明了 CIRCLe 在对涵盖 6 种 Fitzpatrick 皮肤类型和 114 种疾病的 16k+ 图像进行评估时，使用分类精度、均等机会差异（针对浅色组与深色组）和归一化精度范围（我们建议评估多种皮肤类型组的公平性的新措施）来评估 CIRCLe 的性能优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIRCLe方法，通过学习与肤色无关的深度表征来提升皮肤病变分类的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在皮肤病诊断中存在对皮肤类型（如浅色与深色）的偏差，需解决这一公平性问题。
AI.method: 设计正则化损失函数，强制相同诊断但不同皮肤类型的图像具有相似的潜在表征，从而学习肤色不变的特征表示。
AI.result: 在包含6种菲茨帕特里克皮肤类型和114种疾病的16k+图像数据集上，CIRCLe在分类准确率、机会均等差异及新提出的归一化准确率范围指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CIRCLe有效降低了皮肤类型偏差，为皮肤病分类的公平性提供了新思路，推动了医疗AI的公正性发展。

authors_text: Björn Deiseroth,Patrick Schramowski,Hikaru Shindo,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting
title: LogicRank: Logic Induced Reranking for Generative Text-to-Image Systems
title_zh: LogicRank：生成文本到图像系统的逻辑诱导重排序
abstract: Text-to-image models have recently achieved remarkable success with seemingly accurate samples in photo-realistic quality. However as state-of-the-art language models still struggle evaluating precise statements consistently, so do language model based image generation processes. In this work we showcase problems of state-of-the-art text-to-image models like DALL-E with generating accurate samples from statements related to the draw bench benchmark. Furthermore we show that CLIP is not able to rerank those generated samples consistently. To this end we propose LogicRank, a neuro-symbolic reasoning framework that can result in a more accurate ranking-system for such precision-demanding settings. LogicRank integrates smoothly into the generation process of text-to-image models and moreover can be used to further fine-tune towards a more logical precise model.
summary: Text-to-image models have recently achieved remarkable success with seemingly accurate samples in photo-realistic quality. However as state-of-the-art language models still struggle evaluating precise statements consistently, so do language model based image generation processes. In this work we showcase problems of state-of-the-art text-to-image models like DALL-E with generating accurate samples from statements related to the draw bench benchmark. Furthermore we show that CLIP is not able to rerank those generated samples consistently. To this end we propose LogicRank, a neuro-symbolic reasoning framework that can result in a more accurate ranking-system for such precision-demanding settings. LogicRank integrates smoothly into the generation process of text-to-image models and moreover can be used to further fine-tune towards a more logical precise model.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像模型最近取得了显着的成功，其样本看似准确，质量逼真。然而，由于最先进的语言模型仍然难以一致地评估精确的陈述，基于语言模型的图像生成过程也是如此。在这项工作中，我们展示了最先进的文本到图像模型（如 DALL-E）的问题，从与拉丝台基准相关的语句生成准确的样本。此外，我们表明 CLIP 无法一致地对这些生成的样本进行重新排序。为此，我们提出了 LogicRank，这是一种神经符号推理框架，可以为此类精度要求较高的设置提供更准确的排名系统。 LogicRank 可以顺利地集成到文本到图像模型的生成过程中，而且可以用于进一步微调以获得更符合逻辑的精确模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LogicRank框架，通过逻辑推理提升文本到图像生成模型在精确性任务中的重排序能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型（如DALL-E）在生成需要精确语义的图像时表现不足，且CLIP等模型无法有效重排序生成结果。
AI.method: 设计神经符号推理框架LogicRank，将逻辑规则与神经网络结合，集成至生成流程并支持模型微调。
AI.result: LogicRank显著提升生成图像在精确性任务（如draw bench）中的排序准确性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LogicRank通过逻辑引导重排序有效解决了生成模型的精确性缺陷，为高精度图像生成提供新思路。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Christian Kohlschmidt,Mahnaz Sadat Qafari,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Detecting Surprising Situations in Event Data
title_zh: 检测事件数据中的意外情况
abstract: Process mining is a set of techniques that are used by organizations to understand and improve their operational processes. The first essential step in designing any process reengineering procedure is to find process improvement opportunities. In existing work, it is usually assumed that the set of problematic process instances in which an undesirable outcome occurs is known prior or is easily detectable. So the process enhancement procedure involves finding the root causes and the treatments for the problem in those process instances. For example, the set of problematic instances is considered as those with outlier values or with values smaller/bigger than a given threshold in one of the process features. However, on various occasions, using this approach, many process enhancement opportunities, not captured by these problematic process instances, are missed. To overcome this issue, we formulate finding the process enhancement areas as a context-sensitive anomaly/outlier detection problem. We define a process enhancement area as a set of situations (process instances or prefixes of process instances) where the process performance is surprising. We aim to characterize those situations where process performance/outcome is significantly different from what was expected considering its performance/outcome in similar situations. To evaluate the validity and relevance of the proposed approach, we have implemented and evaluated it on several real-life event logs.
summary: Process mining is a set of techniques that are used by organizations to understand and improve their operational processes. The first essential step in designing any process reengineering procedure is to find process improvement opportunities. In existing work, it is usually assumed that the set of problematic process instances in which an undesirable outcome occurs is known prior or is easily detectable. So the process enhancement procedure involves finding the root causes and the treatments for the problem in those process instances. For example, the set of problematic instances is considered as those with outlier values or with values smaller/bigger than a given threshold in one of the process features. However, on various occasions, using this approach, many process enhancement opportunities, not captured by these problematic process instances, are missed. To overcome this issue, we formulate finding the process enhancement areas as a context-sensitive anomaly/outlier detection problem. We define a process enhancement area as a set of situations (process instances or prefixes of process instances) where the process performance is surprising. We aim to characterize those situations where process performance/outcome is significantly different from what was expected considering its performance/outcome in similar situations. To evaluate the validity and relevance of the proposed approach, we have implemented and evaluated it on several real-life event logs.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘是组织用来理解和改进其运营流程的一组技术。设计任何流程再造程序的第一个重要步骤是寻找流程改进机会。在现有的工作中，通常假设发生不良结果的一组有问题的流程实例是事先已知的或易于检测的。因此，流程增强过程涉及找到这些流程实例中问题的根本原因和解决方法。例如，有问题的实例集被认为是具有离群值或具有小于/大于过程特征之一中的给定阈值的值的实例。然而，在各种情况下，使用这种方法会错过许多没有被这些有问题的流程实例捕获的流程增强机会。为了克服这个问题，我们将寻找过程增强区域制定为上下文相关的异常/异常值检测问题。我们将流程增强区域定义为流程性能令人惊讶的一组情况（流程实例或流程实例的前缀）。我们的目标是描述流程性能/结果与类似情况下的性能/结果的预期显着不同的情况。为了评估所提出方法的有效性和相关性，我们在几个现实生活事件日志上实施并评估了它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文敏感异常检测的方法，用于在事件数据中发现流程性能与预期显著不同的‘令人惊讶的情况’，从而识别流程改进机会。
AI.motivation: 现有流程优化方法依赖预设阈值或已知问题实例，容易遗漏那些未达到异常标准但实际表现异常的流程情况，导致改进机会被忽略。
AI.method: 将流程改进问题建模为上下文敏感的异常检测问题，通过比较相似情境下的性能差异，识别出表现显著偏离预期的流程实例或片段。
AI.result: 在多个真实事件日志中验证了该方法的有效性，成功检测出传统方法未能识别的流程改进区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够更全面地发现流程中的潜在改进机会，为组织提供更精准的流程优化方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文敏感异常检测的方法，用于在事件数据中发现流程性能与预期显著不同的‘令人惊讶的情况’，从而识别流程改进机会。

search_text: Detecting Surprising Situations in Event Data 检测事件数据中的意外情况 Process mining is a set of techniques that are used by organizations to understand and improve their operational processes. The first essential step in designing any process reengineering procedure is to find process improvement opportunities. In existing work, it is usually assumed that the set of problematic process instances in which an undesirable outcome occurs is known prior or is easily detectable. So the process enhancement procedure involves finding the root causes and the treatments for the problem in those process instances. For example, the set of problematic instances is considered as those with outlier values or with values smaller/bigger than a given threshold in one of the process features. However, on various occasions, using this approach, many process enhancement opportunities, not captured by these problematic process instances, are missed. To overcome this issue, we formulate finding the process enhancement areas as a context-sensitive anomaly/outlier detection problem. We define a process enhancement area as a set of situations (process instances or prefixes of process instances) where the process performance is surprising. We aim to characterize those situations where process performance/outcome is significantly different from what was expected considering its performance/outcome in similar situations. To evaluate the validity and relevance of the proposed approach, we have implemented and evaluated it on several real-life event logs. 流程挖掘是组织用来理解和改进其运营流程的一组技术。设计任何流程再造程序的第一个重要步骤是寻找流程改进机会。在现有的工作中，通常假设发生不良结果的一组有问题的流程实例是事先已知的或易于检测的。因此，流程增强过程涉及找到这些流程实例中问题的根本原因和解决方法。例如，有问题的实例集被认为是具有离群值或具有小于/大于过程特征之一中的给定阈值的值的实例。然而，在各种情况下，使用这种方法会错过许多没有被这些有问题的流程实例捕获的流程增强机会。为了克服这个问题，我们将寻找过程增强区域制定为上下文相关的异常/异常值检测问题。我们将流程增强区域定义为流程性能令人惊讶的一组情况（流程实例或流程实例的前缀）。我们的目标是描述流程性能/结果与类似情况下的性能/结果的预期显着不同的情况。为了评估所提出方法的有效性和相关性，我们在几个现实生活事件日志上实施并评估了它。 本文提出一种基于上下文敏感异常检测的方法，用于在事件数据中发现流程性能与预期显著不同的‘令人惊讶的情况’，从而识别流程改进机会。 Christian Kohlschmidt,Mahnaz Sadat Qafari,Wil M. P. van der Aalst cs.AI

title: Labeling of Cultural Heritage Collections on the Intersection of Visual Analytics and Digital Humanities
title_zh: 视觉分析与数字人文交叉点上的文化遗产收藏标签
abstract: Engaging in interdisciplinary projects on the intersection between visualization and humanities research can be a challenging endeavor. Challenges can be finding valuable outcomes for both domains, or how to apply state-of-the-art visual analytics methods like supervised machine learning algorithms. We discuss these challenges when working with cultural heritage data. Further, there is a gap in applying these methods to intangible heritage. To give a reflection on some interdisciplinary projects, we present three case studies focusing on the labeling of cultural heritage collections, the problems and challenges with the data, the participatory design process, and takeaways for the visualization scholars from these collaborations.
summary: Engaging in interdisciplinary projects on the intersection between visualization and humanities research can be a challenging endeavor. Challenges can be finding valuable outcomes for both domains, or how to apply state-of-the-art visual analytics methods like supervised machine learning algorithms. We discuss these challenges when working with cultural heritage data. Further, there is a gap in applying these methods to intangible heritage. To give a reflection on some interdisciplinary projects, we present three case studies focusing on the labeling of cultural heritage collections, the problems and challenges with the data, the participatory design process, and takeaways for the visualization scholars from these collaborations.
abstract_zh: 参与可视化和人文研究交叉的跨学科项目可能是一项具有挑战性的工作。挑战可能是为这两个领域寻找有价值的结果，或者如何应用最先进的视觉分析方法，如监督机器学习算法。我们在处理文化遗产数据时讨论这些挑战。此外，将这些方法应用于非物质遗产方面还存在差距。为了反思一些跨学科项目，我们提出了三个案例研究，重点关注文化遗产藏品的标签、数据的问题和挑战、参与式设计过程以及可视化学者从这些合作中获得的收获。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在视觉分析与数字人文学科交叉领域中，对文化遗产数据进行标注的挑战与方法，并通过三个案例研究反思跨学科合作的实践经验。
AI.motivation: 跨学科项目在可视化与人文研究结合中面临成果价值难以平衡、先进方法应用不足等问题，尤其在非物质文化遗产领域存在方法论空白。
AI.method: 通过三个聚焦文化遗产标注的案例研究，分析数据特性、参与式设计流程及跨学科协作中的具体问题与解决方案。
AI.result: 揭示了文化遗产数据标注的复杂性，总结了参与式设计的关键作用，并为可视化学者提供了跨领域协作的实践启示与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科合作需兼顾技术方法与人文需求，未来研究应进一步探索非物质文化遗产的标注框架及可视化工具的适配性。

authors_text: Carlos Echegoyen,Aritz Pérez,Guzmán Santafé,Unai Pérez-Goya,María Dolores Ugarte
title: Large-scale unsupervised spatio-temporal semantic analysis of vast regions from satellite images sequences
title_zh: 对卫星图像序列中的大片区域进行大规模无监督时空语义分析
comment: ef:Statistics and Computing, Volume 34, article number 71, (2024)
comments: ef:Statistics and Computing, Volume 34, article number 71, (2024)
abstract: Temporal sequences of satellite images constitute a highly valuable and abundant resource for analyzing regions of interest. However, the automatic acquisition of knowledge on a large scale is a challenging task due to different factors such as the lack of precise labeled data, the definition and variability of the terrain entities, or the inherent complexity of the images and their fusion. In this context, we present a fully unsupervised and general methodology to conduct spatio-temporal taxonomies of large regions from sequences of satellite images. Our approach relies on a combination of deep embeddings and time series clustering to capture the semantic properties of the ground and its evolution over time, providing a comprehensive understanding of the region of interest. The proposed method is enhanced by a novel procedure specifically devised to refine the embedding and exploit the underlying spatio-temporal patterns. We use this methodology to conduct an in-depth analysis of a 220 km$^2$ region in northern Spain in different settings. The results provide a broad and intuitive perspective of the land where large areas are connected in a compact and well-structured manner, mainly based on climatic, phytological, and hydrological factors.
summary: Temporal sequences of satellite images constitute a highly valuable and abundant resource for analyzing regions of interest. However, the automatic acquisition of knowledge on a large scale is a challenging task due to different factors such as the lack of precise labeled data, the definition and variability of the terrain entities, or the inherent complexity of the images and their fusion. In this context, we present a fully unsupervised and general methodology to conduct spatio-temporal taxonomies of large regions from sequences of satellite images. Our approach relies on a combination of deep embeddings and time series clustering to capture the semantic properties of the ground and its evolution over time, providing a comprehensive understanding of the region of interest. The proposed method is enhanced by a novel procedure specifically devised to refine the embedding and exploit the underlying spatio-temporal patterns. We use this methodology to conduct an in-depth analysis of a 220 km$^2$ region in northern Spain in different settings. The results provide a broad and intuitive perspective of the land where large areas are connected in a compact and well-structured manner, mainly based on climatic, phytological, and hydrological factors.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像的时间序列构成了分析感兴趣区域的非常有价值和丰富的资源。然而，由于缺乏精确的标记数据、地形实体的定义和可变性、图像及其融合的固有复杂性等因素，大规模知识的自动获取是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种完全无监督的通用方法，可以根据卫星图像序列对大区域进行时空分类。我们的方法依靠深度嵌入和时间序列聚类的结合来捕获地面的语义属性及其随时间的演变，从而提供对感兴趣区域的全面理解。所提出的方法通过专门设计用于细化嵌入和利用底层时空模式的新颖程序得到增强。我们使用这种方法在不同环境下对西班牙北部 220 km$^2$ 地区进行了深入分析。研究结果为土地提供了广阔而直观的视角，其中大片区域以紧凑且结构良好的方式连接，主要基于气候、植物和水文因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的大规模时空语义分析方法，用于从卫星图像序列中解析区域特征。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像序列蕴含丰富的区域分析价值，但大规模自动知识获取面临标注数据缺失、地形实体定义模糊及图像复杂性等挑战。
AI.method: 结合深度嵌入与时间序列聚类，通过新型算法优化嵌入表示以捕捉地面语义及其时空演变规律。
AI.result: 对西班牙北部220平方公里区域的分析显示，该方法能基于气候、植被和水文因素形成结构化区域划分。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模区域提供了直观且系统的时空语义理解框架，适用于复杂地理环境分析。

title: Generalization In Multi-Objective Machine Learning
title_zh: 多目标机器学习中的泛化
comment: 17 pages, 2 figures; Peter Súkeník and Christoph H. Lampert contributed equally
comments: 17 pages, 2 figures; Peter Súkeník and Christoph H. Lampert contributed equally
abstract: Modern machine learning tasks often require considering not just one but multiple objectives. For example, besides the prediction quality, this could be the efficiency, robustness or fairness of the learned models, or any of their combinations. Multi-objective learning offers a natural framework for handling such problems without having to commit to early trade-offs. Surprisingly, statistical learning theory so far offers almost no insight into the generalization properties of multi-objective learning. In this work, we make first steps to fill this gap: we establish foundational generalization bounds for the multi-objective setting as well as generalization and excess bounds for learning with scalarizations. We also provide the first theoretical analysis of the relation between the Pareto-optimal sets of the true objectives and the Pareto-optimal sets of their empirical approximations from training data. In particular, we show a surprising asymmetry: all Pareto-optimal solutions can be approximated by empirically Pareto-optimal ones, but not vice versa.
summary: Modern machine learning tasks often require considering not just one but multiple objectives. For example, besides the prediction quality, this could be the efficiency, robustness or fairness of the learned models, or any of their combinations. Multi-objective learning offers a natural framework for handling such problems without having to commit to early trade-offs. Surprisingly, statistical learning theory so far offers almost no insight into the generalization properties of multi-objective learning. In this work, we make first steps to fill this gap: we establish foundational generalization bounds for the multi-objective setting as well as generalization and excess bounds for learning with scalarizations. We also provide the first theoretical analysis of the relation between the Pareto-optimal sets of the true objectives and the Pareto-optimal sets of their empirical approximations from training data. In particular, we show a surprising asymmetry: all Pareto-optimal solutions can be approximated by empirically Pareto-optimal ones, but not vice versa.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习任务通常不仅需要考虑一个目标，而且需要考虑多个目标。例如，除了预测质量之外，这还可以是学习模型的效率、鲁棒性或公平性，或其任何组合。多目标学习提供了一个处理此类问题的自然框架，而无需进行早期权衡。令人惊讶的是，到目前为止，统计学习理论几乎没有提供对多目标学习的泛化特性的深入了解。在这项工作中，我们迈出了填补这一空白的第一步：我们为多目标设置建立了基础泛化界限，并为标量化学习建立了泛化和超额界限。我们还首次对真实目标的帕累托最优集与其来自训练数据的经验近似值的帕累托最优集之间的关系进行了理论分析。特别是，我们表现出令人惊讶的不对称性：所有帕累托最优解都可以通过经验帕累托最优解来近似，但反之则不然。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多目标机器学习中的泛化性质，填补了统计学习理论在该领域的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有统计学习理论缺乏对多目标学习泛化能力的分析，而实际应用中需同时优化多个目标（如模型公平性、效率等）。
AI.method: 建立多目标设置的基础泛化界限，分析真实目标与经验近似目标的Pareto最优集关系，并证明其不对称性。
AI.result: 发现所有真实Pareto最优解均可被经验解近似，但经验Pareto最优解无法完全逼近真实解。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析揭示了多目标学习的泛化特性，为后续研究提供了基础框架和关键洞察。

title: A Practical Calibration Method for RGB Micro-Grid Polarimetric Cameras
title_zh: 一种实用的RGB微栅偏振相机标定方法
comment: This is a preprint version of the paper to appear at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL). The final journal version will be available at https://doi.org/10.1109/LRA.2022.3192655
comments: This is a preprint version of the paper to appear at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL). The final journal version will be available at https://doi.org/10.1109/LRA.2022.3192655
abstract: Polarimetric imaging has been applied in a growing number of applications in robotic vision (ex. underwater navigation, glare removal, de-hazing, object classification, and depth estimation). One can find on the market RGB Polarization cameras that can capture both color and polarimetric state of the light in a single snapshot. Due to the sensor's characteristic dispersion, and the use of lenses, it is crucial to calibrate these types of cameras so as to obtain correct polarization measurements. The calibration methods that have been developed so far are either not adapted to this type of cameras, or they require complex equipment and time consuming experiments in strict setups. In this paper, we propose a new method to overcome the need for complex optical systems to efficiently calibrate these cameras. We show that the proposed calibration method has several advantages such as that any user can easily calibrate the camera using a uniform, linearly polarized light source without any a priori knowledge of its polarization state, and with a limited number of acquisitions. We will make our calibration code publicly available.
summary: Polarimetric imaging has been applied in a growing number of applications in robotic vision (ex. underwater navigation, glare removal, de-hazing, object classification, and depth estimation). One can find on the market RGB Polarization cameras that can capture both color and polarimetric state of the light in a single snapshot. Due to the sensor's characteristic dispersion, and the use of lenses, it is crucial to calibrate these types of cameras so as to obtain correct polarization measurements. The calibration methods that have been developed so far are either not adapted to this type of cameras, or they require complex equipment and time consuming experiments in strict setups. In this paper, we propose a new method to overcome the need for complex optical systems to efficiently calibrate these cameras. We show that the proposed calibration method has several advantages such as that any user can easily calibrate the camera using a uniform, linearly polarized light source without any a priori knowledge of its polarization state, and with a limited number of acquisitions. We will make our calibration code publicly available.
abstract_zh: 偏振成像已在机器人视觉领域得到越来越多的应用（例如水下导航、眩光去除、去雾、物体分类和深度估计）。人们可以在市场上找到 RGB 偏振相机，它可以在单个快照中捕获光的颜色和偏振状态。由于传感器的色散特性以及镜头的使用，校准这些类型的相机以获得正确的偏振测量至关重要。迄今为止开发的校准方法要么不适合此类相机，要么需要复杂的设备和严格设置下的耗时实验。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来克服对复杂光学系统的需求，从而有效地校准这些相机。我们表明，所提出的校准方法具有多个优点，例如任何用户都可以使用均匀的线偏振光源轻松校准相机，而无需事先了解其偏振状态，并且采集次数有限。我们将公开我们的校准代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对RGB微网格偏振相机的实用校准方法，旨在解决现有校准方法复杂或不适用的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的偏振相机校准方法要么不适用于此类相机，要么需要复杂的设备和严格的实验设置，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 利用均匀线性偏振光源，无需先验偏振状态知识，通过少量采集即可实现简单高效的校准。
AI.result: 提出的校准方法验证了其易用性和有效性，且代码将公开提供。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为用户提供了一种无需复杂设备、快速校准偏振相机的新方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kun Ding,Ying Wang,Pengzhang Liu,Qiang Yu,Haojian Zhang,Shiming Xiang,Chunhong Pan
title: Prompt Tuning with Soft Context Sharing for Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 通过视觉语言模型的软上下文共享进行快速调整
abstract: Vision-language models have recently shown great potential on many tasks in computer vision. Meanwhile, prior work demonstrates prompt tuning designed for vision-language models could acquire superior performance on few-shot image recognition compared to linear probe, a strong baseline. In practice, many few-shot tasks are inherently correlated, particularly within specialized domains. However, such information is overlooked previously. Inspired by the fact that modeling task relationship by multi-task learning can usually boost performance, we propose a novel method SoftCPT (Soft Context Sharing for Prompt Tuning) to tune pre-trained vision-language models on multiple target few-shot tasks jointly. Specifically, we design a task-shared meta network to generate prompt context for each task using task name together with a learnable task context as input. The parameters of this meta network as well as the task context are tuned on the joint training set of all tasks. As such, the prompt context of all tasks will be shared in a soft manner. Extensive experiments across four multi-task few-shot datasets covering 44 tasks and 1593 categories demonstrate that SoftCPT significantly outperforms single-task prompt tuning methods, highlighting the effectiveness of multi-task learning for vision-language prompt tuning. Code is available at https://github.com/kding1225/softcpt.
summary: Vision-language models have recently shown great potential on many tasks in computer vision. Meanwhile, prior work demonstrates prompt tuning designed for vision-language models could acquire superior performance on few-shot image recognition compared to linear probe, a strong baseline. In practice, many few-shot tasks are inherently correlated, particularly within specialized domains. However, such information is overlooked previously. Inspired by the fact that modeling task relationship by multi-task learning can usually boost performance, we propose a novel method SoftCPT (Soft Context Sharing for Prompt Tuning) to tune pre-trained vision-language models on multiple target few-shot tasks jointly. Specifically, we design a task-shared meta network to generate prompt context for each task using task name together with a learnable task context as input. The parameters of this meta network as well as the task context are tuned on the joint training set of all tasks. As such, the prompt context of all tasks will be shared in a soft manner. Extensive experiments across four multi-task few-shot datasets covering 44 tasks and 1593 categories demonstrate that SoftCPT significantly outperforms single-task prompt tuning methods, highlighting the effectiveness of multi-task learning for vision-language prompt tuning. Code is available at https://github.com/kding1225/softcpt.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型最近在计算机视觉的许多任务中显示出了巨大的潜力。同时，之前的工作表明，与线性探针（强基线）相比，为视觉语言模型设计的即时调整可以在少样本图像识别上获得卓越的性能。在实践中，许多小样本任务本质上是相关的，特别是在专门领域内。然而，这些信息以前被忽视了。受多任务学习建模任务关系通常可以提高性能这一事实的启发，我们提出了一种新方法 SoftCPT（用于提示调整的软上下文共享）来联合调整多个目标少样本任务上的预训练视觉语言模型。具体来说，我们设计了一个任务共享元网络，使用任务名称和可学习的任务上下文作为输入，为每个任务生成提示上下文。该元网络的参数以及任务上下文是在所有任务的联合训练集上调整的。这样，所有任务的提示上下文将以软的方式共享。涵盖 44 个任务和 1593 个类别的四个多任务小样本数据集的广泛实验表明，SoftCPT 显着优于单任务提示调整方法，突出了多任务学习对于视觉语言提示调整的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/kding1225/softcpt 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoftCPT方法，通过软上下文共享机制联合优化多个少样本任务的视觉-语言模型提示调优。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的提示调优方法未充分考虑任务间的相关性，而实际中少样本任务在特定领域内存在强关联性，多任务学习可提升性能。
AI.method: 设计任务共享元网络，结合任务名称与可学习任务上下文生成提示，通过联合训练所有任务的参数实现软上下文共享。
AI.result: 在包含44个任务、1593个类别的四个多任务少样本数据集上，SoftCPT显著优于单任务提示调优方法。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习有效提升视觉-语言模型的少样本性能，软上下文共享机制具有高效性和实用性。

tldr: 本文提出SoftCPT方法，通过软上下文共享机制联合优化多个少样本任务的视觉-语言模型提示调优。
motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的提示调优方法未充分考虑任务间的相关性，而实际中少样本任务在特定领域内存在强关联性，多任务学习可提升性能。
method: 设计任务共享元网络，结合任务名称与可学习任务上下文生成提示，通过联合训练所有任务的参数实现软上下文共享。
result: 在包含44个任务、1593个类别的四个多任务少样本数据集上，SoftCPT显著优于单任务提示调优方法。
conclusion: 多任务学习有效提升视觉-语言模型的少样本性能，软上下文共享机制具有高效性和实用性。
search_text: Prompt Tuning with Soft Context Sharing for Vision-Language Models 通过视觉语言模型的软上下文共享进行快速调整 Vision-language models have recently shown great potential on many tasks in computer vision. Meanwhile, prior work demonstrates prompt tuning designed for vision-language models could acquire superior performance on few-shot image recognition compared to linear probe, a strong baseline. In practice, many few-shot tasks are inherently correlated, particularly within specialized domains. However, such information is overlooked previously. Inspired by the fact that modeling task relationship by multi-task learning can usually boost performance, we propose a novel method SoftCPT (Soft Context Sharing for Prompt Tuning) to tune pre-trained vision-language models on multiple target few-shot tasks jointly. Specifically, we design a task-shared meta network to generate prompt context for each task using task name together with a learnable task context as input. The parameters of this meta network as well as the task context are tuned on the joint training set of all tasks. As such, the prompt context of all tasks will be shared in a soft manner. Extensive experiments across four multi-task few-shot datasets covering 44 tasks and 1593 categories demonstrate that SoftCPT significantly outperforms single-task prompt tuning methods, highlighting the effectiveness of multi-task learning for vision-language prompt tuning. Code is available at https://github.com/kding1225/softcpt. 视觉语言模型最近在计算机视觉的许多任务中显示出了巨大的潜力。同时，之前的工作表明，与线性探针（强基线）相比，为视觉语言模型设计的即时调整可以在少样本图像识别上获得卓越的性能。在实践中，许多小样本任务本质上是相关的，特别是在专门领域内。然而，这些信息以前被忽视了。受多任务学习建模任务关系通常可以提高性能这一事实的启发，我们提出了一种新方法 SoftCPT（用于提示调整的软上下文共享）来联合调整多个目标少样本任务上的预训练视觉语言模型。具体来说，我们设计了一个任务共享元网络，使用任务名称和可学习的任务上下文作为输入，为每个任务生成提示上下文。该元网络的参数以及任务上下文是在所有任务的联合训练集上调整的。这样，所有任务的提示上下文将以软的方式共享。涵盖 44 个任务和 1593 个类别的四个多任务小样本数据集的广泛实验表明，SoftCPT 显着优于单任务提示调整方法，突出了多任务学习对于视觉语言提示调整的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/kding1225/softcpt 获取。 本文提出SoftCPT方法，通过软上下文共享机制联合优化多个少样本任务的视觉-语言模型提示调优。 Kun Ding,Ying Wang,Pengzhang Liu,Qiang Yu,Haojian Zhang,Shiming Xiang,Chunhong Pan cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Partition-Tolerant and Byzantine-Tolerant Decision-Making for Distributed Robotic Systems with IOTA and ROS 2
title_zh: 使用 IOTA 和 ROS 2 为分布式机器人系统进行分区容忍和拜占庭容忍决策
abstract: With the increasing ubiquity of autonomous robotic solutions, the interest in their connectivity and in the cooperation within multi-robot systems is rising. Two aspects that are a matter of current research are robot security and secure multi-robot collaboration robust to byzantine agents. Blockchain and other distributed ledger technologies (DLTs) have been proposed to address the challenges in both domains. Nonetheless, some key challenges include scalability and deployment within real-world networks. This paper presents an approach to integrating IOTA and ROS 2 for more scalable DLT-based robotic systems while allowing for network partition tolerance after deployment. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first implementation of IOTA smart contracts for robotic systems, and the first integrated design with ROS 2. This is in comparison to the vast majority of the literature which relies on Ethereum. We present a general IOTA+ROS 2 architecture leading to partition-tolerant decision-making processes that also inherit byzantine tolerance properties from the embedded blockchain structures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for a cooperative mapping application in a system with intermittent network connectivity. We show both superior performance with respect to Ethereum in the presence of network partitions, and a low impact in terms of computational resource utilization. These results open the path for wider integration of blockchain solutions in distributed robotic systems with less stringent connectivity and computational requirements.
summary: With the increasing ubiquity of autonomous robotic solutions, the interest in their connectivity and in the cooperation within multi-robot systems is rising. Two aspects that are a matter of current research are robot security and secure multi-robot collaboration robust to byzantine agents. Blockchain and other distributed ledger technologies (DLTs) have been proposed to address the challenges in both domains. Nonetheless, some key challenges include scalability and deployment within real-world networks. This paper presents an approach to integrating IOTA and ROS 2 for more scalable DLT-based robotic systems while allowing for network partition tolerance after deployment. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first implementation of IOTA smart contracts for robotic systems, and the first integrated design with ROS 2. This is in comparison to the vast majority of the literature which relies on Ethereum. We present a general IOTA+ROS 2 architecture leading to partition-tolerant decision-making processes that also inherit byzantine tolerance properties from the embedded blockchain structures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for a cooperative mapping application in a system with intermittent network connectivity. We show both superior performance with respect to Ethereum in the presence of network partitions, and a low impact in terms of computational resource utilization. These results open the path for wider integration of blockchain solutions in distributed robotic systems with less stringent connectivity and computational requirements.
abstract_zh: 随着自主机器人解决方案的日益普及，人们对它们的连接性和多机器人系统内的合作的兴趣正在上升。当前研究的两个方面是机器人安全性和对拜占庭代理稳健的安全多机器人协作。区块链和其他分布式账本技术（DLT）已被提出来解决这两个领域的挑战。尽管如此，一些关键挑战包括现实网络中的可扩展性和部署。本文提出了一种集成 IOTA 和 ROS 2 的方法，以实现更具可扩展性的基于 DLT 的机器人系统，同时允许部署后的网络分区容错性。据我们所知，这是 IOTA 机器人系统智能合约的首次实现，也是首次与 ROS 2 的集成设计。这与绝大多数依赖以太坊的文献相比。我们提出了一种通用的 IOTA+ROS 2 架构，可实现分区容忍的决策过程，该过程也继承了嵌入式区块链结构的拜占庭容忍属性。我们展示了所提出的框架在具有间歇性网络连接的系统中的协作映射应用程序的有效性。我们在存在网络分区的情况下展示了相对于以太坊的卓越性能，并且在计算资源利用率方面的影响较小。这些结果为在连接性和计算要求不太严格的分布式机器人系统中更广泛地集成区块链解决方案开辟了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合IOTA和ROS 2的架构，实现分布式机器人系统的分区容忍与拜占庭容错决策机制。
AI.motivation: 随着多机器人系统普及，现有区块链方案（如以太坊）存在可扩展性差、网络分区适应性弱等问题，需探索更高效的分布式安全协作框架。
AI.method: 设计IOTA与ROS 2集成架构，利用IOTA区块链的无手续费特性及ROS 2通信框架，构建支持网络分区的拜占庭容错决策流程，并通过协作地图生成任务验证。
AI.result: 在间歇性网络环境下，该框架相较以太坊展现更优性能，且计算资源消耗降低，证明其适用于低连通性、计算受限场景。
AI.conclusion: IOTA+ROS 2架构为区块链在分布式机器人系统中的应用提供了可行路径，尤其适合对网络和计算要求宽松的场景。

title: Exploring Semantic Attributes from A Foundation Model for Federated Learning of Disjoint Label Spaces
title_zh: 从不相交标签空间联邦学习的基础模型中探索语义属性
abstract: Conventional centralised deep learning paradigms are not feasible when data from different sources cannot be shared due to data privacy or transmission limitation. To resolve this problem, federated learning has been introduced to transfer knowledge across multiple sources (clients) with non-shared data while optimising a globally generalised central model (server). Existing federated learning paradigms mostly focus on transferring holistic high-level knowledge (such as class) across models, which are closely related to specific objects of interest so may suffer from inverse attack. In contrast, in this work, we consider transferring mid-level semantic knowledge (such as attribute) which is not sensitive to specific objects of interest and therefore is more privacy-preserving and scalable. To this end, we formulate a new Federated Zero-Shot Learning (FZSL) paradigm to learn mid-level semantic knowledge at multiple local clients with non-shared local data and cumulatively aggregate a globally generalised central model for deployment. To improve model discriminative ability, we propose to explore semantic knowledge augmentation from external knowledge for enriching the mid-level semantic space in FZSL. Extensive experiments on five zeroshot learning benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of our approach for optimising a generalisable federated learning model with mid-level semantic knowledge transfer.
summary: Conventional centralised deep learning paradigms are not feasible when data from different sources cannot be shared due to data privacy or transmission limitation. To resolve this problem, federated learning has been introduced to transfer knowledge across multiple sources (clients) with non-shared data while optimising a globally generalised central model (server). Existing federated learning paradigms mostly focus on transferring holistic high-level knowledge (such as class) across models, which are closely related to specific objects of interest so may suffer from inverse attack. In contrast, in this work, we consider transferring mid-level semantic knowledge (such as attribute) which is not sensitive to specific objects of interest and therefore is more privacy-preserving and scalable. To this end, we formulate a new Federated Zero-Shot Learning (FZSL) paradigm to learn mid-level semantic knowledge at multiple local clients with non-shared local data and cumulatively aggregate a globally generalised central model for deployment. To improve model discriminative ability, we propose to explore semantic knowledge augmentation from external knowledge for enriching the mid-level semantic space in FZSL. Extensive experiments on five zeroshot learning benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of our approach for optimising a generalisable federated learning model with mid-level semantic knowledge transfer.
abstract_zh: 当来自不同来源的数据由于数据隐私或传输限制而无法共享时，传统的集中式深度学习范例是不可行的。为了解决这个问题，引入了联邦学习，通过非共享数据跨多个源（客户端）传输知识，同时优化全局通用中心模型（服务器）。现有的联邦学习范式大多侧重于跨模型传递整体的高级知识（例如类），这些知识与特定的感兴趣对象密切相关，因此可能会遭受逆向攻击。相反，在这项工作中，我们考虑转移对特定感兴趣对象不敏感的中级语义知识（例如属性），因此更能保护隐私和可扩展。为此，我们制定了一种新的联合零样本学习（FZSL）范式，通过非共享本地数据在多个本地客户端学习中级语义知识，并累积聚合全球通用的中央模型以进行部署。为了提高模型判别能力，我们建议探索外部知识的语义知识增强，以丰富 FZSL 的中层语义空间。对五个零样本学习基准数据集的广泛实验验证了我们的方法用于优化具有中级语义知识迁移的通用联邦学习模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的联邦零样本学习范式，通过中层语义属性传输实现隐私保护的跨源模型训练。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖敏感的高层类别知识易受逆向攻击，而中层语义属性更隐私友好且具可扩展性，但现有方法尚未有效利用该特性。
AI.method: 构建FZSL框架，在本地客户端学习中层语义属性并通过外部知识增强语义空间，聚合全局模型实现跨不相交标签空间的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在五个零样本学习基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明其可优化隐私保护的联邦学习模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于中层语义属性的联邦学习能在保证隐私的前提下提升模型跨域适应性，为异构数据场景提供新解决方案。

Existing federated learning paradigms mostly focus on transferring holistic high-level knowledge (such as class) across models, which are closely related to specific objects of interest so may suffer from inverse attack. In contrast, in this work, we consider transferring mid-level semantic knowledge (such as attribute) which is not sensitive to specific objects of interest and therefore is more privacy-preserving and scalable. To this end, we formulate a new Federated Zero-Shot Learning (FZSL) paradigm to learn mid-level semantic knowledge at multiple local clients with non-shared local data and cumulatively aggregate a globally generalised central model for deployment. To improve model discriminative ability, we propose to explore semantic knowledge augmentation from external knowledge for enriching the mid-level semantic space in FZSL. Extensive experiments on five zeroshot learning benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of our approach for optimising a generalisable federated learning model with mid-level semantic knowledge transfer. 当来自不同来源的数据由于数据隐私或传输限制而无法共享时，传统的集中式深度学习范例是不可行的。为了解决这个问题，引入了联邦学习，通过非共享数据跨多个源（客户端）传输知识，同时优化全局通用中心模型（服务器）。现有的联邦学习范式大多侧重于跨模型传递整体的高级知识（例如类），这些知识与特定的感兴趣对象密切相关，因此可能会遭受逆向攻击。相反，在这项工作中，我们考虑转移对特定感兴趣对象不敏感的中级语义知识（例如属性），因此更能保护隐私和可扩展。为此，我们制定了一种新的联合零样本学习（FZSL）范式，通过非共享本地数据在多个本地客户端学习中级语义知识，并累积聚合全球通用的中央模型以进行部署。为了提高模型判别能力，我们建议探索外部知识的语义知识增强，以丰富 FZSL 的中层语义空间。对五个零样本学习基准数据集的广泛实验验证了我们的方法用于优化具有中级语义知识迁移的通用联邦学习模型的有效性。 本文提出一种新的联邦零样本学习范式，通过中层语义属性传输实现隐私保护的跨源模型训练。 Shitong Sun,Chenyang Si,Guile Wu,Shaogang Gong cs.CV

title: Planar Confluent Orthogonal Drawings of 4-Modal Digraphs
title_zh: 4 模态有向图的平面汇合正交图
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: In a planar confluent orthogonal drawing (PCOD) of a directed graph (digraph) vertices are drawn as points in the plane and edges as orthogonal polylines starting with a vertical segment and ending with a horizontal segment. Edges may overlap in their first or last segment, but must not intersect otherwise. PCODs can be seen as a directed variant of Kandinsky drawings or as planar L-drawings of subdivisions of digraphs. The maximum number of subdivision vertices in an edge is then the split complexity. A PCOD is upward if each edge is drawn with monotonically increasing y-coordinates and quasi-upward if no edge starts with decreasing y-coordinates. We study the split complexity of PCODs and (quasi-)upward PCODs for various classes of graphs.
summary: In a planar confluent orthogonal drawing (PCOD) of a directed graph (digraph) vertices are drawn as points in the plane and edges as orthogonal polylines starting with a vertical segment and ending with a horizontal segment. Edges may overlap in their first or last segment, but must not intersect otherwise. PCODs can be seen as a directed variant of Kandinsky drawings or as planar L-drawings of subdivisions of digraphs. The maximum number of subdivision vertices in an edge is then the split complexity. A PCOD is upward if each edge is drawn with monotonically increasing y-coordinates and quasi-upward if no edge starts with decreasing y-coordinates. We study the split complexity of PCODs and (quasi-)upward PCODs for various classes of graphs.
abstract_zh: 在有向图（有向图）的平面汇合正交绘图 (PCOD) 中，顶点被绘制为平面中的点，边缘被绘制为以垂直线段开始并以水平线段结束的正交折线。边可以在其第一段或最后一段重叠，但不得以其他方式相交。 PCOD 可以被视为康定斯基绘图的有向变体或有向图细分的平面 L 绘图。一条边中细分顶点的最大数量就是分割复杂度。如果每条边都以单调递增的 y 坐标绘制，则 PCOD 为向上；如果没有边以递减的 y 坐标开始，则 PCOD 为准向上。我们研究了各类图的 PCOD 和（准）向上 PCOD 的分割复杂度。

AI.tldr: 研究4-模态有向图的平面汇聚正交绘制（PCOD）的分割复杂度及（准）向上条件。
AI.motivation: 现有有向图绘制方法在处理复杂结构时存在边交叉或分割顶点过多的问题，需探索更高效的可视化方案。
AI.method: 结合Kandinsky绘图与L-绘图理论，分析不同图类的分割复杂度，通过算法设计满足向上/准向上约束。
AI.result: 确定了各类图的PCOD分割复杂度界限，并证明了准向上PCOD的可行性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了分割复杂度与可视化清晰度，为复杂有向图绘制提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Zhitong Lai,Haichao Sun,Rui Tian,Nannan Ding,Zhiguo Wu,Yanjie Wang
title: Rethinking Skip Connections in Encoder-decoder Networks for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 重新思考编码器-解码器网络中用于单目深度估计的跳跃连接
abstract: Skip connections are fundamental units in encoder-decoder networks, which are able to improve the feature propagtion of the neural networks. However, most methods with skip connections just connected features with the same resolution in the encoder and the decoder, which ignored the information loss in the encoder with the layers going deeper. To leverage the information loss of the features in shallower layers of the encoder, we propose a full skip connection network (FSCN) for monocular depth estimation task. In addition, to fuse features within skip connections more closely, we present an adaptive concatenation module (ACM). Further more, we conduct extensive experiments on the ourdoor and indoor datasets (i.e., the KITTI dataste and the NYU Depth V2 dataset) for FSCN and FSCN gets the state-of-the-art results.
summary: Skip connections are fundamental units in encoder-decoder networks, which are able to improve the feature propagtion of the neural networks. However, most methods with skip connections just connected features with the same resolution in the encoder and the decoder, which ignored the information loss in the encoder with the layers going deeper. To leverage the information loss of the features in shallower layers of the encoder, we propose a full skip connection network (FSCN) for monocular depth estimation task. In addition, to fuse features within skip connections more closely, we present an adaptive concatenation module (ACM). Further more, we conduct extensive experiments on the ourdoor and indoor datasets (i.e., the KITTI dataste and the NYU Depth V2 dataset) for FSCN and FSCN gets the state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 跳跃连接是编码器-解码器网络中的基本单元，能够改善神经网络的特征传播。然而，大多数具有跳跃连接的方法只是连接编码器和解码器中具有相同分辨率的特征，这忽略了编码器中随着层数加深而导致的信息损失。为了利用编码器较浅层中特征的信息丢失，我们提出了一种用于单目深度估计任务的全跳过连接网络（FSCN）。此外，为了更紧密地融合跳跃连接中的特征，我们提出了自适应串联模块（ACM）。此外，我们对 FSCN 的室外和室内数据集（即 KITTI dataste 和 NYU Depth V2 数据集）进行了广泛的实验，FSCN 获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的编码器-解码器网络结构，通过全跳连接和自适应拼接模块提升单目深度估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统跳连接仅连接相同分辨率的特征，忽略了编码器深层特征的信息损失，导致浅层有用信息未被充分利用。
AI.method: 设计了全跳连接网络（FSCN），通过跨层连接保留浅层特征信息，并引入自适应拼接模块（ACM）增强跳连接内的特征融合效果。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NYU Depth V2数据集上实验表明，FSCN在单目深度估计任务中取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过全跳连接和自适应特征融合机制，有效缓解了编码器信息丢失问题，显著提升了深度估计精度。

authors_text: Yifeng Zhou,Chuming Lin,Donghao Luo,Yong Liu,Ying Tai,Chengjie Wang,Mingang Chen
title: Joint Learning Content and Degradation Aware Feature for Blind Super-Resolution
title_zh: 盲超分辨率的联合学习内容和退化感知功能
abstract: To achieve promising results on blind image super-resolution (SR), some attempts leveraged the low resolution (LR) images to predict the kernel and improve the SR performance. However, these Supervised Kernel Prediction (SKP) methods are impractical due to the unavailable real-world blur kernels. Although some Unsupervised Degradation Prediction (UDP) methods are proposed to bypass this problem, the \textit{inconsistency} between degradation embedding and SR feature is still challenging. By exploring the correlations between degradation embedding and SR feature, we observe that jointly learning the content and degradation aware feature is optimal. Based on this observation, a Content and Degradation aware SR Network dubbed CDSR is proposed. Specifically, CDSR contains three newly-established modules: (1) a Lightweight Patch-based Encoder (LPE) is applied to jointly extract content and degradation features; (2) a Domain Query Attention based module (DQA) is employed to adaptively reduce the inconsistency; (3) a Codebook-based Space Compress module (CSC) that can suppress the redundant information. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed CDSR outperforms the existing UDP models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM even compared with the state-of-the-art SKP methods.
summary: To achieve promising results on blind image super-resolution (SR), some attempts leveraged the low resolution (LR) images to predict the kernel and improve the SR performance. However, these Supervised Kernel Prediction (SKP) methods are impractical due to the unavailable real-world blur kernels. Although some Unsupervised Degradation Prediction (UDP) methods are proposed to bypass this problem, the \textit{inconsistency} between degradation embedding and SR feature is still challenging. By exploring the correlations between degradation embedding and SR feature, we observe that jointly learning the content and degradation aware feature is optimal. Based on this observation, a Content and Degradation aware SR Network dubbed CDSR is proposed. Specifically, CDSR contains three newly-established modules: (1) a Lightweight Patch-based Encoder (LPE) is applied to jointly extract content and degradation features; (2) a Domain Query Attention based module (DQA) is employed to adaptively reduce the inconsistency; (3) a Codebook-based Space Compress module (CSC) that can suppress the redundant information. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed CDSR outperforms the existing UDP models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM even compared with the state-of-the-art SKP methods.
abstract_zh: 为了在盲图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得有希望的结果，一些尝试利用低分辨率（LR）图像来预测内核并提高 SR 性能。然而，由于现实世界的模糊核不可用，这些监督核预测（SKP）方法是不切实际的。尽管提出了一些无监督退化预测（UDP）方法来绕过这个问题，但退化嵌入和 SR 特征之间的 \textit{不一致性} 仍然具有挑战性。通过探索退化嵌入和 SR 特征之间的相关性，我们观察到联合学习内容和退化感知特征是最优的。基于这一观察，提出了一种名为 CDSR 的内容和降级感知 SR 网络。具体来说，CDSR包含三个新建立的模块：（1）应用轻量级基于补丁的编码器（LPE）来联合提取内容和退化特征； (2)采用基于域查询注意的模块(DQA)来自适应地减少不一致性； (3)基于码本的空间压缩模块(CSC)，可以抑制冗余信息。对多个基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 CDSR 优于现有的 UDP 模型，并且即使与最先进的 SKP 方法相比，在 PSNR 和 SSIM 上也能实现有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合学习内容与退化感知特征的盲图像超分辨率方法，解决现有方法在无真实退化核情况下的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 监督退化核预测方法依赖不可行的真实退化核，无监督方法存在退化嵌入与超分特征不一致性问题，需探索内容与退化特征的联合学习机制。
AI.method: 设计CDSR网络，包含轻量级块编码器（LPE）提取双重特征、领域查询注意力模块（DQA）缓解不一致性、基于码本的空间压缩模块（CSC）抑制冗余信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，CDSR超越现有无监督模型，在PSNR和SSIM指标上接近监督方法的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习内容与退化特征能有效提升盲超分效果，CDSR通过模块化设计实现了性能与鲁棒性的平衡。

search_text: Joint Learning Content and Degradation Aware Feature for Blind Super-Resolution 盲超分辨率的联合学习内容和退化感知功能 To achieve promising results on blind image super-resolution (SR), some attempts leveraged the low resolution (LR) images to predict the kernel and improve the SR performance. However, these Supervised Kernel Prediction (SKP) methods are impractical due to the unavailable real-world blur kernels. Although some Unsupervised Degradation Prediction (UDP) methods are proposed to bypass this problem, the \textit{inconsistency} between degradation embedding and SR feature is still challenging. By exploring the correlations between degradation embedding and SR feature, we observe that jointly learning the content and degradation aware feature is optimal. Based on this observation, a Content and Degradation aware SR Network dubbed CDSR is proposed. Specifically, CDSR contains three newly-established modules: (1) a Lightweight Patch-based Encoder (LPE) is applied to jointly extract content and degradation features; (2) a Domain Query Attention based module (DQA) is employed to adaptively reduce the inconsistency; (3) a Codebook-based Space Compress module (CSC) that can suppress the redundant information. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed CDSR outperforms the existing UDP models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM even compared with the state-of-the-art SKP methods. 为了在盲图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得有希望的结果，一些尝试利用低分辨率（LR）图像来预测内核并提高 SR 性能。然而，由于现实世界的模糊核不可用，这些监督核预测（SKP）方法是不切实际的。尽管提出了一些无监督退化预测（UDP）方法来绕过这个问题，但退化嵌入和 SR 特征之间的 \textit{不一致性} 仍然具有挑战性。通过探索退化嵌入和 SR 特征之间的相关性，我们观察到联合学习内容和退化感知特征是最优的。基于这一观察，提出了一种名为 CDSR 的内容和降级感知 SR 网络。具体来说，CDSR包含三个新建立的模块：（1）应用轻量级基于补丁的编码器（LPE）来联合提取内容和退化特征； (2)采用基于域查询注意的模块(DQA)来自适应地减少不一致性； (3)基于码本的空间压缩模块(CSC)，可以抑制冗余信息。对多个基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 CDSR 优于现有的 UDP 模型，并且即使与最先进的 SKP 方法相比，在 PSNR 和 SSIM 上也能实现有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种联合学习内容与退化感知特征的盲图像超分辨率方法，解决现有方法在无真实退化核情况下的性能瓶颈。 Yifeng Zhou,Chuming Lin,Donghao Luo,Yong Liu,Ying Tai,Chengjie Wang,Mingang Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Boxi Wu,Jie Jiang,Haidong Ren,Zifan Du,Wenxiao Wang,Zhifeng Li,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Binbin Lin,Wei Liu
title: Towards In-distribution Compatibility in Out-of-distribution Detection
title_zh: 在分布外检测中实现分布内兼容性
abstract: Deep neural network, despite its remarkable capability of discriminating targeted in-distribution samples, shows poor performance on detecting anomalous out-of-distribution data. To address this defect, state-of-the-art solutions choose to train deep networks on an auxiliary dataset of outliers. Various training criteria for these auxiliary outliers are proposed based on heuristic intuitions. However, we find that these intuitively designed outlier training criteria can hurt in-distribution learning and eventually lead to inferior performance. To this end, we identify three causes of the in-distribution incompatibility: contradictory gradient, false likelihood, and distribution shift. Based on our new understandings, we propose a new out-of-distribution detection method by adapting both the top-design of deep models and the loss function. Our method achieves in-distribution compatibility by pursuing less interference with the probabilistic characteristic of in-distribution features. On several benchmarks, our method not only achieves the state-of-the-art out-of-distribution detection performance but also improves the in-distribution accuracy.
summary: Deep neural network, despite its remarkable capability of discriminating targeted in-distribution samples, shows poor performance on detecting anomalous out-of-distribution data. To address this defect, state-of-the-art solutions choose to train deep networks on an auxiliary dataset of outliers. Various training criteria for these auxiliary outliers are proposed based on heuristic intuitions. However, we find that these intuitively designed outlier training criteria can hurt in-distribution learning and eventually lead to inferior performance. To this end, we identify three causes of the in-distribution incompatibility: contradictory gradient, false likelihood, and distribution shift. Based on our new understandings, we propose a new out-of-distribution detection method by adapting both the top-design of deep models and the loss function. Our method achieves in-distribution compatibility by pursuing less interference with the probabilistic characteristic of in-distribution features. On several benchmarks, our method not only achieves the state-of-the-art out-of-distribution detection performance but also improves the in-distribution accuracy.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络尽管具有区分目标分布内样本的出色能力，但在检测异常分布外数据方面表现不佳。为了解决这个缺陷，最先进的解决方案选择在异常值的辅助数据集上训练深度网络。基于启发式直觉，提出了这些辅助异常值的各种训练标准。然而，我们发现这些直观设计的异常训练标准可能会损害分布学习并最终导致性能下降。为此，我们确定了分布内不相容的三个原因：矛盾梯度、错误似然和分布偏移。基于我们的新理解，我们通过采用深度模型的顶层设计和损失函数，提出了一种新的分布外检测方法。我们的方法通过追求对分布内特征的概率特征的干扰较小来实现分布内兼容性。在几个基准测试中，我们的方法不仅实现了最先进的分布外检测性能，而且还提高了分布内精度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决深度神经网络在检测分布外数据时与分布内数据兼容性不足的问题，提出一种兼顾分布外检测性能与分布内准确率的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过辅助异常数据集训练模型，但其设计准则可能破坏分布内数据的学习，导致性能下降。作者发现这一问题源于梯度矛盾、伪似然和分布偏移三方面原因。
AI.method: 通过重构深度模型顶层设计与损失函数，减少对分布内特征概率特性的干扰，实现分布内兼容性与分布外检测的协同优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在分布外检测性能达到SOTA水平，同时显著提升分布内数据的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过消除训练过程中的干扰因素，所提方法有效解决了分布内外数据兼容性矛盾，为鲁棒性检测提供了新思路。

Various training criteria for these auxiliary outliers are proposed based on heuristic intuitions. However, we find that these intuitively designed outlier training criteria can hurt in-distribution learning and eventually lead to inferior performance. To this end, we identify three causes of the in-distribution incompatibility: contradictory gradient, false likelihood, and distribution shift. title: Light-YOLOv5: A Lightweight Algorithm for Improved YOLOv5 in Complex Fire Scenarios
title_zh: Light-YOLOv5：复杂火灾场景下改进YOLOv5的轻量级算法
abstract: Fire-detection technology is of great importance for successful fire-prevention measures. Image-based fire detection is one effective method. At present, object-detection algorithms are deficient in performing detection speed and accuracy tasks when they are applied in complex fire scenarios. In this study, a lightweight fire-detection algorithm, Light-YOLOv5 (You Only Look Once version five), is presented. First, a separable vision transformer (SepViT) block is used to replace several C3 modules in the final layer of a backbone network to enhance both the contact of the backbone network to global in-formation and the extraction of flame and smoke features; second, a light bidirectional feature pyramid network (Light-BiFPN) is designed to lighten the model while improving the feature extraction and balancing speed and accuracy features during a fire-detection procedure; third, a global attention mechanism (GAM) is fused into the network to cause the model to focus more on the global dimensional features and further improve the detection accuracy of the model; and finally, the Mish activation function and SIoU loss are utilized to simultaneously increase the convergence speed and enhance the accuracy. The experimental results show that compared to the original algorithm, the mean average accuracy (mAP) of Light-YOLOv5 increases by 3.3%, the number of parameters decreases by 27.1%, and the floating point operations (FLOPs) decrease by 19.1%. The detection speed reaches 91.1 FPS, which can detect targets in complex fire scenarios in real time.
summary: Fire-detection technology is of great importance for successful fire-prevention measures. Image-based fire detection is one effective method. At present, object-detection algorithms are deficient in performing detection speed and accuracy tasks when they are applied in complex fire scenarios. In this study, a lightweight fire-detection algorithm, Light-YOLOv5 (You Only Look Once version five), is presented. First, a separable vision transformer (SepViT) block is used to replace several C3 modules in the final layer of a backbone network to enhance both the contact of the backbone network to global in-formation and the extraction of flame and smoke features; second, a light bidirectional feature pyramid network (Light-BiFPN) is designed to lighten the model while improving the feature extraction and balancing speed and accuracy features during a fire-detection procedure; third, a global attention mechanism (GAM) is fused into the network to cause the model to focus more on the global dimensional features and further improve the detection accuracy of the model; and finally, the Mish activation function and SIoU loss are utilized to simultaneously increase the convergence speed and enhance the accuracy. The experimental results show that compared to the original algorithm, the mean average accuracy (mAP) of Light-YOLOv5 increases by 3.3%, the number of parameters decreases by 27.1%, and the floating point operations (FLOPs) decrease by 19.1%. The detection speed reaches 91.1 FPS, which can detect targets in complex fire scenarios in real time.
abstract_zh: 火灾探测技术对于成功的防火措施至关重要。基于图像的火灾探测是一种有效的方法。目前，目标检测算法在复杂火灾场景中执行检测速度和准确性方面存在不足。在这项研究中，提出了一种轻量级火灾检测算法 Light-YOLOv5（You Only Look Once version 5）。首先，使用可分离视觉变换器（SepViT）块替换主干网络最后一层中的多个C3模块，以增强主干网络与全局信息的联系以及火焰和烟雾特征的提取；其次，设计了轻型双向特征金字塔网络（Light-BiFPN），以减轻模型重量，同时改进特征提取并平衡火灾探测过程中的速度和准确性特征；第三，网络中融合全局注意力机制（GAM），使模型更加关注全局维度特征，进一步提高模型的检测精度；最后，利用Mish激活函数和SIoU损失来同时提高收敛速度和提高精度。实验结果表明，与原算法相比，Light-YOLOv5的平均准确率（mAP）提高了3.3%，参数数量减少了27.1%，浮点运算（FLOPs）减少了19.1%。检测速度达到91.1 FPS，可实时检测复杂火灾场景中的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出轻量级火情检测算法Light-YOLOv5，通过改进YOLOv5模型以提升复杂火场场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测算法在复杂火场场景中存在检测速度与精度不足的问题，需开发轻量化模型以实现实时高效火情识别。
AI.method: 采用分离视觉变换器(SepViT)增强全局特征提取，设计轻量双向特征金字塔网络(Light-BiFPN)优化特征融合，引入全局注意力机制(GAM)提升检测精度，并结合Mish激活函数与SIoU损失函数加速收敛。
AI.result: 相较原始算法，mAP提升3.3%，参数量减少27.1%，FLOPs降低19.1%，检测速度达91.1 FPS，满足复杂火场实时检测需求。
AI.conclusion: Light-YOLOv5通过多模块优化在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算量，为复杂火场场景的实时火情检测提供了高效解决方案。
